name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2003%2E5257348%2Ef9vMQe ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

California Republicans recently gathered for their first meetings since
the 2022 elections — which included a keynote speech from Kevin McCarthy.

Just like clockwork, he dedicated a portion of his speech to attacking
Adam:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230327_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2003%2E5257348%2Ef9vMQe ]Kevin McCarthy at the CA GOP meeting saying Adam Schiff lied to the American
public... He should never become senator for California.”

Kevin McCarthy: Adam Schiff “lied to the American public... He should
never become senator for California.”

Let’s call this false attack for what it is, Derek: Desperate.

Kevin McCarthy is perhaps the weakest Speaker in the history of the
country. We knew that from the moment...hours...days and 15 votes it took for
him to be elected Speaker. Now, Kevin is fully beholden to the MAGA and
QAnon crazy caucus who still holds a grudge against Adam for leading the
first impeachment against Donald Trump.

Kevin’s not the only one obsessed with Adam, either. The biggest players
in GOP politics — Trump, McCarthy, and Fox News — are united in painting
Adam as the boogeyman of the national Democratic Party. They’re running
negative attack ads, spending time during primetime speeches, and doing
all they can to sabotage Adam’s campaign. We need the resources to take on
all of them.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=mar2023_abs_em.dt2mVY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230327_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2003%2E5257348%2Ef9vMQe ]Adam is ready to take on MAGA extremists and fight for all Californians
in the Senate. Can you donate $3 ahead of our first FEC fundraising
deadline of the campaign?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=mar2023_abs_em.DC74Jc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230327_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2003%2E5257348%2Ef9vMQe ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

name: Wes Moore
subject: About my friend Andy Beshear
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60833229/398345479/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmMzMDhiMy1mZWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0RiQvKjML_RdL0qo3WmDKyzXr56lW8Io9uXyaf5tMzM=&emci=7f9bcf8a-26cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7bc308b3-fecc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)
---
Friends, right now, Kentucky is trying to put discrimination into state law, including extreme anti-trans bills and a Don’t Say Gay law. **But there’s one man standing in their way.** My colleague and friend **Andy Beshear flipped the Kentucky Governorship blue** in 2019 by just over 5,000 votes. One year later, **Trump swept** the state by 26 points. Now, Andy is up for re-election this November in what is going to be one of the toughest races in the country. **Friends, we cannot afford to lose Andy’s voice of reason as governor of Kentucky.** Andy is standing strong for raising teacher salaries and against cutting retirement pensions, even in the face of powerful special interests. When the GOP-led legislature tried to further restrict reproductive rights in Kentucky, **Andy vetoed their anti-abortion bill** , and when they passed sweeping anti-LGBTQ legislation, Andy vetoed that, too. **I’ll be straight: this is going to be the toughest race of his career.** **As a Democratic Governor in a Trump +26 state, Andy is no stranger to a fight, but he needs our help ASAP.** **[Team, can you rush a donation of $25 to my friend Andy Beshear before the March 31 End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline? Andy is proof that Democrats CAN win in red states, but he needs our help now to keep up the good fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60833230/398345480/-1462855307?refcode=fl_em_fr_202303127beshear_wes_actives_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmMzMDhiMy1mZWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0RiQvKjML_RdL0qo3WmDKyzXr56lW8Io9uXyaf5tMzM=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: The Ohio Democratic Party
subject: Not quite where we need to be.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We're quickly approaching our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and we'll be honest, we're not quite where we need to be:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60833252/398346361/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmU5MzlmNy1mZWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XS1HJ0j_xmyyVssjRChVT_485B9cVdQggoO3O3eto0s=) | Team,

We're quickly approaching our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of 2023, and we'll be honest, fundraising took a dip over the weekend: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60833253/398346363/-1371640756?refcode=em23_230327_eoq2_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230327_eoq2_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=06e939f7-fecc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmU5MzlmNy1mZWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XS1HJ0j_xmyyVssjRChVT_485B9cVdQggoO3O3eto0s=)
Since we're gearing up for a competitive election year — while also working to get a reproductive rights initiative on the ballot! — we really can't afford to fall short.

**Team, we're fighting tooth and nail to fund our signature-gathering efforts and elect pro-choice Democrats all the way from the Statehouse to Congress. And what we raise off these emails matters.**

**[Since we're coming up on our first FEC EOQ fundraising deadline of this year, it's crucial that we keep up our momentum. subject: Urgent: Make Your Voice Heard on Key Washington State Legislation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Important WA legislation requires your attention! Click to send pre-written emails to key Democrats in Olympia on 4 critical bills impacting our state

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

============================================================
** View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/four-bills-email-dems?e=6a281f566d)
Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved.
Your interest in the Washington State Republican Party, National Republican Committee or Washington state Republican Candidates

11811 NE 1st St Suite 306
Bellevue, WA 98005
USA

You can ** update your preferences (https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/profile?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=ab6593da4e)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=ab6593da4e)
.

name: Team Trump
subject: Highlights from President Trump's First Rally in Waco, TX
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| **President Trump Draws Over 25,000 Patriots for First Rally in Waco, TX**
_234 of Texas' 254 Counties Were Represented at the Rally, 92% of the State Came Out for President Trump_
---
| **Mar-a-Lago, FL** —On Saturday, over 25,000 patriots from across Texas gathered at the Waco Regional Airport to welcome President Donald J. Trump to the Lone Star State for his first 2024 campaign rally.
---
| Before touching down in Waco,[ _Trump Force One performed a fly-over_](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UctugzAQ_BpzKzLrJwcOSVB6SBVV6SO9RcZ2glNeAiOUfn0NopUsa3fWM7uztlnCRZpyRglEJgMtQevIZYCBYAISJxgoi6-y0FQnjKWJFWAoonhyTWzaRlXm7vux7mLd1lGZCXYlknAhZUoVJyQpKAbDUqCm4IVMoyorve8GRDYI9uH4yXlv-5kesvdZ6qz6U7ukg1d-HEKQcJIKJoWgMiEMh5Aisg8qOWAEfPT1pbbGjXVAbK1ctYJDO_baBlC7i1oxrepOuVuzkBeb4q_SNt42PhQkwzyAl6ZyJqTP5f14323eXssFLJ2ZW7-o79NHLuk56jPTTa6q3MBF2M1tnmBZSGhVuesjQ2KLABYewOIdDnT7deSH8yF_2nz-3J7y8AnTXIVduP2js_9PV5V4dQZI5L-Ef4LZ "Trump Force One performed a fly-over") above the massive crowd of Trump supporters awaiting his arrival.
---
| |
---
| Trump Force One Flies Over 25,000 Cheering Supporters in Waco, Texas
---
| President Trump detailed his Agenda47 platform, promising to secure our borders, restore law and order in American cities, end the war in Ukraine, defeat the cult of gender ideology, unleash American energy independence, and rebuild the American economy.
---
| “Not only is Biden courting nuclear holocaust, he’s blowing up the U.S. economy with the Biden Banking Crisis—a disaster of historic proportions,” [_President Trump said_](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UctugzAQ_BpzK8Lr94FDEpRL2h7SR3qLXNtJ3GJAYITSr69BtJJl7c56ZnfWrsRcKMUZJZDZEowEYzJfQgGkICALXABl-UV-GmowYwo7AZYiWky-yW3b6Np-xX4MXW7akN3Ki6PEUSo1ZQoMU4wqwTAWShgqMLNZXd5i7AZENgj26cTJx-j6mZ6y11nqpPtju6RD1HEcUoA5UUJyIkSKQEomMSL7pFJBgYCPMZyDs34MCXFB-3oFh3bsjUug8We9YkaHTvtrs5AXm-Kv0jbRNTEVJCt4As9N7W1KNxOTTy9ht2sW8Obt3PpRfx_fKklPWV_abvJ17Qcu0m6u8wTLQlKr2l_uJRJbBLDwABbvcKDbj2d-OB2qh837z_WhSp8wzVXYpTveO_f_dFXJV2eARPULdIuCpQ "President Trump said").
---
| “As President, I will end the inflation nightmare and rebuild the greatest economy in the history of the world. I will reclaim our energy independence and energy dominance, just as we had a few short years ago.”
---
| |
---
| Supporters from across the country traveled to Waco to attend the first rally of the campaign
---
| |
---
| "They're not coming after me. They're coming after you, and[ _I'm just standing in their way_](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UctuwyAQ_Bp8i4WXpw8-JLGSQ6oeorbpLcKAExK_ZGNZ6dcXW24lhJhZZpZZbJZwkaacUQKRyUBL0DpyGWAgmIDECQbK4lIWmuqEsTSxAgxFFE-uiU3bqMo8fD_WXazbOrpnJBWixFIVoGkhiGK2NCnBqRGCF4kkUZXdve8GRLYIDmH5yXlv-1ke0MdsdVH9uV3g4JUfh3BI-GzMGOMsEVRgwBKRQ3DJASPgo6-vtTVurANja-WqlRzasdc2kNpd1cppVXfK3ZpFvMQUf5W28bbxoSAZ5oG8NpUzAZKjPabP7rFnC3l3Zm79pp7nz1zSS9RnpptcVbmBizCb2_yCZSChVeXKV4bEDgEsOoAlO5zo7vudny6nfLP9-rlt8vAJ01yFfdj9q7P_V1eXeE0GSOS_Uy6DRA "I'm just standing in their way")... and eventually, I won't have to stand in their way because in 2024, we're going to have the greatest victory of them all.”
---
| "You put me back in the White House, their reign will be over, and [_America will be a free nation once again_](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UctuwyAQ_Br7VgvWeMEHH5JaUVVXOaRqkltEASckfsnGstKvL7bcSggxM8wus5iMIk9TTFgMoc5ACVAqtBkQiEkMglACLIlK8a2YokmSUsNBs4CRyTaRbhtZ6bvrx7qLVFuHt0yihhIRiQFWCmFKATEkOilRpwYVDavs5lw3BPEmgJ1fbrLOmX62e3T43O6Nm9r-4cHgpBsHf6AYpxyRCsGRokBCeRDvfI0cSAA4uvpSG23H2jOmlrZayaEde2U8qexFrpySdSfttVnMS0j-p7SNM43zgkgIevLSVFZ7eBju7_LcFce3hbxZPbf-kI_DVy7YKewz3U22quyA3E_mOr9gGYdvVdnymQV8GwAsPoAlORRse95jcSryl83x5_qS-y-YZhVe_e6enfm_ulaJ1mQQ8PwXVZCC5A "America will be a free nation once again").”
---
| President Trump promised to take on the war-mongering Globalists, the RINOs, the big money special interests, and the open-border fanatics trying to destroy America.
---
| “[ _For seven years_](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UMtuwyAQ_Bp8iwUL5nHwIambS6oeIrXpLSJAElr8qI3rpl9fbKWV0IqdYXaZcSXhQileMAqZLcFIMCbzJWCgmILEBAMr8rM8GWZIUSjiBFiGGJ58k9u20cG-x36su9y0dXYtjdKYUGIdls6cXHEyGlPGJbaUK2dVFsprjN2A6BrBNp04-RhdP8tTp8N3qkPUcRzShXCqhMAYONACpOKYILpN4gowAj7G-lg768c6Ia7WPtzBoR174xJo_FHfMaPrTvtLs4gXd-KPaZvompgIWWCewGMTvE3tXj4C_fq0Ri3g1dt59ZP-2L9Ukh2yvrTd5EPwAxcpksv8gyWHtCr4861EYoMAFh3AYhl2bPP2zHeHXbVav_5cVlXKfppZeEg13jr3__Q-Jb87AySqX1N5gBg "For seven years"), you and I have been taking on the corrupt, rotten, and sinister forces trying to destroy America.”
---
| |
---
| |
---
| President Trump emerges from Trump Force One at Waco Regional Airport
---
| |
---

They're coming after you, and "I'm just standing in their way"... and eventually, I won't have to stand in their way because in 2024, we're going to have the greatest victory of them all.” | "You put me back in the White House, their reign will be over, and "America will be a free nation once again".” | President Trump promised to take on the war-mongering Globalists, the RINOs, the big money special interests, and the open-border fanatics trying to destroy America. | “ "For seven years", you and I have been taking on the corrupt, rotten, and sinister forces trying to destroy America.” | | | | | President Trump emerges from Trump Force One at Waco Regional Airport | | | President Trump delivers remarks to 25,000 supporters in Waco, Texas | Prior to President Trump’s arrival, "Congressman Matt Gaetz energized the crowd" by saying, “The best and the brightest of the Republican Party must unify under the Trump banner... there is no success without victory and there is no Trumpism in 2024 without Donald J. | Peter,

_**154,998 illegal immigrants were encountered at the U.S.-Mexico border in February alone, marking a devastating 24 months in a row of encounters above 150,000. This is the worst border crisis on record, and it demands our immediate attention.**_

I am committed to working across the aisle with all members of Congress to find a solution to this crisis. We must address this issue with urgency, compassion, and a strong commitment to our nation's security.

But I can't do this alone, Peter.

[_**Can you join my fight to secure our borders and protect our nation's future? Your contribution will help me advocate for common-sense policies that will secure our borders, enforce our laws, and provide the necessary resources to our border patrol agents. >>>**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=e793a7bafd&e=c87c5d8d97)

| Your support will make a real difference in our fight to secure our borders and protect our nation.

Together, we can address this crisis head-on.

Sincerely,

clean_body: 154,998 Illegal... | | | | | | | Peter, 154,998 illegal immigrants were encountered at the U.S.-Mexico border in February alone, marking a devastating 24 months in a row of encounters above 150,000. This is the worst border crisis on record, and it demands our immediate attention. I am committed to working across the aisle with all members of Congress to find a solution to this crisis. We must address this issue with urgency, compassion, and a strong commitment to our nation's security. But I can't do this alone, Peter. | "CONTRIBUTE TODAY" | Your support will make a real difference in our fight to secure our borders and protect our nation. Together, we can address this crisis head-on. Sincerely, | Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | "CONTRIBUTE TODAY" | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | **When The Government Says "Don't Worry",Then It's Time To Panic...**
---
**When The Government Says "Don't Worry",Then It's Time To Panic...**
---
As you already know, in 2008 we experienced one of the greatest financial meltdowns in modern history. Markets around the world crashed. Stock prices dropped. Once "invincible" financial institutions started showing signs of collapse. Then Governments "came to the rescue", handing out massive bailouts and stimulus packages to keep the world economy afloat. We've been told these drastic measures prevented a total collapse of our system... But all it did was show the cracks in the system. Many lost faith in the financial system and the U.S Government. **And now it's possible things could get worse.** Because we're nearly $32 TRILLION in debt, and if that bubble pops? Your money could go to zero. Here's how:
---
_Once investors who are buying Treasury securities (which finance the U.S. government's debt) start to think the United States is in over its head, they may demand higher interest rates to cover the growing risk of buying Treasuries. This could trigger a further debt spiral, leaving Washington short of money._
---
In other words? **Boom**. Because once our debt collectors come knocking on our door, we're screwed. $31 trillion in debt would be owed... Which means every legal citizen would owe more than $93,000.
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
The savings of regular working class Americans could be in serious trouble. **But there IS something you could do...** If you're concerned (and you should be) don't wait around for something to happen - you can do something NOW. Request a copy of this [**FREE GUIDE**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDg3LTQ2ODJkZmQ3NzVmZTQ1MDBhNTY0YjlhOTFmM2Q4NTNmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xpbmsuZ29sZGNvLmNvbS83MDE0VDAwMDAwMFFPdXYtMjAyMy0wMy0yOCJ9/HUk-i8T9PcZ7CbwXvltIjQ) that explains exactly why THOUSANDS have used this **IRS Loophole to possibly save their IRA/401(k).** Act now! It only takes seconds. The next step is yours, and it could mean a future of wealth... or poverty. It's up to you. **All you have to do is**[**request the free guide now.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)

subject: Fight or flight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter,

Right now, we're coming up on one of the biggest challenges of our mission, and I wanted to fill you in on where we stand.

In such important moments, we have a choice: we can run away from a challenge or fight through it.

_**I 'm ready to fight, and I know you are too.**_

**Our FIRST FEC end-of-quarter deadline is just days away, and it 's URGENT that we meet our goal. **

With so much on the line next year, we have to meet EVERY DEADLINE until November 2024 if we're going to take back the Senate.

**[I need your help. We CANNOT give up before the fight has already begun. Pitch in NOW so we can meet this CRITICAL deadline for our campaign!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62487220:JKTTO9G-N:m:1:3331421248:06A984D63F4BD8483355C617E47EA3A3:r)**

[**PITCH IN $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62487219:JKTTO9G-N:m:1:3331421248:06A984D63F4BD8483355C617E47EA3A3:r)

[**PITCH IN $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62487218:JKTTO9G-N:m:1:3331421248:06A984D63F4BD8483355C617E47EA3A3:r)

[**PITCH IN $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62487217:JKTTO9G-N:m:1:3331421248:06A984D63F4BD8483355C617E47EA3A3:r)
---
[**PITCH IN $250**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62487216:JKTTO9G-N:m:1:3331421248:06A984D63F4BD8483355C617E47EA3A3:r)
---
[**PITCH IN OTHER AMOUNT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62487220:JKTTO9G-N:m:1:3331421248:06A984D63F4BD8483355C617E47EA3A3:r)
---

name: Aurora Regino
subject: They tried to "transition" my daughter behind my back
body:
I never thought it would be me.

| |
---
| | My Fellow concerned American,I never thought it would be me. I’d seen the news headlines and the crazy videos of activist teachers talking about how they indoctrinated students with ideas about sexuality and gender, against parents' wishes and behind their backs...But I never thought in a million years it would happen to my family._And then it did._ My 11-year-old daughter went to the guidance counselor, after a death in our family, for help processing that loss.In a meeting that was supposed to help my daughter manage her grief, her guidance counselor convinced her to begin identifying as a boy at school.She went into that office as my daughter and left with a boy’s name asking to be called a “he.” It took just minutes.All of this was done without my knowledge – and even worse, the school told her to hide all of this from me. [**So, I’m suing Chico Unified School District with the help of the Center for American Liberty – not for damages, or for emotional distress, but to put an end to its “Parental Secrecy Policy” that directs teachers and staff to hide a child’s “social transition” from parents.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3rtcab3tuahs2cesec7vj38ogkjl3lghg8am3vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjieeor6c5h2bs) Because when we win this lawsuit, we’ll set a precedent nationwide.My daughter might have wanted to tell me about her “new identity” right away – because I’m her mother, she trusts me, and she knows I love her unconditionally.**_But her guidance counselor discouraged her from talking to me about it._** She encouraged her to “come out” to her teachers, her peers – everyone but me.It was two months after the initial meeting by the time I found out what was going on, and it wasn’t because the school notified me or because my daughter told me.It was because my daughter told my mother who then told me.And thankfully we were able to put an end to this.My daughter is doing well. She goes by the name I gave her, and knows she is a girl.But I know we were the lucky ones.I know that if the school had its way, my daughter might be on medications and thinking about dangerous surgeries, changing her body forever, putting her own health at risk. And in my state, they could’ve done all of it behind my back.But I’m not moving; I’m fighting back!Because the truth is, what starts in California never stays here.But I don’t stand a chance without you. [**Will you make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my lawsuit today, and take a stand for American children and parental rights?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z17q6qavus65qj2hj6331t40af4cbdq0b99307fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjieeor6c5h2bs) We’re up against an evil unlike anything I’ve seen in my life – and it grows more powerful by the day. But the truth is on our side.When patriotic Americans come together, it doesn’t matter who stands against us.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | Aurora Regino
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ss5h29lsg777r927h002bvjtpdpaeklu8hgfsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjieeor6c5h2bs)
---

Listen, I could talk for ages about why Democrats are facing such tough odds in 2024, about how worried I am seeing the surge in GOP turnout here in New York and about why we cannot, under any circumstances, allow Mitch McConnell to take power. But truthfully, I know that you know all that already.

But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: My bet with Al Franken
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
I made a bet with Al Franken - that Donald Trump will win back the White House in 2024.... | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61642847:sfkJaHDsN:m:1:877327319:B104EF47A2C8208BC8A5B27256B311FC:r)
---

Fellow American,

Former Democrat Senator Al Franken and I don't have a lot in common. When I joined him on The Daily Show, I didn't think we'd be able to find ANY common ground.

But we did place a wager - one I intend to WIN, with your help.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61642847:sfkJaHDsN:m:1:877327319:B104EF47A2C8208BC8A5B27256B311FC:r)
**I just bet Al Franken that President Trump would be president again in 2024.**

While in office, President Trump did a good job on the things that are important to America, and we need to return conservative leadership like his not only in the White House, but also in the Senate.

Fellow American- here's how you can help Secure the Senate.

[**Will you match my $20 bet with a $20 contribution to help Secure the Senate majority so Republicans hold both chambers of Congress when we take back the White House?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61642847:sfkJaHDsN:m:1:877327319:B104EF47A2C8208BC8A5B27256B311FC:r)

We have a lot of work to do to unravel the Biden Administration's countless errors when he leaves office after next year's election. It will be almost impossible to fix their mess if we don't have Republican control of the Senate. Securing the Senate is the key to restoring our nation and protecting it from the radical Left.

[**Please take 30 seconds and MATCH my bet by chipping in $20 or more to Secure the Senate!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61642847:sfkJaHDsN:m:1:877327319:B104EF47A2C8208BC8A5B27256B311FC:r)

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61642847:sfkJaHDsN:m:1:877327319:B104EF47A2C8208BC8A5B27256B311FC:r)
Lindsey Graham

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Are Guns Or Pronouns THE Problem?
body:
Tragedy In Nashville Another school shooting has taken place in our country. A private Christian school in Nashville, TN was targeted. Christians a
| | |
---
## Tragedy In Nashville
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19692291.11338.1.28c6a3cff456b1ce2857cc8cbb67bcc4)
---
_Another_ school shooting has taken place in our country.
A **private Christian school** in Nashville, TN was targeted.
Christians are **BY FAR** the most persecuted group in America but the Fake News is not using this tragedy to show that reality but instead to push a political agenda of _banning guns_.
Here is something interesting:
-**Colorado Springs shooter** = non-binary
-**Denver shooter** = transgender
-**Aberdeen shooter** = transgender
-**Nashville shooter** = transgender
It is safe to conclude that guns are not the problem, but pronouns are...
**Transgenderism is a mental illness** that is being celebrated instead of treated in our nation.
The results are in and it is not good.
I want to challenge you to pray for Nashville and pray for the next generation of Americans who are being bombarded with gender confusion which is resulting in destruction.
There is still power in prayer and the next generation needs each of us praying for them.
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

I want to send an update on how last week went since I requested prayer from you. **Thank you for praying!** On Monday, we held our [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19692291.11347.1.3f8894fd1509116fa6bcb50227de2c3a) prayer call with **President Donald Trump** , **General Michael Flynn** , **Roger Stone** and other guests as well as over 115,000 people joining LIVE. You can watch here: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19692291.11348.1.be2e5931f1a4c7143c96cf6c1b997b60) We are in the process of planning our next [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19692291.11349.1.926b71f6db6738a9698db5dec4cde6d0) LIVE prayer call. Be sure to register at [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19692291.11350.1.8155477db4c9cfeb9e9ab84c3a955d46) On Saturday, [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19692291.11351.1.d4287304f3ff7002c9c202301890b90a) launched its' **Oklahoma City Campus**! It was a _tremendous_ start. Every chair in the building was full and we even had to bring out the office chairs for people to sit in. More importantly, God showed up and **lives were changed**! Finally, I preached a sermon on Sunday at [Sheridan](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19692291.11352.1.1eca53a1388a999d12efe2b1ae4c4e2a) Tulsa for our 9 & 11am service that I believe will bless you. Watch: [Genesis Pt. 50 - Undeserved](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19692291.11353.1.07f0f387e03aa5ed8a950551b160e0cb) The week went GREAT! Thank you for praying.
---

name: Young Kim (R-CA)
subject: Our Supreme Court is in major trouble.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488999:6qK3jtGNR:m:1:3365131770:E0281497D92BE926C431F767DD780F4B:r)
---

---
Peter, it's Congresswoman Young Kim, and it's essential that you read this.

_Our Supreme Court is in major trouble._

Ever since Conservative-appointed Justices became the majority in the Supreme Court, we've seen Democrats pull out every trick in the book to turn our justice system upside down:
>> Introducing bills to pack the Courts with liberal Justices
>> Labeling a Conservative Justice's appointment as illegitimate
>> Attempting to Codify laws in the House that are found Unconstitutional by the Supreme Court
And now... thousands of Democrats are signing petitions to take down our Conservative Justices one by one. **We are LOSING to the Left!**
---

| | [PROTECT OUR SUPREME COURT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488999:6qK3jtGNR:m:1:3365131770:E0281497D92BE926C431F767DD780F4B:r "DEFEND YOUNG’S SEAT")
---

That is why it is **ABSOLUTELY IMPERATIVE** that Conservatives launch a counter-response. **[That's why I'm launching my own petition and asking YOU to join me in supporting our Conservative Supreme Court Justices. Will you join me and sign?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488999:6qK3jtGNR:m:1:3365131770:E0281497D92BE926C431F767DD780F4B:r "That’s why
I’m launching my own petition and asking YOU to join me in supporting our Conservative Supreme Court Justices. Will you join me and
sign?")**
---

| | [PROTECT OUR CONSERVATIVE JUSTICES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488999:6qK3jtGNR:m:1:3365131770:E0281497D92BE926C431F767DD780F4B:r "DEFEND YOUNG’S SEAT")
---

While Democrats controlled the House, the Senate, and the White House, our Supreme Court was our last line of defense of the Constitution. And as long as the Left still maintains its tight grip on the White House and the Senate, we must thwart any of the Left's unconstitutional efforts to turn the Supreme Court inside out.

**[On behalf of the House Republican majority, I'm humbly pleading with you to sign this petition today >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488999:6qK3jtGNR:m:1:3365131770:E0281497D92BE926C431F767DD780F4B:r "On behalf of the House Republican majority, I’m humbly pleading with you to sign this
petition today >>")**
---

| | [PROTECT OUR CONSERVATIVE JUSTICES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488999:6qK3jtGNR:m:1:3365131770:E0281497D92BE926C431F767DD780F4B:r "DEFEND YOUNG’S SEAT")
---

Thank you,
Congresswoman Young Kim

---
* * *
---
_We 'll get straight to the point:

We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats.

YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she's able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations. **[So, we're humbly asking for a donation to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488999:6qK3jtGNR:m:1:3365131770:E0281497D92BE926C431F767DD780F4B:r "So,
we’re humbly asking for $3, $5, $10, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you.")**_
---

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My husband is facing 10 years in prison for defending himself
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fe46dbbb3b54d8d972b695a9d24b0f8&_e=PH5uwgfMX9D_yFp3ldm3N4wcrROVFm73__aqL0N7cTt8kfxJYXlkIr3plexLOp5mrI-eEwpB4iRKPOeAuz6hXHE2C-WYfp6WENQj_omz79taFn9gvcIDLDtxKIUSTEXYLrlJb5cL6EjjNHCAtvxWUz4Cl5EgJKMkMypmJlWFipWJHb-B6lzVCe4tDkYSCTam3xLpKsnjahcfWy7xmKQt966vKeF1DDJgt3ZUqVJ9S7c0ykxTG3MKiHrskX8-E8410qt514wiWNyNryv68VykSIOlp9vAtZPKjF5Jg_01wxs8Umnf-cXN_N6TUfEa4yQYjvKUmsZpEyOVwgHOVX-dtbGcQlLz7-7WZVKpB4x-GHg%3D)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fe46dbbb3b54d8d972b695a9d24b0f8&_e=PH5uwgfMX9D_yFp3ldm3N4wcrROVFm73__aqL0N7cTt8kfxJYXlkIr3plexLOp5mrI-eEwpB4iRKPOeAuz6hXHE2C-WYfp6WENQj_omz79taFn9gvcIDLDtxKIUSTEXYLrlJb5cL6EjjNHCAtvxWUz4Cl5EgJKMkMypmJlWFipWJHb-B6lzVCe4tDkYSCTamUBbRFDYRgT18snCD31lUIP-WLYeUJSh64Dq49zRp-EdDi9mwSYHK-cE9S1YYIJEwTkFU8ZjgOwwZMgeodvQ4QQapkC2ZcW-AdMzef4BMfoYOTd0lIIv0ykluPgDa4OzOvvsLV5671QWew_a4w9FMYlECBzPUWblAfQaAxJk19Go%3D)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fe46dbbb3b54d8d972b695a9d24b0f8&_e=PH5uwgfMX9D_yFp3ldm3N4wcrROVFm73__aqL0N7cTt8kfxJYXlkIr3plexLOp5mrI-eEwpB4iRKPOeAuz6hXHE2C-WYfp6WENQj_omz79taFn9gvcIDLDtxKIUSTEXYLrlJb5cL6EjjNHCAtvxWUz4Cl5EgJKMkMypmJlWFipWJHb-B6lzVCe4tDkYSCTamnkApFDI8FqW_1nSQHcRww88lDoXhw_VS7ggCrkCZikHOtwKldHC5RA3ADx8EgHKXLHhaZ-stFlWQR9ZDpDP3BiU2g5jA-8hsKYjwF94XkyvB09o3xJ_IxE-6TghTZU9OG0caDhjFztBb4IFXUkSJSLFWkAuRT2R_qXtgj4g6whc%3D)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fe46dbbb3b54d8d972b695a9d24b0f8&_e=PH5uwgfMX9D_yFp3ldm3N4wcrROVFm73__aqL0N7cTt8kfxJYXlkIr3plexLOp5mrI-eEwpB4iRKPOeAuz6hXHE2C-WYfp6WENQj_omz79taFn9gvcIDLDtxKIUSTEXYLrlJb5cL6EjjNHCAtvxWUz4Cl5EgJKMkMypmJlWFipWJHb-B6lzVCe4tDkYSCTam-ViHPaIa2EqmPUY5-a7wwdZ1Efv02CpppgOJVYWM79sUYHJz5tUcnA0vswWbdgBIMmdb9z20Cg6reKAspYFqOvLhx6Q2laXemWmHAFFWyZ0PxEyVPla7BYo2r1Rh41bxXw0RbiMH6dB0FSuZR_amJfFmfv2LNT8wRFGScVdwhVs%3D)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fe46dbbb3b54d8d972b695a9d24b0f8&_e=PH5uwgfMX9D_yFp3ldm3N4wcrROVFm73__aqL0N7cTt8kfxJYXlkIr3plexLOp5mrI-eEwpB4iRKPOeAuz6hXHE2C-WYfp6WENQj_omz79taFn9gvcIDLDtxKIUSTEXYLrlJb5cL6EjjNHCAtvxWUz4Cl5EgJKMkMypmJlWFipWJHb-B6lzVCe4tDkYSCTam1voQahBnBXweURpm6cBPB3CcKMdvSrjBeERV4o5ALLF0FymTR2KtAtkk7WZGw3bmhOvKwsQdJVU2fvplElSp3ugf0SsV7ZEg2CmNXtNb9iSEuP_33oal6kgCPTs3GhWXp7zdnVuHT-uSqwn8olE1Eqg-uOj3mjZbHAykzGLRBqo%3D)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fe46dbbb3b54d8d972b695a9d24b0f8&_e=PH5uwgfMX9D_yFp3ldm3N4wcrROVFm73__aqL0N7cTt8kfxJYXlkIr3plexLOp5mrI-eEwpB4iRKPOeAuz6hXHE2C-WYfp6WENQj_omz79taFn9gvcIDLDtxKIUSTEXYLrlJb5cL6EjjNHCAtvxWUz4Cl5EgJKMkMypmJlWFipWJHb-B6lzVCe4tDkYSCTamwbFA0-KFKtQJUNOLteCkv3QfxgIhoSPyr0Jy88yPy6-r1UCtvMW1Qr8F8ndQY0YM2td_2Ubils2OzDYUtq_3mZch7Q7fqkIRaN6Bxw6W92Zs7Sbx9Hon3g88k3ilQAgxf09SBAh-8nvsMoi-HGLxQeIXkzdwIJOnpwB1b9IOM7s%3D) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Freedom Nation Today

name: Team Vance
subject: Our final deadline of the month is coming up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
we need you

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bc4a81b0e63a45ce9df255865d2e8cd0&_e=Xw5CszRj1p8a2RhDOW7hLF_VpqNV7OWGvHvgGOSjT4m38EmJCXXIWWk6ORFicADPN2DSBkdltMMQtXO5ZaNdV4cvPJg6FktnocS_2Cjh1kgS4DOSuDlSvk-Iy7E1x4fZz_O0ntoU7JZdHnuP5nzSVM89-SJn-M7C3nhZEGVL64VrqbSxLAO5iYHzOHBgMxb0S3Q3K71_24oqOizp7MKlQoY7wU0MFcMwACsjrSsQ5Zfvg9lDxo93UxPLZYu_5rCkVwXRtHCdkdG9toqcxDb9FYwezriVqAD9Jk2vs7uSTO7J1uF-O2ksZlcf52-ccZ_i4hUfIMetgimQmtrs2-n7hhfLGW9zKxaSDO1p7cPTjkxkZRdpcxPqb8EQrrl7SksXaQsAm9nZa7wzEj3DsZ5zeM3pEDuJxyrOxLRHMPbcmmZCcnAByyg0OAWqftUl11X7kU-4UsmIqEMeG7KN0zV5DkAGiWohaxXonKvrgxb3F9qdgSmNQYZpChWC5rxa5_iu1KhGqY0fWDZEEb3MBvaz0DoBZ3Fn-M8M7mnIeEuVYLsX9UdC4kNxQ3ZCjT7wFN0AisE0Cymy-taOLISq734qADyzJSQsbjYxlVF-WNiqs6Molh6-aoV66a2l1B9VhxCWqiXrb20Wsqq0n4dAq7hNoA%3D%3D)
---
**So, this is it.**

Our last deadline of the month is almost here, and we're reaching out to you because honestly, we need the help.

_** Our projections were a little off this month, and now we're trying to make up ground by reaching out to our top twenty conservative donors. That includes you, friend. **_

As the nation's largest organization dedicated to defending the Second Amendment rights of EVERY American citizen, **we rely heavily on the input of law-abiding firearm owners like YOU.**

Peter, can you step up and help the NRA form a winning strategy to protect YOUR rights?

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: This school shooting in Tennessee is haunting. Will we finally all get it together to do something about gun safety?
body:
Haunting
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2d5f05b-ed55-4494-8ca3-a2b26348868c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **It's almost too painful to write another harangue on the sick, right-wing Republican obsession with guns and campaign checks from the gun industry. Honestly, and pardon my language, I don't give a s*t about their weird firearms fetish.** _I care that three adults and THREE CHILDREN were just murdered at the Covenant School in Nashville because of it. The image below is...haunting._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T48be61ff-b6b2-4760-9e12-9086af171f59/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_This tragedy comes on the heels of a Journal of the American Medical Association (JAMA) article showing Americans die two years younger than residents of similar democracies because of the prevalence of guns in our society._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2c303343-0283-497f-a051-6ff1736e3fb7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _1% of elected DC Democrats have opposed gun laws. With Republicans that number is 97%. Yep, 97% of GOPers vote to allow our kids to die regularly for their creepy worship of firearms and greedy worship of their NRA checks. _**_Sorry, but the safety of my kids is more important than Ted Cruz' political fundraising. Same with yours. But fighting back is expensive._** [**_Will you split a donation of $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can, to Everytown for Gun Violence and Blue Amp Action, so we can keep fighting to change our gun laws and end this sick insanity._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9e596a6-fe24-42eb-9c82-8164a1e2b79c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your empathy and common sense, Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc47b99e-01df-4f04-8f24-ce6337349acb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Alek Skarlatos, Freedom Foundation
subject: Unions profited from the pandemic. Here’s how.
body:
| | | [](http://trk.skarlatosmail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U0tSMzY4OTIifQ/E8tVsLGyR0WiGIrkyAWnXw)
---
Peter, While small business owners were struggling to keep their doors open in 2020, labor unions were busy profiting from the pandemic. Yes -- that’s right, your tax dollars went into the hands of union bosses to the tune of MILLIONS. **_Freedom Foundation has exposed hundreds of unions around the country that submitted fraudulent applications and robbed American taxpayers of $36 million in Paycheck Protection Program loans._** I want to ensure that as many freedom-loving Americans as possible know the truth about these labor unions — truths that the liberal media and Big Tech want to keep under wraps! [**That’s why I’m sharing our labor union exposé — _Profiting from a Pandemic: How Ineligible Unions Collected Millions in Federal COVID Relief Funds_ — with you for FREE. Click here to download the report and see the details about this massive union fraud. **](http://trk.skarlatosmail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U0tSMzY4OTIifQ/VATGGnuq62moaUFCgxUSSQ)
---
[ Labor Unions Exposed: Profiting from a Pandemic](http://trk.skarlatosmail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U0tSMzY4OTIifQ/ujzVHipUkXL6kP7tYngu8w)
---
As you probably remember, at the height of the pandemic, Congress created the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) for small businesses and nonprofit organizations to cover payroll, rent, and utility payments to ensure they could pay their employees while being forced to close their doors. But labor unions — including teachers’ unions — saw PPP as a cash cow, despite being ineligible to apply for the loans. **_For decades, corrupt union bosses have ripped off workers with mandatory “dues,” while rigging the system in their favor, so it should come as no surprise that hundreds of unions had no problem committing mass fraud against the federal government._** At the end of the day, all the union bosses care about is lining their deep pockets to prop up the left’s progressive machinery and push a radical, unconstitutional agenda. [**At Freedom Foundation, we’re working to expose the truth about labor unions and the fraud they’ve committed. You can read more about this $36 million in fraud by clicking here.**](http://trk.skarlatosmail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U0tSMzY4OTIifQ/YRVWZe_s23-1X3Z6dwIrvQ) At least a dozen teachers’ unions and advocacy groups received PPP loans... _FRAUDULENTLY_! We uncovered HUNDREDS of loans in our analysis, and the largest — by far — was a $6.4 million loan provided to the Michigan Education Association. Not only were labor unions INELIGIBLE for these funds, but they had little need for them! The federal government allocated nearly **_$200 BILLION_** to public schools during the pandemic. These billions of dollars included money to pay union dues! [**When you read this exposé about the labor unions, PPP, and the $36 million in illegal loans — you’ll be SHOCKED by the level of fraud committed on such a grand scale.**](http://trk.skarlatosmail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U0tSMzY4OTIifQ/gfZzAWQoS6pQpiolGKJ4Bg) Here at Freedom Foundation, our mission is to show liberty-loving Americans the truth about labor unions and how they’ve become such an insidious influence in our nation. If we’re going to bring about a new era of American prosperity, we must expose unions for what they are — the root cause of every growing national dysfunction within our borders. [**I hope you’ll download this free report — _Profiting from a Pandemic_ — to learn more about the level of deceit and fraud within labor unions across the country.**](http://trk.skarlatosmail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U0tSMzY4OTIifQ/ksyFH1Kw_sqFvf4FYYZZBw)
---
[ Labor Unions Exposed: Profiting from a Pandemic](http://trk.skarlatosmail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U0tSMzY4OTIifQ/TaGwsZaARKuNekqZmlWzgw)
---
In freedom, Alek Skarlatos Freedom Foundation
---

---

Olympia WA, 98507

name: Jim DeMint
subject: Glowing Politico Profile
body:
Fellow Patriot:

It's not every day that a Beltway insider publication writes a 1,100-word profile about how effective a conservative organization is. But that's just what Politico did recently!
That's how successful CPI has become over the last few years. Even liberals are in awe.
The headline ran, "Inside the Trump world-organized retreat to plot out Biden oversight."
The subject of the article was our two-day training boot camp for congressional staffers tasked with investigating the Biden Administration. The retreat was part of CPI's ongoing mission of teaching young conservatives how to win in a city and a system rigged against them.
"Topics discussed at the boot camp included tutorials on obtaining records and deposing and interviewing witnesses," Politico reported... accurately!
That's exactly what we covered at Camp Rydin, our new conference center in nearby Maryland, and much more.
Please help train the next generation of conservative leaders by supporting CPI today!
The article quoted a congressional watchdog group: "I'm not aware of any other group that has held trainings so consistently and for such a wide range of staffers."
Yep: that's the point!
A Republican establishment lawyer was concerned about CPI inviting conservative staffers to a conference and "coaching them on how to get more aggressive."
A left-wing activist said this: "CPI says they're in D.C. to drain the swamp, but from here it looks more like a hostile takeover."
We couldn't put it better ourselves!
Non-partisan, establishment, and liberal observers all agree that CPI is reshaping the conservative movement and turning it into the lean, mean fighting machine it needs to be to defeat the Left.
Please partner with us by supporting CPI with a tax-deductible gift today!
Politico may have intended to write a hit piece or exposé. But instead, they wrote a 22-paragraph advertisement for CPI - free of charge! As long as the media is accusing us of fighting Washington, frustrating the GOP Establishment, and infuriating the woke, socialist
Left, we know we're doing a good job.
With your help, we'll keep up the fight - and the next profile they write will be even longer!
Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Jim DeMintCPI Chairman

 

 

 

300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003(202) 742-8988 Tel | (202) 595-0282 FaxCPI.org

Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: NEW Explosive Revelations on Biden Corruption
body:
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62490510:Jl-bTtGeN:m:1:3391001263:F550E97BC6D7B6308821E8002E68250A:r)
---
Fellow Patriot, I have breaking news to share with you... My team at America First Legal just released our second batch of **Biden Documents** that the federal government attempted to keep hidden until we forced their release with our aggressive litigation and investigatory tactics. [**_Support us now to help expose Biden corruption_ >>>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62490510:Jl-bTtGeN:m:1:3391001263:F550E97BC6D7B6308821E8002E68250A:r) This **second trove of shocking documents** confirms there was effectively no daylight between Joe Biden and Hunter Biden regarding the Biden family's business dealings in Ukraine. But there is more. **These never-before-seen records and emails contain more explosive revelations** , _including:_ **#1 -** Then Vice President Biden personally signed off on the statement given in response to reporters about whether Hunter's appointment to **Burisma** undermines the Vice President's credibility in pushing anti-corruption measures in the Ukraine; **#2 -** The Office of the Vice President connected reporters writing about Hunter's appointment to**Burisma** to Amos Hochstein, a trusted Biden advisor who was then the "point person" for International Energy Affairs at the U.S. Department of State, to provide a "unique and valuable perspective" on the relationships in Ukraine; **#3 -** The Office of the Vice President coordinated closely with Hunter Biden's notorious firm **Rosemont Seneca Advisors** (the firm has been prominently involved in Hunter Biden's various international business dealings, which Joe Biden has claimed to know nothing about) in response to press inquiries; **#4 -** U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine, Marie L. Yovanovitch, reported _- to the Department of State's Victoria Nuland, Anna Makanju in Vice President Biden's Office, and the National Security Counsel's Eric Ciaramella-_**that "this time there are accusations that Burisma allegedly had a subsidiary dump natural gas as a way to pay bribes" and "mentions that Hunter Biden and former Polish President Kwasniewski are on the Burisma board."** Taken together with the Oversight Committee's revelations about the Biden Family finances, **it is now _indisputable_ that there is a need for a full criminal investigation** into the Bidens' foreign influence peddling and exotic foreign financial payoffs. We now have the evidence in plain sight. _This can be ignored no longer!_
| [**HELP EXPOSE BIDEN >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62490510:Jl-bTtGeN:m:1:3391001263:F550E97BC6D7B6308821E8002E68250A:r)
---
This is yet another example of how our hard work at America First Legal is paying off and getting results for _YOU_ , the American People. [**Please make a generous and urgently needed donation now to help my team continue the fight and expose Biden 's corruption in a court of law. ****_Please help us continue the investigation right now >> _****_ _**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62490510:Jl-bTtGeN:m:1:3391001263:F550E97BC6D7B6308821E8002E68250A:r) _With deep gratitude for your continuously brave support,_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal
|
---
Note: This hard evidence which shows the intertwinement of Hunter Biden's foreign dealings with then Vice President Joe Biden, _including proof that people inside Biden's Vice Presidential Office knew about and were worried about Biden's Burisma_ _dealings_ would not have been discovered without our lawsuits.**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA March 28: Investigate Partisan Prosecutors!
body:
| | |
---
This week, use our Align Act campaigns to urge Congress to support Jim Jordan and his defense of President Trump, put an end to Joe Biden’s bailouts, and protect gas stoves from a nationwide ban!
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-R4BMttIyZniFg)
---
New York District Attorney Alvin Bragg has been activated by the Left to ARREST President Trump and stop him from beating Joe Biden in 2024! Thankfully, Justice has a White Knight in Jim Jordan, Chairman of the House Judiciary Committee. He’s standing up to partisan prosecutors and protecting our elections from interference. Contact your Members of Congress and ask them to **[support Jim Jordan and his mission](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-EmzNw) to STOP political prosecutions.**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | Joe Biden quietly issued orders to the Federal Reserve that it should prepare to implement and manage a central bank digital currency that would be pegged to the value of the U.S. dollar. Experts[ warn](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2Mzc5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/yU8MSTIVWnCPVI-J6HzWFw) that a digital currency would create opportunities for government surveillance and violate citizens' privacy. Leftwing government officials are already weaponizing banks to restrict gun sales and block investment capital from going to American energy producers. A digital currency would give governments far greater power over Americans' money and[ personal liberties](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-dA), and would almost certainly be used to target conservatives, Christians and those who are pro-life. Last year, Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau invoked emergency powers that, without any court orders, allowed him to[ freeze the bank accounts of anyone](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwODctNWNiMGIzMjMwNjcwNGQ5ZTliZWNkNjE4YTY5OTZkOTUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LmJiYy5jb20vbmV3cy93b3JsZC11cy1jYW5hZGEtNjAzODMzODU_bWlkPTQ2Mzc5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/XQWS7qORiRcoayzhwZqQDA) involved with anti-vaccine-mandate protests. In Florida, however, Gov. Ron DeSantis is pushing back, last week urging legislation that would ban the recognition of central bank digital currencies as money under Florida's Uniform Commercial Code. "The Biden administration's efforts to inject a Centralized Bank Digital Currency is about surveillance and control," DeSantis[ said](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.). "Florida will not side with economic central planners; we will not adopt policies that threaten personal economic freedom and security." Republican South Dakota Gov. Kristi Noem recently vetoed legislation that would have classified a potential central bank digital currency as money in her state's Uniform Commercial Code.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwODctNWNiMGIzMjMwNjcwNGQ5ZTliZWNkNjE4YTY5OTZkOTUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL25vLW1vcmUtYmFpbG91dHM_bWlkPTQ2Mzc5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/Z50Snh8FvAAzIy1uW-ajFQ)
---
Joe “Bailout” Biden is rewarding Leftist bankers who prioritized a woke agenda over responsible financial management. Donating to leftist political campaigns shouldn’t buy you a bailout from the American people! Contact your Members of Congress to [**put a stop to Joe Biden’s bailouts!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwODctNWNiMGIzMjMwNjcwNGQ5ZTliZWNkNjE4YTY5OTZkOTUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiOCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL25vLW1vcmUtYmFpbG91dHM_bWlkPTQ2Mzc5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/lqkJJcxb3JXvE8pCP9u8hQ)
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwODctNWNiMGIzMjMwNjcwNGQ5ZTliZWNkNjE4YTY5OTZkOTUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiOSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL25vLW1vcmUtYmFpbG91dHM_bWlkPTQ2Mzc5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/xQJ9xQTkV7JnEc0vt8ESlQ)
---
|
---
| | Two House Energy and Commerce Committee Republicans announced on March 20 that [they are introducing legislation](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) in response to the Biden administration's two-pronged push to ban gas stoves. Rep. Kelly Armstrong (R-N.D.) introduced [H.R. 1615](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._7_U549OBfQ), the Gas Stove Protection and Freedom Act, while Debbie Lesko, (R-Ariz.) introduced [H.R. 1640](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._3Jso0m-BYg), known as the Save Our Gas Stoves Act. While both bills are currently in committee, they could go to the House floor for a vote later this year. The pieces of legislation would prohibit the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) from using federal funding to implement any regulation that would classify gas stoves as a prohibited dangerous product under current law. The bills also prohibit the CPSC from enforcing any consumer product safety standards that would prohibit the use of gas stoves or impose regulations that would raise gas stove prices. Democrats and far-left green groups have also advocated for forced electrification of[ other household appliances](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-ahmuiMl1181AhQ_Q7FUA), including water heaters, furnaces, clothes washers, dishwashers, ceiling fans, microwave ovens and shower heads. But perhaps because the Biden administration has been under pressure for its plot to ban the gas stove, it has not moved forward with such plans. Biden's CPSC is continuing to receive comments from citizens like you.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwODctNWNiMGIzMjMwNjcwNGQ5ZTliZWNkNjE4YTY5OTZkOTUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50aGVwYXRyaW90Y2VudGVyLm9yZy9oYW5kcy1vZmYtb3VyLXN0b3Zlcy8_bWlkPTQ2Mzc5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/jOX8cATFEUWaXvD1rvwHTw)
---
As Joe Biden’s sticks to his guns to shoot out gas stoves, thousands of patriots have submitted comments to the Consumer Product Safety Commission. We are SO close to securing our kitchens against government overreach. Please **use the Tea Party Patriots activism tool to**[**submit a ready-made comment**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwODctNWNiMGIzMjMwNjcwNGQ5ZTliZWNkNjE4YTY5OTZkOTUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTUiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50aGVwYXRyaW90Y2VudGVyLm9yZy9oYW5kcy1vZmYtb3VyLXN0b3Zlcy8_bWlkPTQ2Mzc5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/HYyuFxtVyI6XHEooihd4gQ)**, or send your own message in support of gas stoves!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwODctNWNiMGIzMjMwNjcwNGQ5ZTliZWNkNjE4YTY5OTZkOTUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50aGVwYXRyaW90Y2VudGVyLm9yZy9oYW5kcy1vZmYtb3VyLXN0b3Zlcy8_bWlkPTQ2Mzc5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/1F0ZFRCLQ_vKAotLSwH3Kw)
---
|
---
| | Chinese nationals are flocking to the southern border in record numbers under Biden's watch, according to U.S. Customs and Border Protection. Just so far this fiscal year, border agents have stopped nearly[ 5,000 Chinese illegal immigrants](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) from crossing into the United States. This time last year, the agents only encountered 421 nationals from the Communist regime. The Rio Grande Valley Sector, one of the most active sectors of the southern border, has seen a more than[ 900% increase](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-gdzmChENkUbU5kZA) in Chinese nationals in the past year. One man reports that he paid $11,000 to be smuggled into Texas from Ecuador, where Chinese citizens are not required to have travel visas. As total U.S.-Mexico border encounters surpass one million since October 2022, border agents are simultaneously noticing an[ uptick in apprehensions](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2Mzc5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/n01-eSUsi-ihwNZA0Istog) of illegal immigrants on their terrorist watchlist, an increase set to surpass a previous record of 98 terrorist apprehensions last fiscal year.

name: Aurora Regino
subject: We’re suing the school district and we need your help
body:
I never thought it would be me.

| |
---
| | My Fellow concerned American, I never thought it would be me. I'd seen the news headlines and the crazy videos of activist teachers talking about how they indoctrinated students with ideas about sexuality and gender, against parents' wishes and behind their backs... But I never thought in a million years it would happen to my family. _And then it did._ My 11-year-old daughter went to the guidance counselor, after a death in our family, for help processing that loss. In a meeting that was supposed to help my daughter manage her grief, her guidance counselor convinced her to begin identifying as a boy at school. She went into that office as my daughter and left with a boy's name asking to be called a "he." It took just minutes. All of this was done without my knowledge - and even worse, the school told her to hide all of this from me. [**So, I 'm suing Chico Unified School District with the help of the Center for American Liberty - not for damages, or for emotional distress, but to put an end to its "Parental Secrecy Policy" that directs teachers and staff to hide a child's "social transition" from parents.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=288c3c051c2b49329b3e60bedf96492b&_e=V_g3--stkvDISIuwlWcglzA2CXCUvjUhfyjxTIHoBsd0ZBQvtMVXBeZ-VR_DY7yMlv9FynXgiWSl1Z3n18zDTd6-R8gbK84gqsC3c-WDXcA-zjJ1vXNiyk9p20l-kUU0vIuWc6p8XMcg6iH3Z5uyZU19bUTQ59J5VhDPY7qq1gqVu_cMhRT1cCTPoRFSoUnF1gwWDtGOEVpXSPlOG6NkJ8fHBu0tJmSN68lCpTvz8QPdeA0Z_XpeZFj1vjfY6KCiWlP2fFiTOA-kNrSHI7mLfITlOtoaG1o1eQR3c-LR5SSkK7tzizYWGiGZqGfEFw_H_h0GM09ZoVaXsLua_-UUh3FAVZD0M9MNmg6znA5nkbysg7mvHfoGgezNS4mjDnL7) Because when we win this lawsuit, we'll set a precedent nationwide. My daughter might have wanted to tell me about her "new identity" right away - because I'm her mother, she trusts me, and she knows I love her unconditionally. **_But her guidance counselor discouraged her from talking to me about it._** She encouraged her to "come out" to her teachers, her peers - everyone but me. It was two months after the initial meeting by the time I found out what was going on, and it wasn't because the school notified me or because my daughter told me. It was because my daughter told my mother who then told me. And thankfully we were able to put an end to this. My daughter is doing well. She goes by the name I gave her, and knows she is a girl. But I know we were the lucky ones. I know that if the school had its way, my daughter might be on medications and thinking about dangerous surgeries, changing her body forever, putting her own health at risk. And in my state, they could've done all of it behind my back. But I'm not moving; I'm fighting back! Because the truth is, what starts in California never stays here. But I don't stand a chance without you. [**Will you make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my lawsuit today, and take a stand for American children and parental rights?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=288c3c051c2b49329b3e60bedf96492b&_e=V_g3--stkvDISIuwlWcglzA2CXCUvjUhfyjxTIHoBsd0ZBQvtMVXBeZ-VR_DY7yMlv9FynXgiWSl1Z3n18zDTd6-R8gbK84gqsC3c-WDXcA-zjJ1vXNiyk9p20l-kUU0vIuWc6p8XMcg6iH3Z5uyZU19bUTQ59J5VhDPY7qq1gqVu_cMhRT1cCTPoRFSoUnF1gwWDtGOEVpXSPlOG6NkJ8fHBu0tJmSN68lCpTvz8QNxTOPIlER1Pa25cavdAEBea-uRM4CW5HQz8_284Qo0qK-sf4EZJ1d2NiioVoF82XrgQv1vYOFitxpCNumWCbc39IwtzbZQy7hTuFQU8GFA9amVRviYi8VNwkTILAsnj1sAIQ69mQohS_OPWNynPext) We're up against an evil unlike anything I've seen in my life - and it grows more powerful by the day. But the truth is on our side. When patriotic Americans come together, it doesn't matter who stands against us.
---

clean_body: I never thought it would be me. | | | | My Fellow concerned American, I never thought it would be me. I'd seen the news headlines and the crazy videos of activist teachers talking about how they indoctrinated students with ideas about sexuality and gender, against parents' wishes and behind their backs... But I never thought in a million years it would happen to my family. And then it did. My 11-year-old daughter went to the guidance counselor, after a death in our family, for help processing that loss. In a meeting that was supposed to help my daughter manage her grief, her guidance counselor convinced her to begin identifying as a boy at school. She went into that office as my daughter and left with a boy's name asking to be called a "he." It took just minutes. All of this was done without my knowledge - and even worse, the school told her to hide all of this from me. Because when we win this lawsuit, we'll set a precedent nationwide. My daughter might have wanted to tell me about her "new identity" right away - because I'm her mother, she trusts me, and she knows I love her unconditionally. But her guidance counselor discouraged her from talking to me about it. She encouraged her to "come out" to her teachers, her peers - everyone but me. It was two months after the initial meeting by the time I found out what was going on, and it wasn't because the school notified me or because my daughter told me. It was because my daughter told my mother who then told me. And thankfully we were able to put an end to this. My daughter is doing well. She goes by the name I gave her, and knows she is a girl. But I know we were the lucky ones. I know that if the school had its way, my daughter might be on medications and thinking about dangerous surgeries, changing her body forever, putting her own health at risk. And in my state, they could've done all of it behind my back. But I'm not moving; I'm fighting back! Because the truth is, what starts in California never stays here. But I don't stand a chance without you. We're up against an evil unlike anything I've seen in my life - and it grows more powerful by the day. But the truth is on our side. When patriotic Americans come together, it doesn't matter who stands against us. | | Sincerely, | | Aurora Regino | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. body:
I need your help sending a powerful message to the GOP that we won’t stand for their attack on our rights.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60836701/398373609/-1734261590?refcode=EM_FR_230328AbortionProtections_RR_SB_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2RjODVmZi01ZGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nbWtrSJnmSH0d2KMBd7tZr2t7qj-YDcVIB85sdlYTYM=) The GOP is taking a new route to restrict abortion across the country, Peter.

After President Biden and the FDA moved to approve the distribution of safe and legal abortion pills nationwide, **GOP Ohio Attorney General is leading a coalition of anti-choice states to pressure pharmacies against stocking legal abortion medications.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60836702/398373610/-1734261590?refcode=EM_FR_230328AbortionProtections_RR_SB_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2RjODVmZi01ZGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nbWtrSJnmSH0d2KMBd7tZr2t7qj-YDcVIB85sdlYTYM=) One of America’s largest pharmacies, Walgreens, has already folded under the GOP’s pressure and will not distribute abortion pills in states like Ohio, and I’m sure more pharmacies are bound to follow.

The GOP's latest attack on abortion rights could even lead to these safe abortion pills being pulled from stores nationwide if they successfully undermine President Biden in court. I won’t sit idly by while Republicans continue to use their power to advance their assault on abortion rights.

[**_President Biden and my Democratic colleagues are dedicated to protecting abortion access no matter what the GOP throws at us. But, Peter, our best bet at passing federal abortion protections is to remove the anti-choice GOP from power.
