name: Ronny Jackson
subject: I’m sure you’ve gotten a ton of messages about the arrest of President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
| | **I 'm sure you've gotten a ton of messages about the arrest of President Trump, but this one doesn't require your money, your number, or your email.**
---
This isn't one of those emails.
This is Congressman Ronny Jackson.
I was President Trump's White House physician, and now, I'm proudly his strongest ally in the House.
Listen, I'm sure your email has been blowing up with unsolicited messages about Trump's potential arrest.
I'm sure you've gotten messages from random organizations you've never heard of before.
**And I 'm positive you've gotten emails from Swamp Creature "Republicans" who claim to be on Trump's side, but behind closed doors secretly want him to rot away in a prison cell.**
I get these emails too, but this one is different.
As Trump's top ally in the House, I speak with him often - very, very often.
[**So I asked my team to make a page where President Trump 's top supporters can send him their own personal message as he faces the biggest political Witch Hunt in American history.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491006:6C481tGvN:m:1:3361486117:319163BE58EB1B17EF5368E61BBD4E0C:r)
And again, this doesn't require your money, your number, or your email.
| [ **SEND A MESSAGE TO TRUMP** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491006:6C481tGvN:m:1:3361486117:319163BE58EB1B17EF5368E61BBD4E0C:r)
---
But just a fair warning, **responses will be cut off at midnight tonight.**
My team needs time to organize them before President Trump lands in my home state of Texas for his FIRST rally since announcing his candidacy.
So I'm humbly asking:[ **Please send your message to President Trump today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491006:6C481tGvN:m:1:3361486117:319163BE58EB1B17EF5368E61BBD4E0C:r)
I know how much he loves his supporters
Thank you & God Bless,
Ronny Jackson
| [ **SEND A MESSAGE TO TRUMP** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491006:6C481tGvN:m:1:3361486117:319163BE58EB1B17EF5368E61BBD4E0C:r)

subject: Fight or flight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter,

Right now, we're coming up on one of the biggest challenges of our mission, and I wanted to fill you in on where we stand.

In such important moments, we have a choice: we can run away from a challenge or fight through it.

_**I 'm ready to fight, and I know you are too.**_

**Our FIRST FEC end-of-quarter deadline is just days away, and it 's URGENT that we meet our goal. **

With so much on the line next year, we have to meet EVERY DEADLINE until November 2024 if we're going to take back the Senate.

**[I need your help. We CANNOT give up before the fight has already begun. Pitch in NOW so we can meet this CRITICAL deadline for our campaign!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62487795:6aI11tGNV:m:1:3391001263:06927652A1B12E15C61A45423B4E9FBA:r)**
---

[**PITCH IN $25**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62487794:6aI11tGNV:m:1:3391001263:06927652A1B12E15C61A45423B4E9FBA:r)
---
[**PITCH IN $50**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62487793:6aI11tGNV:m:1:3391001263:06927652A1B12E15C61A45423B4E9FBA:r)
---
[**PITCH IN $100**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62487792:6aI11tGNV:m:1:3391001263:06927652A1B12E15C61A45423B4E9FBA:r)
---
[**PITCH IN $250**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62487791:6aI11tGNV:m:1:3391001263:06927652A1B12E15C61A45423B4E9FBA:r)
---
[**PITCH IN OTHER AMOUNT**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62487795:6aI11tGNV:m:1:3391001263:06927652A1B12E15C61A45423B4E9FBA:r)
---
My friend, if we show up short of our goal, we're in for trouble.

The Democrats are eagerly watching our numbers, and the second they sense weakness, they'll unload MILLIONS more to defeat me.

_But if we come through strong, they 'll know that there's no messing with Missouri._

[**I 'm doing everything I can to help us meet this goal, but ultimately, it's up to you. Pitch in NOW so we can meet our FIRST end of quarter goal of 2023!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62487795:6aI11tGNV:m:1:3391001263:06927652A1B12E15C61A45423B4E9FBA:r)

[**PITCH IN NOW**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62487795:6aI11tGNV:m:1:3391001263:06927652A1B12E15C61A45423B4E9FBA:r)

Thank you,

name: Marco Rubio
subject: The Left’s abuse of power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
|
---
| | | I just want to start off by saying - I'm so sorry.

I hate that I have to drop into your inbox like this, but I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you get to the end and still think you can't help save the country from the Left's abuse of power, then I hope you enjoy Biden controlling every aspect of your life.

Next Friday is my biggest deadline of the year and I'm way off track. I can't stress this enough, but this election WILL decide whether or not Republicans take control of our country back. That means we have two options:

**1\. Keep allowing the Left to abuse their power and cancel anyone that believes in conservative values.**

**[2\. We can start working like a team to stop the Democrats from running our country into the ground.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488256:JRud1tGtN:m:1:3331421248:12E8221A5923EA84D6188FB6E0FFDB9A:r "2. We can start
working like a team to stop the Democrats from running our country into the ground.")**
---
| | | [WORK LIKE A TEAM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488255:JRud1tGtN:m:1:3331421248:12E8221A5923EA84D6188FB6E0FFDB9A:r "STAND WITH
MARCO")
---
I know you get a lot of these emails ahead of these big deadlines, but these are _**REAL**_ goals and _**REAL**_ deadlines we need to meet. **[I'm humbly asking you to chip in to meet this critical deadline and join the team that gets America back on track.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488256:JRud1tGtN:m:1:3331421248:12E8221A5923EA84D6188FB6E0FFDB9A:r "I'm humbly asking
you to chip in $28 to meet this critical deadline and join the team that gets America back on track.")**

_Please don't look back and wish you did more._

Thank you,
Marco Rubio
---
| | |

* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488254:JRud1tGtN:m:1:3331421248:12E8221A5923EA84D6188FB6E0FFDB9A:r "My parents lost their country. I'm not going to let us lose ours.
If you believe in the American Dream, I'm kindly asking for your donation to restore it.")
---

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488254:JRud1tGtN:m:1:3331421248:12E8221A5923EA84D6188FB6E0FFDB9A:r "Join my fight to restore the American Dream:")**
| [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488254:JRud1tGtN:m:1:3331421248:12E8221A5923EA84D6188FB6E0FFDB9A:r "RESTORE THE AMERICAN
DREAM")
---

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488253:JRud1tGtN:m:1:3331421248:12E8221A5923EA84D6188FB6E0FFDB9A:r "The Democrats Agenda: Abolish the filibuster, increase taxes, open the border. Stop the radical Democrats:")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488253:JRud1tGtN:m:1:3331421248:12E8221A5923EA84D6188FB6E0FFDB9A:r "If you’re
committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.")**
| [STOP THE DEMOCRATS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488253:JRud1tGtN:m:1:3331421248:12E8221A5923EA84D6188FB6E0FFDB9A:r "STOP THE DEMS")
---
| Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
---
1101 30th St. NW
#125
Washington, DC 20007

body:
Over 4,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle!

| |
---
| | | Over 4,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! My team just informed me that your membership status is still **INACTIVE** - and we're running out of membership cards! **[Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d37c470746434261a910836d91f9d54a&_e=GArVnOkLSUEGdYvmAfMCMQWAkkKgEwm_U9wYYxWs_mxi2Gc3vIeYFECbLWhHIwEnYCIL37e0NJdBRVgdGE5ATo1e9SBpeqxWAePxOuOq62nLTP_D0SLXllk4bah7glnx_CEo7zf6Dqyv1ZzjJC8w_f5fzVr2oIetvtBd8duM38x6twSEfoWbf_ClUVecyl1N3yYAwKJBSSB4xzKfCX307oE2eOlb0Bt37poyHqQ7TpMkF-n1gMXqA6Mk6Z1L5j-aPsg39vMnbHQjCBENXZ-078sWPR4lUNGq3MHSksV8L6aFLz-BYktZdYVs9vC-fQUauVFo5UpHEfe4Gfi_nTM5NNlrZf1ci7eioyC-MUUqzwP80Sw5kJObcQBt4MY3MiIJbemcTwl7FJ3BoIShukKK18XKx-zJljp8REXpsrDV5JeFpdFiEbzVevxN2XBT8lNvEeuxoier3FPxnHGYBTzkxw%3D%3D "Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

**Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we're going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we're going to need you with us.**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d37c470746434261a910836d91f9d54a&_e=GArVnOkLSUEGdYvmAfMCMQWAkkKgEwm_U9wYYxWs_mxi2Gc3vIeYFECbLWhHIwEnYCIL37e0NJdBRVgdGE5ATo1e9SBpeqxWAePxOuOq62nLTP_D0SLXllk4bah7glnx_CEo7zf6Dqyv1ZzjJC8w_f5fzVr2oIetvtBd8duM38x6twSEfoWbf_ClUVecyl1N3yYAwKJBSSB4xzKfCX307oE2eOlb0Bt37poyHqQ7TpMkF-n1gMXqA6Mk6Z1L5j-aPsg39vMnbHQjCBENXZ-078sWPR4lUNGq3MHSksV8L6aFLz-BYktZdYVs9vC-fQUaTX8ZWF8vfrUgII83p6NJCJvlkqtG8OxYmkVXyaTA1bQMquY_NgLw4CxTXQyamnONpgocsRHp8zvgCngBPouhBKHRbWICBn2tITy6KqIuPsYUzxr7xOztEVjP-nYm6Ilx4IItiASprT8k0ay5I9ThRA%3D%3D)
---

Democrats are counting on us - on YOU - to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It's the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party.

**[Confirm you're with me. Use my special Speaker's link to active your membership at 50% OFF:](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d37c470746434261a910836d91f9d54a&_e=GArVnOkLSUEGdYvmAfMCMQWAkkKgEwm_U9wYYxWs_mxi2Gc3vIeYFECbLWhHIwEnYCIL37e0NJdBRVgdGE5ATo1e9SBpeqxWAePxOuOq62nLTP_D0SLXllk4bah7glnx_CEo7zf6Dqyv1ZzjJC8w_f5fzVr2oIetvtBd8duM38x6twSEfoWbf_ClUVecyl1N3yYAwKJBSSB4xzKfCX307oE2eOlb0Bt37poyHqQ7TpMkF-n1gMXqA6Mk6Z1L5j-aPsg39vMnbHQjCBENXZ-078sWPR4lUNGq3MHSksV8L6aFLz-BYktZdYVs9vC-fQUadtfQY0C1oS27iLrD45MetKwgkw5LwjHkWAVINFaER4uSCGjl2aq4Tq41xmUPca-gLcWEUCsCWLxyui8q6JKjMlaBbJ3yjY97iSVZLnaK8ekJHEiqAz6GrqRl5fC3VFXXXezRENNZw-q6vJxbd-UAdg%3D%3D "Confirm you’re with me, %%First_Name__c%%. body:
Over 4,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle!

| |
---
| | | Over 4,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! My team just informed me that your membership status is still **INACTIVE** - and we're running out of membership cards! **[Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsd10n257a67n155puv29bg68igngjhthoq0atj0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c1j68o76c1h2bs "Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

**Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we're going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we're going to need you with us.**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z898argcu3c6p6lsquqrc70icn0j9m1ldr83t51o_rp22sh2s8i66o70c1j68o76c1h2bs)
---

Democrats are counting on us - on YOU - to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It's the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

name: BREAKING NEWS (via Team Tuberville)
subject: Coach: “I Won’t Back Down”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
🚨 Review this email ASAP >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/05d6475f2495d3fc/da5b8675f82cbb4bc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
**_THE LATEST NEWS_** **_ON THIS DEVELOPING STORY:_** Last October, following the Supreme Court decision that overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Department of Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin announced that the Pentagon intended to develop policies to expand taxpayer-subsidized abortion in the U.S. military, beyond what is allowed under federal statute.

For months, the Biden administration refused to provide lawmakers details.

Then, on February 16th, Secretary Austin released a memo announcing the formal implementation of this abortion policy – **which would fund travel and paid time off for service members AND their dependents seeking an abortion.**

Coach has followed through on his pledge to hold all general and flag officer nominations and high-level Pentagon promotions from Senate confirmation until this policy is reversed.

Now, Chuck Schumer has gone on the attack – with Coach in his sights!

Coach is taking a stand for LIFE and the RULE OF LAW.

[**Rush a secure contribution to show you’re behind him:**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/05d6475f2495d3fc/3941253124dc0b83c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
[**RUSH SUPPORT >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/05d6475f2495d3fc/af35d76297f3141dc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
**Below is a note from Coach. He wanted to make sure it got to you:**
---
|
---
**I’ve reviewed Senator Chuck Schumer’s recent media comments. Here’s my response:** I WON’T BACK DOWN. The Biden administration’s politicization of our nation’s military and the Pentagon’s immoral and illegal expansion of its authority to advance the left’s extreme pro-abortion agenda is wrong. They’ve turned our Department of Defense into an abortion travel agency!
The law is clear, our U.S. Constitution is clear. Defense Secretary Austin has overstepped his authority, and it would be irresponsible for the U.S. Senate to allow this policy to stand. I refuse to let the Biden administration walk all over the legislative branch, period. \- Coach
---
|
---
_Thank you for any donation you can send as this showdown heats up._ _We’re grateful for your support, Peter!_ _\- Team Tuberville_
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Here’s where we stand:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | **Jeffries begins to bring in big money**
**_PUNCHBOWL NEWS_**
This is _**NOT**_ a drill. Nancy Pelosi's replacement, Hakeem Jeffries, just went on a MASSIVE fundraising swing, raking in MILLIONS from his Hollywood cronies...

**According to our most recent intel:**
* House Democrats' campaign arm raised $8 MILLION in January, nearly TWICE as much as we did...
* Of this $8 MILLION, Jeffries himself raised more than the entire Republican committee.
* Then, in February, the DCCC raised another 13 MILLION, bring their total stockpile to a _staggering_ **$21 MILLION**

If we don't see a massive uptick in momentum among our ranks, we're DONE. At this rate, our America First agenda this year does not stand a chance, and you can forget about 2024...

Please, don't let the liberal elites destroy us just 3 months into our GOP majority. Democrats may have their deep-pocketed Hollywood cronies, but we have YOU. name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Derek, I’m asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I know you’re probably getting a lot of emails asking you for donations, but we’re coming up on our very first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline since I was sworn in

Hi Derek, it’s Governor Josh Shapiro.

**I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll chip in $5. I know you’re probably getting a lot of emails asking you for donations, but we’re coming up on our very first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline since I was sworn in, and anything you can donate will help our team keep fighting:** | | [Donate $5 now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60868123/398479623/-1656192571?refcode=email_032823_eoq1&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjVmMjgwZC1hMWNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OVm2-Saa2R5FL-3whj02-bT-GrRMoNH_JK65GKCUXFQ=)
---
I’m honored and humbled to wake up every day and have the opportunity to serve the great Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.

And I’m so proud of the work we’ve done so far to fight for real freedom and real opportunity for every Pennsylvanian. We’re fighting to make sure kids don’t have to go to school hungry. We’re working to finally raise the minimum wage to $15. We’re pushing to get more money into the pockets of our teachers, our cops, and our nurses.

Everything we’re working for is done in the service of hardworking Pennsylvanians. But I’m not naive. I know this won’t be easy, especially if extreme right-wing politicians try to stand in our way.

That’s why I’m asking for your support. Team Shapiro will never back down in this fight, but we need an army of grassroots supporters standing with us to make sure we keep Pennsylvania blue and can put our plans into action.

**So Derek, can I count on you to chip in a few bucks today?**

name: Team Cooper
subject: Did you see Roy’s message, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
NC Medicaid Expansion: PASSED.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60855622/398435292/823540626?refcode=ea.72849e66-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.72849e66-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjg0OWU2Ni04MGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ooIzATa3wBXX2n2WHfmsvYm0Nij113kk3URhcRKkPyI=&emci=718ef492-71cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=72849e66-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
We wouldn’t want you to miss this important news, Peter: Yesterday, Roy officially signed the Medicaid expansion bill. This is a monumental step forward for North Carolina. Please, take a moment to read Roy’s message from yesterday — we’ve forwarded it below — **[and send your thanks to Roy for working so hard for so long and finally getting a bipartisan deal over the finish line.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60855623/398435293/1500712034?refcode=ea.72849e66-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.72849e66-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjg0OWU2Ni04MGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ooIzATa3wBXX2n2WHfmsvYm0Nij113kk3URhcRKkPyI=&emci=718ef492-71cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=72849e66-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** Thanks! Team Cooper

**Begin forwarded message:**
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Roy Cooper [(info@roycooper.com)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60855624/398435294/1500712034?refcode=ea.72849e66-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.72849e66-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjg0OWU2Ni04MGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ooIzATa3wBXX2n2WHfmsvYm0Nij113kk3URhcRKkPyI=&emci=718ef492-71cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=72849e66-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
Date: March 27, 2023 7:58pm
Subject: We have passed Medicaid expansion!
> This is a big deal, Peter. I just signed the bill that will expand Medicaid in North Carolina, which will help 600,000 more North Carolinians receive coverage. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60855625/398435295/1500712034?refcode=ea.72849e66-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.72849e66-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjg0OWU2Ni04MGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ooIzATa3wBXX2n2WHfmsvYm0Nij113kk3URhcRKkPyI=&emci=718ef492-71cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=72849e66-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176) **We’ve worked hard on this for my entire time as governor, and I’m grateful to the advocates across the state who’ve spent years fighting for this:** Child welfare advocates, health care workers, veterans groups, hospitals, people of faith, Care 4 Carolina, and dozens of nonprofit groups, business leaders, sheriffs and local elected officials from both parties who’ve seen the toll of this crisis up close, and uninsured workers who bravely told their personal stories. Thank you to the Democratic legislators and a number of Republican legislators who never wavered in their support for Medicaid expansion. And thank you to the Republican legislative leaders who ultimately approached this issue with a willingness to change their minds to find a solution that worked for North Carolina. Peter, quality health care should be accessible to _all_. Medicaid expansion will help so many more working families, young adults, and other folks living paycheck to paycheck get the care they need. Medicaid expansion will also help save rural hospitals to make sure care is there when and where you need it. It will save our state millions. _It will save lives._ **This is a huge step forward for our state that couldn’t have happened without a whole lot of negotiation and bipartisan cooperation. We proved that when it matters most, Democrats and Republicans can work together to deliver for North Carolinians.** **[Join me in recognizing this historic moment for our state. clean_body: NC Medicaid Expansion: PASSED. | We wouldn’t want you to miss this important news, Peter: Yesterday, Roy officially signed the Medicaid expansion bill. This is a monumental step forward for North Carolina. Please, take a moment to read Roy’s message from yesterday — we’ve forwarded it below — Thanks! Team Cooper Begin forwarded message: \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Roy Cooper Date: March 27, 2023 7:58pm Subject: We have passed Medicaid expansion! This is a big deal, Peter. I just signed the bill that will expand Medicaid in North Carolina, which will help 600,000 more North Carolinians receive coverage. We’ve worked hard on this for my entire time as governor, and I’m grateful to the advocates across the state who’ve spent years fighting for this: Child welfare advocates, health care workers, veterans groups, hospitals, people of faith, Care 4 Carolina, and dozens of nonprofit groups, business leaders, sheriffs and local elected officials from both parties who’ve seen the toll of this crisis up close, and uninsured workers who bravely told their personal stories. Thank you to the Democratic legislators and a number of Republican legislators who never wavered in their support for Medicaid expansion. And thank you to the Republican legislative leaders who ultimately approached this issue with a willingness to change their minds to find a solution that worked for North Carolina. Peter, quality health care should be accessible to all. Medicaid expansion will help so many more working families, young adults, and other folks living paycheck to paycheck get the care they need. Medicaid expansion will also help save rural hospitals to make sure care is there when and where you need it. It will save our state millions. It will save lives. This is a huge step forward for our state that couldn’t have happened without a whole lot of negotiation and bipartisan cooperation. We proved that when it matters most, Democrats and Republicans can work together to deliver for North Carolinians. | ****** --- -Roy **=** --- **=** Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Katie Porter
subject: “Filthy rich”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Trust me, really rich people are well represented on both sides of the aisle.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=20155%2E3422442%2Ey5N_aC)
Derek,
Ever since the Supreme Court’s 2010 _Citizens United_ decision, elections have gotten more and more expensive.
It’s a reality I’m working to change through legislation—but until we can pass something meaningful,**I’m doing what I can as a candidate: I don’t take money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Bank, Big Pharma or Big Oil CEOs.**
But there’s another way to fund a campaign—through the candidate themself. Take a look at this recent headline ⬇️
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230328-1?refcode=EMAF28_1_Expensive_20230328_V1_F&refcode2=20155_3422442_y5N_aC&akid=20155%2E3422442%2Ey5N_aC)
**Trust me, really rich people are well represented on both sides of the aisle.** As a single-mom of three school aged kids who drives a well-loved minivan, my life looks different than most of my colleagues.
My fundraising looks different as well. I’m not spending weekends at retreats with lobbyists, I’m chauffeuring my daughter to her water polo game, talking with union leaders here in California, and doing never-ending piles of laundry.
**That’s why we count on supporters like you to power our campaign.** Seriously, the bulk of our contributions come from online supporters.
At the end of this month, we have to publicly report how much we’ve raised to the Federal Election Commission, and I have a goal of bringing in 500 new contributions through this email.
[**Can you be one of the supporters who helps us power our campaign and proves that we don’t need corporate PACs or a filthy rich candidate to win?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230328-1?refcode=EMAF28_1_Expensive_20230328_V1_F&refcode2=20155_3422442_y5N_aC&akid=20155%2E3422442%2Ey5N_aC)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230328-1?refcode=EMAF28_1_Expensive_20230328_V1_F&refcode2=20155_3422442_y5N_aC&akid=20155%2E3422442%2Ey5N_aC)**
Thanks, Derek, I appreciate you!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF28_1_Expensive_20230328_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=20155_3422442_y5N_aC&akid=20155%2E3422442%2Ey5N_aC)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=20155%2E3422442%2Ey5N_aC)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=20155%2E3422442%2Ey5N_aC)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

| | Judge Janet is on the ballot *next week*, Peternow. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60855728/398435796/367640264?sourceid=1048818&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGIwZDVjNi04MGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgvxFT-IviiOeL35-T8AXnNz3ykjqSa2RxPZR9NPuog=&emci=faafd5c6-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=00b0d5c6-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) Peter,

**In just one week** , Wisconsin Supreme Court candidate Judge **Janet Protasiewicz** is facing a general election that will decide abortion access and voting rights for millions.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60855734/398435809/367640264?sourceid=1048818&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGIwZDVjNi04MGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgvxFT-IviiOeL35-T8AXnNz3ykjqSa2RxPZR9NPuog=&emci=faafd5c6-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=00b0d5c6-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) By now you've likely heard of Janet and her pro-choice commitment, and her anti-choice, anti-democracy opponent. Not only has her opponent been a staunch supporter of anti-choice organizations, but he is a Trump ally who would've proudly supported efforts to overturn the state's election results in 2020.

**Peter, the stakes in this race are incredibly high.** Cases about the legality of aggressive redistricting efforts and a _Civil War-era_ statewide abortion ban could be on the state Supreme Court's docket shortly after this election, which will determine the Court's majority. A conservative majority boosted by her opponent could uphold these draconian attacks on the democratic and reproductive rights of nearly _six million_ Wisconsinites.

That's where Judge Janet comes in. Janet has been a critical voice and advocate in Wisconsin's justice system for _over 35 years_. Her wealth of experience and commitment to her community is exactly what her state needs in this flashpoint moment. If elected, she could not only shift the ideological balance of the court, but restore democratic and reproductive rights across the _entire state_. ****This race is too important for any of us to sit out, and Election Day is in ONE WEEK. Donate now to help elect more women like Janet to critical state offices across the country:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Pro-Choice-Women-Win-Q1](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60855741/398435818/367640264?sourceid=1048818&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGIwZDVjNi04MGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgvxFT-IviiOeL35-T8AXnNz3ykjqSa2RxPZR9NPuog=&emci=faafd5c6-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=00b0d5c6-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you, \- the EMILYs List Campaign team
** ** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60855743/398435820/367640264?sourceid=1048818&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGIwZDVjNi04MGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgvxFT-IviiOeL35-T8AXnNz3ykjqSa2RxPZR9NPuog=&emci=faafd5c6-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=00b0d5c6-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**** **** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60855744/398435821/1126972629?sourceid=1048818&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGIwZDVjNi04MGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgvxFT-IviiOeL35-T8AXnNz3ykjqSa2RxPZR9NPuog=&emci=faafd5c6-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=00b0d5c6-80cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**** ********

Her wealth of experience and commitment to her community is exactly what her state needs in this flashpoint moment. If elected, she could not only shift the ideological balance of the court, but restore democratic and reproductive rights across the entire state. **This race is too important for any of us to sit out, and Election Day is in ONE WEEK. Donate now to help elect more women like Janet to critical state offices across the country: Thank you, \- the EMILYs List Campaign team ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Gordon Center
subject: The difference in leadership is stark
body:
That’s why our work together is so important. |
---

| | | | The first FEC deadline of the year is this Friday and thanks to the generosity of #TeamLizzie, we’re on our way to a strong first quarter financially. We’ve seen what we can accomplish when we work together — first and foremost, sending Lizzie to the House where she’s helped lower prescription drug costs, address gun violence in our communities, and worked to protect access to reproductive care. At the same time, we’ve seen what D.C. Republicans intend to do with control of the House: They’ve failed to organize their own caucus, argued over leadership, played games and threatened to default on the national debt, and advanced bills that would hurt American families and students rather than help them. The difference in leadership is stark, and that’s why we need to stay focused on re-electing Lizzie and leaders like her so we can win back the House. Reaching our fundraising goals is an important aspect of that mission. [_**These FEC deadlines are a team effort — any amount you can contribute before Friday would help a lot.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60856174/398438115/1072569932?refcode=folf230328&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDFkNjJhMC04MWNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tCgfE7HpPBr7AjM6JkkZbGxmpASqSV8_4F8aowYXV0k=) Thanks, Gordon Center

| | A child only has 14,000 critical hours to prepare them for the rest of their lives. They can't afford to waste another hour in a failing school determined by their zip code.
**_Parents deserve to have a voice in their child’s education - NOT teachers unions with a political agenda_**.

| | We believe these hours are too precious to waste in schools that are failing our children.******_ [I AGREE >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e67cbeac755043ea9843e3aed8a2d89a&_e=Epf4LZMbilceqyZmO8wLrlBq2lxOWXOE0R_2cremntoc3hNrl9m0kuXTCuT2a_TvUZTCgJ-ispXT3-bDHP1i3C61sGluiSQhbFv4yOO63bH_T79vx8-Szn-sED1F_mOcw3z_tzaEouYEOuKim-v9Iknl1aAAd77HkDziRKW_1zYPKLdWG91fzcnp8bvQK9BmRRMI2UX5aF14rlfMwiuADdCl5OH9uoOxUdqehWTlGLIiuz1SpMQH1frGuTvHvBLeOdLWDf7XpzTt3Lm8W-SO1n5fgPnkXmgDUA8OW93vou8ZWKLAmE4RYeYr0931_7ajYHYGVs5YsZ-M-xQ4Q_-HtiO44hwNNcqY_qTx62OTet_Ls9jmyS3SsnmCt6w2Rm1RusQwOdpziKG5tjz99ittBhjaVKr9N8ZKFtpYMwcyPGuVuNkewaHNzi9uluL0g8LlfGPgb7NRX4c0sPQSq5REmXZKXb_MHt38KtIgrnEdrXE%3D "I AGREE>>>")_**

Children and parents don’t have the luxury of waiting for years, hoping their public school will improve.

That's why the American Federation for Children is committed to bringing education freedom to every state and putting education choices back into the hands of parents and students, **_NOT_** teachers unions.

**So, how are we doing that? Simple. With our four-step plan:** **📚 Amplifying the voices** of school choice success stories from parents and students. **📚 Advocating for change** at the state and national levels through school choice legislation. **📚 Connecting families** directly to resources to make the best education decisions for their children. **📚 Identifying and developing tomorrow’s leaders** in the school choice movement. But we need your help. **With a _[$14](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e67cbeac755043ea9843e3aed8a2d89a&_e=Epf4LZMbilceqyZmO8wLrlBq2lxOWXOE0R_2cremntoc3hNrl9m0kuXTCuT2a_TvUZTCgJ-ispXT3-bDHP1i3C61sGluiSQhbFv4yOO63bH_T79vx8-Szn-sED1F_mOcw3z_tzaEouYEOuKim-v9Iknl1aAAd77HkDziRKW_1zYPKLdWG91fzcnp8bvQK9BmRRMI2UX5aF14rlfMwiuADdCl5OH9uoOxUdqehWTlGLIiuz1SpMQH1frGuTvHvBLeOdLWDf7XpzTt3Lm8W-SO1n5fgPnkXmgDUA8OW93vou8ZWKLAmE4RYeYr0931_7ajYHYGVs5YsZ-M-xQ4Q_-Hts0ml_bIA5W-liLLvjkhBvwDLKSKcuFCJ6ZQOgNb9z5bLWIRdwHraw1uXFTtx1aB_VHwF6MY0k-sKGdVb3hyw3y3On_rl0PMb7sEXCa7flMX_XjQshnN4r4kyISR39BoL6JM8wUCKcFpQNDB24oeyXc%3D "$14")_ donation today, you could maximize a child’s 14,000 hours of K-12 education and set them up for a lifetime of success.**

clean_body: We believe these hours are too precious to waste...| | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this | | | | Peter, did you know that the average time of a child's K-12 education is roughly 14,000 hours? | | | | A child only has 14,000 critical hours to prepare them for the rest of their lives. They can't afford to waste another hour in a failing school determined by their zip code. Parents deserve to have a voice in their child’s education - NOT teachers unions with a political agenda. | | | | We believe these hours are too precious to waste in schools that are failing our children.**** "I AGREE>>>" Children and parents don’t have the luxury of waiting for years, hoping their public school will improve. That's why the American Federation for Children is committed to bringing education freedom to every state and putting education choices back into the hands of parents and students, NOT teachers unions. So, how are we doing that? Simple. With our four-step plan: 📚 Amplifying the voices of school choice success stories from parents and students. 📚 Advocating for change at the state and national levels through school choice legislation. 📚 Connecting families directly to resources to make the best education decisions for their children. 📚 Identifying and developing tomorrow’s leaders in the school choice movement. But we need your help. With a "$14" donation today, you could maximize a child’s 14,000 hours of K-12 education and set them up for a lifetime of success. | | | | Peter, our organization depends on grassroots Americans like you. Together, we can make sure that every child's 14,000 hours of education sets them up for success. | | | | Thank you for your support. name: Team Gillibrand needs your input, friend
subject: Friend, Kirsten needs your take on this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
| | **ALERT: The GOP is already using their new House majority to attack reproductive rights**
---
Kirsten is fighting tirelessly to protect the fundamental right to control our own bodies, but she needs to confirm where 127 more members of this team stand before midnight — **and your response is missing, friend.**
---
**Do you condemn the GOP’s attacks on reproductive freedom?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60869643/398486339/-1867837306?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk4020-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjYyMjJkNy1hM2NkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DLtq10X7MY4KzgWWqbP9uiCplVBAxZrcHfrM-xAjM1s=&emci=794f5799-b9cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0f6222d7-a3cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7659029)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60869644/398486340/-1867837306?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk4020-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjYyMjJkNy1hM2NkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DLtq10X7MY4KzgWWqbP9uiCplVBAxZrcHfrM-xAjM1s=&emci=794f5799-b9cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0f6222d7-a3cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7659029)
---
_*Responses submitted after 11:59 p.m. will not be recorded.*_
---
Friend, since the Trump-stacked Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade, Republicans all over the country have been relentlessly working to roll back reproductive rights — from state legislatures all the way up to the new GOP-led House majority.
Now, millions of people across the country have fewer reproductive rights than their parents and grandparents. And Republicans won’t stop until they've ended reproductive freedom nationwide.

body:
| | | Peter,
---
It’s Senator Rick Scott. I know you’ve gotten a lot of emails from me, but I want to take a moment to talk about why this race is so important. I’ve spent my career fighting for good jobs and opportunities for families in Florida and beyond. I’ll NEVER stop fighting for the American Dream, and with great patriots like you on our team, I know we can keep it alive for generations to come.

But right now, our mission to defend American freedom is facing one of its biggest challenges yet. I’m running for re-election because I know there’s still a LOT of work to do to defeat the radical Left’s ideas, but my race is going to be one of the tightest in the country. Last election, I beat my Democrat opponent by less than 1% and it had to go to a RECOUNT.

**Our race for Senate in Florida could be the race that determines control of the Senate, and I need every patriot on our team to step up if we’re going to win.[Can you pitch in now and help us take back the Senate?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=ea44b35bc57d4700bddb5e27478da824&_e=it9_Chdxb98K93LJEg8przMDQNxJAmHcdnWToHWmZzRwYeG6cRFmykWlAEjeq03q4xlEwtp-CitdS_mrt97JsF_jzUF3X-AJbi7oV5Vghz3A7ei708YuL34FJWNg9olUpZX_pyGnU1jidyT9xDdF_huQAbSVpqWl0t06ml6CTOxhkuDd6Mdmtgo0GiAoxQxq50u3nqi1l2XSLznP9YpZJ32nK9272y0FdvrEUSHGJFFyCzxs1QgtW0FAPVFHEVu-_ox7bJ3zfaylQizkUOpYo-LxXjPPDRNTlXv1aInS_d7SaUF0UyGnAf_dJ4z_poQbgXPhCgybA-iPKj45IQcE0z0xKajzeAJmDMiRvLeTLHDi0zkTG-P4Eozn7noYoFN9)**

| | Peter, I know what it’s like to pinch pennies. I grew up in public housing. We didn't have a lot, but my mom ingrained the values of hard work and faith in me.

Now, I’ve taken the values I learned as a child to the Senate to fight for families like the one I grew up in. Democrats want to stamp out the American Dream that got me to where I am today - but I’m not about to let them.

**I know you won’t let the radical Left tear apart the country that you and I love, and that’s why I’m calling on you to help us win our critical race next year.**

[**Please, pitch in whatever you can to help us hold onto this vital seat and take back Republicans’ Senate majority. clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s Senator Rick Scott. I know you’ve gotten a lot of emails from me, but I want to take a moment to talk about why this race is so important. I’ve spent my career fighting for good jobs and opportunities for families in Florida and beyond. I’ll NEVER stop fighting for the American Dream, and with great patriots like you on our team, I know we can keep it alive for generations to come. But right now, our mission to defend American freedom is facing one of its biggest challenges yet. I’m running for re-election because I know there’s still a LOT of work to do to defeat the radical Left’s ideas, but my race is going to be one of the tightest in the country. Last election, I beat my Democrat opponent by less than 1% and it had to go to a RECOUNT. Our race for Senate in Florida could be the race that determines control of the Senate, and I need every patriot on our team to step up if we’re going to win. | | | | Peter, I know what it’s like to pinch pennies. I grew up in public housing. We didn't have a lot, but my mom ingrained the values of hard work and faith in me. Now, I’ve taken the values I learned as a child to the Senate to fight for families like the one I grew up in. Democrats want to stamp out the American Dream that got me to where I am today - but I’m not about to let them. I know you won’t let the radical Left tear apart the country that you and I love, and that’s why I’m calling on you to help us win our critical race next year. Thank you, Rick Scott | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. As we’ve said, this election poses a huge threat to our democracy, considering the GOP paid the conservative candidate to help them overturn the 2020 election and that Wisconsin’s Supreme Court decided to uphold Joe Biden’s victory by just one vote.

**_But we’re not just fighting to protect the status quo and prevent the nightmare scenario of an overturned election. We’re fighting for a better future._**

This is a state that elected a Republican senator by just one point in 2022, was decided by even less in both of the past two presidential elections and has such extremely gerrymandered congressional maps that six of its eight districts lean Republican by six points or more.

**_Just by ensuring the state’s election rules are fair,_** a progressive WI Supreme Court majority could change all of that. Overturning the state’s gerrymandered maps and wiping away decades of voter suppression could easily shift the partisan balance of a key battleground state and, therefore, the nation.
**[So when we say this election could change our future, we’re not exaggerating. LISTEN UP, FOLKS!

If there’s one candidate you shouldn’t sleep on, it's Brandon Presley.

This guy is the epitome of what we need in government — honest, true-blue, and totally fed up with special interests and lobbyists. Plus, he's got a track record of actually getting sh*t done.

I'm telling you, Peter! Mississippi _needs_ a leader like Brandon — someone who understands the everyday struggles of Mississippians, who shares their values, and who will represent ALL of them.

[But if we’re going to have a snowball’s chance in hell to defeat Tate Reeves, then I need you to step up right now. Will you chip in toward Brandon’s $30,000 end-of-quarter goal and give Reeves the boot?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60857933/398445162/1418908851?refcode=ea.46abd367-84cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.46abd367-84cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZhYmQzNjctODRjZC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nA-ntAgedJG0VBP_CHZoaiXHPgDyFdeqjsEeTHrPOg8=)

If you’re still not motivated to step up today, consider this: **YOU are the last line of defense in cleaning up the never-ending corruption in Jackson.** And boy, do we have a lot of cleaning up to do.

Tate Reeves has been up to some shady business — corruption scandals, greedy politics, and even funneling over a million bucks of the state’s welfare money to his fitness trainer.

Tate doesn't deserve to be governor for even one more day, let alone another four years. Mississippi deserves better.

That's where Brandon Presley comes in. We need to pull him through his end-of-quarter fundraising push and get him elected. But we can't do it without your help.

[So, are you in? Chip in towards Brandon's fundraising goal and help us defeat Tate Reeves once and for all in November >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60857934/398445165/1418908851?refcode=ea.46abd367-84cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.46abd367-84cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZhYmQzNjctODRjZC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nA-ntAgedJG0VBP_CHZoaiXHPgDyFdeqjsEeTHrPOg8=) | **[Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60857935/398445166/1418908851?amount=5&refcode=ea.46abd367-84cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.46abd367-84cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZhYmQzNjctODRjZC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nA-ntAgedJG0VBP_CHZoaiXHPgDyFdeqjsEeTHrPOg8=)** | **[Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60857936/398445167/1418908851?amount=10&refcode=ea.46abd367-84cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.46abd367-84cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZhYmQzNjctODRjZC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nA-ntAgedJG0VBP_CHZoaiXHPgDyFdeqjsEeTHrPOg8=)** | **[Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60857937/398445168/1418908851?amount=25&refcode=ea.46abd367-84cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.46abd367-84cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZhYmQzNjctODRjZC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nA-ntAgedJG0VBP_CHZoaiXHPgDyFdeqjsEeTHrPOg8=)**

Fellow American -

This Friday, we face the first major test of this campaign. **It's our very first Federal Election Commission (FEC) quarterly fundraising deadline since we launched.** After that we'll have to file our first major report.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

#
Derek —
Extremism is rising higher and higher in the Republican Party.
Trump is calling for protests, violence, even “death and destruction” over his pending indictment. Governors like Ron DeSantis are using their power to restrict essential freedoms in their states. And in Congress, McCarthy and his MAGA allies are stonewalling action on everything — on the budget, on guns, on the VA, even our National Security. They’re bringing us to the brink of economic collapse over the debt ceiling, all while they carp on about how “woke-ism” is the root of our problems.
It’s a lot, and it can seem overwhelming sometimes. But we are not powerless.
We just have to beat them.
That’s what VoteVets does. We’re run by Veterans, and we run to support Veterans. We’ve backed Veteran candidates who can win — candidates like Mark Kelly, Tammy Duckworth, Ruben Gallego, Jason Crow, Ted Lieu, as well as dozens and dozens more like them — at every level of government.
So today, if you’re looking for a place to channel whatever it is you’re feeling, help us beat them.

body:

Dear Friend,
The first quarter of this campaign has reminded me why they call it “running for office.” It really is a marathon, but instead of miles, the distance is measured in days until the election, conversations with voters, and dollars. And like a marathon, you need to finish every milestone strong.
[**This Friday is our first big campaign milestone and we have just $50,000 left to reach our fundraising goal for the quarter. Can you help us finish strong and keep up the momentum for next quarter by contributing to our campaign?**](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=ac2415321d&e=1012843e9c)
[](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=b6eb7da1bc&e=1012843e9c)
I’m running because our district deserves a new generation of leadership in Congress. We need a leader who will bring community voices into decision-making processes. For the past six years, I have worked to deliver for students and families on their most pressing needs - from education to food insecurity to the environment.
With your help, we can build on this momentum in Congress. As your representative, I will fight for safe neighborhoods, quality education, and a government that works for us every step of the way.
Thanks for giving what you can today and for being a part of our team. Let's win this together!
|
---
| [Donate Here](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=b78bc085f0&e=1012843e9c)

Hi there, Peter. We’re writing to ask you to **[make a contribution](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqAQfDazIGQL5RUyCDnnnxJDYRvJVjEOBXcHxetwfzNBm7SWLdld7JvDueSlKn_yhPKJ_aXTeKOG3SyI8rs5Vk5dE-Q-oj9MrrreiNeF71-SAfni3JMkgTP-9cDkXl7M0YWIQPGloO9x9zZW-fvzi9V_6cH_YLvC22Z7fnFEahH-YDtyCpDhFXReo5q9iBwncbtpeMaYYp0PIlW5mYqPcwDp54wb_9fuctnIs9I5O_V5wSil0E_uz9L07LOpQ8iibU7tj5Kp5yRZRkglz89-vCdJN2QDB_FzajKOfp0cXK-74N9EbVsCziiYHJ1USUSXd215caixkBECgefwzz1qeIrUQ/3uv/gAswlc3WRjquw_XyRb_fhw/h1/u66q_lX2Rzm7PtLQUAR0YsWAo8jlDYcVPfgAYye2Tcw)** to Eric’s campaign before Friday’s FEC fundraising deadline. But before we do, here are a few reasons why this deadline is so important.
---
1. **Whether we like it or not, our FEC report will be used to determine our campaign’s strength.** Republicans are looking for any sign of vulnerability, but an impressive report could prevent super PACs from attacking us. They’ll see us as too formidable and not worth the expense.

2. **Elections analysts have all confirmed that IL-17 will be “the most ****competitive House race in Illinois.”** Republicans also explicitly listed Eric as a top target in their 2024 effort to keep the House. If you want you to play a role in stopping them, Eric’s race is where your dollar will go the furthest.

3. **We depleted nearly _all_ our campaign funds to counter super PAC ****attacks and keep this seat blue in 2022.** It’s likely this race will again be decided by a razor-thin margin, so we need to use this deadline to rebuild our campaign resources.

---
[**_With just 72 hours until our first FEC fundraising deadline of 2023, we’re counting on our best supporters to help us hit our goal. If you can, please contribute_****$5 today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqAQfDazIGQL5RUyCDnnnxJDYRvJVjEOBXcHxetwfzNBm7SWLdld7JvDueSlKn_yhPKJ_aXTeKOG3SyI8rs5Vk5dP7lzpz5x65lNtcSMTukD5Fzp39R2JMesEMxCR770Yavy0m8rOXpfnXqGcD8Yl0skK0R2aaD4EsURAg1d26lUV0dTirrK_KpOb26VMg-tLeAt6RfTiShy_8ii3Z0mj5bkaNzjELt2BXCAggkqbwgPyTR3th-FUj0bQ5MHjvFtQJceqLou0BgIBTnCT9zSl93DmpxeqhsJgpXaObuqIXMslflmY-4Za0BRY26hii37yDAqarKjnUJ3j_0gRneKZr6Fg/3uv/gAswlc3WRjquw_XyRb_fhw/h2/HTrGBCcVK5RPSBaYCNEgTd4Mq1bvJatMjVslLpmcfxY)

name: Giffords
subject: Today, a community is reeling
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Our hearts continue to go out to the Nashville community
#

Friends -
After Sandy Hook we said never again.
After Parkland we said never again.
After Uvalde we said never again.
But yesterday, the Covenant School in Nashville became the most recent school to experience a deadly mass shooting. Now, a community is reeling after three students and three staff members were senselessly killed.
When will enough be enough?
Three nine-year-old children died yesterday. That’s three kids who didn’t get a chance to have their first double-digit birthday. It’s three families who will forever be changed, who now must grieve the loss of their child. It’s three empty chairs at the dinner table.
This is a moral failure, but our leaders have the power to fix it.
We cannot rest until there’s a future free from gun violence in our nation—a future where our kids are truly safe. Congress can and must do more to keep our communities safe, and we will keep demanding that they have the courage to act.
Please continue standing with us in this fight, and if you can, [**consider making a contribution to Giffords PAC today to help us continue our work to save lives from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230328-1-30&t=1&akid=4804%2E3935704%2EDO3IWM)
Thank you,
The team at Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230328-1-30&t=2&akid=4804%2E3935704%2EDO3IWM)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=4804%2E3935704%2EDO3IWM) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

ICYMI: I personally grilled the CEO of TikTok last week after literal DEATH THREATS were made on the app against my Republican House colleagues!
That's right - this CCP-owned Big Tech company has no problems harvesting your data and using it against Americans. Every time an American uses TikTok, the CCP is harvesting their biometric data, their keystrokes, their geolocations, and their financial data.
TikTok claims our personal data is safe on the app - but how can we believe they'll protect the privacy of 150 million Americans... ...when they can't even protect my colleagues from THREATS AGAINST THEIR LIFE!
---
| | [JOIN ME: STAND UP TO TIKTOK!!!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GwnfBMCpk3j51sVO9uCAKJ1oyxEPkqYRqJaS9v8EnMDVKUVOoc0VuBtcK6B1bOBWP_9Ch_R7sW6C49awiY1tE2leuhobfrW3ic-zlmAIk4JPxifvG121gaEP6hdy2EvpXix4f1FAnOGYanMuBWWaj4QXF3H0mSrpLjCEx4dCHwO3xYNJ-8MIU0CMRZbL9xL2wWssviqaZPzQDkcdv8Dimq-l78jlk-Ar&c=WDPPuhnt2tLB_U-YznylzzHgIBMLzg0vvm5H6xn5hFbnfZCxND6JVQ==&ch=9Y4Mp2W2eNukabC_JO1CIYnqjNRV6JA6wACdFp7ttyh6axUwvLxqRA==)

This is why I'm doing all I can to rein them in - including slamming his hypocrisy on the committee floor by showing him a video from his own platform spewing death threats against the very Committee Chair sitting in the meeting!
Clearly, if TikTok can't keep violent death threats and other dangerous speech contained, they aren't equipped to handle over 150 million American users' data...
Friend the CCP will never stand up for your First Amendment rights or privacy. They've done all they can to steal as much data on Americans as possible. name: Emilia, me (2)
subject: Making sure you saw this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
At the end of this month, our campaign will have to publicly report our internal fundraising data – opening the door for extreme Republicans to scrutinize every aspect of our campaign.
Peter, I want to make sure you saw my note from yesterday.

**At the end of this month, our campaign will have to publicly report our internal fundraising data** – opening the door for extreme Republicans to scrutinize every aspect of our campaign.

Washington Republicans have already made it clear that they’re angling to flip this seat red next year. So this public end-of-quarter fundraising report is _our first opportunity to prove that, with the support of this grassroots team, OH-13 is not up for grabs._

[**But to showcase the strength of our campaign, we have to reach our end-of-quarter goal before Friday night. This will be a defining moment for our team so I’m personally asking: Can I count on you to pitch in, Peter?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60859256/398450191/-1745762055?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.28_b1_em2_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTExMGRiYS04OGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T6C7hDFTOMBWP2lTv80rbt1g4NBEpqhcK73fPAq4DYU=)

_Emilia_

On Monday, March 27, 2023 **Emilia Sykes** wrote:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60859257/398450192/-1745762055?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.28_b1_em2_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTExMGRiYS04OGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T6C7hDFTOMBWP2lTv80rbt1g4NBEpqhcK73fPAq4DYU=)
Peter, I wanted to take a moment to reach out personally and explain why this week will be a defining moment for our campaign.

**March 31st marks the first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the new election cycle.** As you may remember from last year, this means our campaign has to publicly report all of our internal fundraising data to the FEC.

All eyes will be on Northeast Ohio, Peter. And because Washington Republicans and political pundits will try to gauge whether our grassroots team has what it takes to bring home another historic victory next November, falling behind on our end-of-quarter fundraising is not an option.

[**To ensure we can post the strongest possible fundraising report, our team has set an ambitious goal of raising $10,000 before Friday at midnight. Is there any amount you can chip in to help us reach our first end-of-quarter goal of the new cycle?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60859258/398450193/-1745762055?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.28_b1_em2_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTExMGRiYS04OGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T6C7hDFTOMBWP2lTv80rbt1g4NBEpqhcK73fPAq4DYU=)
| [**Chip In**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60859259/398450194/-1745762055?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.28_b1_em2_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTExMGRiYS04OGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T6C7hDFTOMBWP2lTv80rbt1g4NBEpqhcK73fPAq4DYU=)
---

Last November, it was the continuous support of this grassroots team that enabled us to defy the odds and bring home a win for the Birthplace of Champions.

**Our campaign wasn’t fueled by the right-wing dark-money groups that propped up my opponent – we were powered by hardworking Ohio families who chipped in what they could, when they could, because they believed a better future for Northeast Ohio was possible.**

Even in the face of $7 million of Republican attacks, we proved that our people-powered team was unstoppable.

Now, as MAGA Republicans aim to flip OH-13 to hold on to their fragile Majority, we need to show that we’re up for the challenge once again. _But I can’t do that without your help, Peter._

[**Our first end-of-quarter deadline will be a defining moment for our re-election campaign, so I’m really going to need the support of this team. clean_body: At the end of this month, our campaign will have to publicly report our internal fundraising data – opening the door for extreme Republicans to scrutinize every aspect of our campaign. Peter, I want to make sure you saw my note from yesterday. At the end of this month, our campaign will have to publicly report our internal fundraising data – opening the door for extreme Republicans to scrutinize every aspect of our campaign. Washington Republicans have already made it clear that they’re angling to flip this seat red next year. So this public end-of-quarter fundraising report is our first opportunity to prove that, with the support of this grassroots team, OH-13 is not up for grabs. = Emilia On Monday, March 27, 2023 Emilia Sykes wrote: = Peter, I wanted to take a moment to reach out personally and explain why this week will be a defining moment for our campaign. March 31st marks the first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the new election cycle. As you may remember from last year, this means our campaign has to publicly report all of our internal fundraising data to the FEC. All eyes will be on Northeast Ohio, Peter. And because Washington Republicans and political pundits will try to gauge whether our grassroots team has what it takes to bring home another historic victory next November, falling behind on our end-of-quarter fundraising is not an option. = | = Last November, it was the continuous support of this grassroots team that enabled us to defy the odds and bring home a win for the Birthplace of Champions. Our campaign wasn’t fueled by the right-wing dark-money groups that propped up my opponent – we were powered by hardworking Ohio families who chipped in what they could, when they could, because they believed a better future for Northeast Ohio was possible. Even in the face of $7 million of Republican attacks, we proved that our people-powered team was unstoppable. Now, as MAGA Republicans aim to flip OH-13 to hold on to their fragile Majority, we need to show that we’re up for the challenge once again. But I can’t do that without your help, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you so much. name: Bryce Reeves
subject: I Need Your Help
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Bryce Reeves
body:
Republicans can no longer the upholders of the status-quo. Instead we must the be...
| | |
---
| | [](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/01000187292e3f32-a1b09ed4-8078-4cfe-8791-8d71fd610e02-000000/DhdvyJP9HmcGZzMA3EZFwWUSHSY=315)
---
|

| | |

| **Peter Can We Count on You to Endorse the Only Veteran in This Race?**
---
| | [ENDORSE SENATOR REEVES TODAY!](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fendorse/1/01000187292e3f32-a1b09ed4-8078-4cfe-8791-8d71fd610e02-000000/UjGLmJv3n1vnkNCNMUBXdCGMBlI=315)
---
| **Friend, ** **March 31st is our BIGGEST Deadline of the year and I NEED YOUR HELP! ** **It's official. There are only 3 days left until the end of the quarter, and I am just shy of reaching my First Quarter Goals. ** **Now more than ever I am asking that you please consider financially investing into my campaign. ** **My opponent each week has been showing more and more of his****TRUE COLORS****. Just last week at an event he stated that as hardworking American citizens it is OUR JOB to make sure individuals are cared for from “birth to grave”. A stance socialist elites like Bernie Sanders, Joe Biden, and Barack Obama have been trying to instill in America for years.** **If you don't believe me, just read this article from Politico:****POLITICO Playbook: Biden’s ‘cradle to grave’ agenda****or even the New York Times Article:******[_**From Cradle to Grave, Democrats Move to Expand Social Safety Net**_](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nytimes.com%2F2021%2F09%2F06%2Fus%2Fpolitics%2Fdemocrats-biden-social-safety-net.html/1/01000187292e3f32-a1b09ed4-8078-4cfe-8791-8d71fd610e02-000000/9u33erFWo0gunn-irsEVn925qYs=315) **Is a Social Welfare State with increased government control really what Virginians want?** **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!**** ** **While my Progressive “Republican” Opponent from New York works to deceive voters on his true ideology, mine has has always been clear.** **To Bring Freedom, Prosperity, and a Vision back to Virginia**
---
| | [SUPPORT BRYCE'S VISION](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fdonate/1/01000187292e3f32-a1b09ed4-8078-4cfe-8791-8d71fd610e02-000000/x2DF8LEX1TwzAD-OBoEuD22Z7-A=315)
---
| **The Bible says, “Where there is no Vision the people perish” (Proverbs 29:18)** **As I was sitting at Church the other day reflecting on the words of the pastor, I started to think to myself: what is it that Virginians envision?** **After a lot of thinking and prayer the vision came to me:** **_Virginians want their lives made EASIER_**** _Virginians want their lives made BETTER_**** _And Virginians want their lives made SAFER_** **Republicans can no longer be the upholders of the status-quo. Instead we must be****Creators of the Future**. If you have not already, please consider financially contributing to my campaign and supporting our mission to create a new future for Virginia. A future that focuses on family, prosperity, and freedom. I can't win this fight on my own. I NEED YOUR HELP! Thank you for your continuous prayers and support. **Your Humble Servant, **
---
| | |
---
| | [Donate $28](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fdonate/2/01000187292e3f32-a1b09ed4-8078-4cfe-8791-8d71fd610e02-000000/WjMPhBUYrfNIZNoOLTR6ruuuEwM=315)

body:
I know that you follow politics and watch your fair share of news, so just thought that this membership might be of interest to you.

| |

| | |
Hey Friend,

I hope you're doing well! I know that you follow politics and watch your fair share of news, so just thought that this membership might be of interest to you. I received my carrying card yesterday, very high quality. This is a really good way to support the GOP and have some real impact on our country. Anyway, I don't think I'm really supposed to forward this, but if the link works then I'm sure it's ok!

Best,

Bill

name: =?utf-8?Q?Seth=20Smith=2C=20Finance=20Director?=
subject: FW: 🚨 Urgent: Help us stop the Democrats from expanding income tax in WA!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Help stop the Democrats' progressive income tax agenda in WA! Your donation can make a difference in electing Republicans to protect our communities. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=16898a4b53&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Peter,

I wanted to forward this critical message our Chairman sent out last week regarding the recent Washington State Supreme Court ruling that upholds the controversial Capital Gains Income Tax. It is evident that the court made a biased ruling, defying common sense, the IRS, and the way 49 other states define income from capital gains.

This ruling opens the door for the Democrats' stated goal of instituting a progressive income tax for all Washingtonians. Now, more than ever, we must come together to elect Republicans who will stand against the Democrats' efforts to impose a progressive income tax statewide. We need to protect the hardworking families of Washington State from unnecessary tax burdens!

[Will you make a generous donation today to help us elect strong Republican candidates who will fight for your interests and work tirelessly to prevent the expansion of income tax in Washington State? Your support is crucial in this battle.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=7dea6890c2&e=6a281f566d)

Best regards,

Seth Smith
Finance Director
Washington State Republican Party
---
|
---
| **BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE:**
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Peter,

**A critical decision has been made: the Washington State Supreme Court has upheld the controversial Capital Gains Income Tax.** The court issued a blatantly political ruling, rejecting common sense, the IRS, and the way 49 other states define income from capital gains. This ruling opens the door for the Democrats' stated goal of instituting a progressive income tax for all Washingtonians, including every single parent trying to work two jobs and raise a family.

Now, more than ever, we _must_ come together to elect Republicans who will stand against the Democrats' efforts to impose a progressive income tax statewide. **We need to protect the hardworking families of Washington State from unnecessary tax burdens!**

Will you make a generous donation today to help us elect strong Republican candidates who will fight for your interests and work tirelessly to prevent the expansion of income tax in Washington State? **Your[support](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=51ae4793fb&e=6a281f566d) is _crucial_ in this battle.**

👉 [Donate $25](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=fcadad1b74&e=6a281f566d)
👉 [Donate $50](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=974880ead7&e=6a281f566d)
👉 [Donate $100](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5b7dd82514&e=6a281f566d)
👉 [Donate $250](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=765bbb49e4&e=6a281f566d)
👉 [Donate another amount](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f0901b3beb&e=6a281f566d)

Every dollar you contribute will be used strategically to support our Republican candidates' campaigns, ensuring that we have the resources necessary to counter the Democrats' progressive tax agenda. This decision gives us an opportunity to engage with the voters who have 9 times rejected an income tax, but we need the resources to get our message to them.

Together, we can send a powerful message that we will not stand idly by while the Democrats attempt to impose their financially harmful policies on our communities.

name: Team Sharice
subject: Republicans are already fielding opponents to run against Sharice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hi there,

The path to regaining our majority in the House runs right through KS-03. Early investments and hitting every fundraising benchmark are key to doing that. Friday at midnight is our first public test of 2023 — our quarterly FEC filing deadline — and we can’t fall short of our $20,000 goal.

Between the Democrats labeling our race as one of the most competitive in 2024, and the GOP calling us a top target, we know National Republicans are already fielding opponents to run against Sharice in our competitive district — _and we need to be ready for whatever comes our way._

**Will you chip in $20 to support Sharice before Friday’s end-of-quarter FEC deadline?**

**[https://act.shariceforcongress.com/a/march23-goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60861570/398457075/-1334289778?amount=20&contactdata=PEYv4M60Ee4EMTE3CQspvgCOIcj5GVJbPmCPIv5nDCKK9vmx5km0YhQ3kNGvMauPfbG+lXAW26qozdD8mOx89Om/A3qrHD/8EH5OqROehijVESUZI9vS2KKgAPeDbF74wVCSLyemwycv4Xy/IAE7KA==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230328_FR_1.5_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_eoq&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2IyZWFlMi04YWNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iXE7Njgo-q1szgoOCJQoAaR9qVpTWGOXtF2b3FqC6nY=)**

clean_body: | Hi there, The path to regaining our majority in the House runs right through KS-03. Early investments and hitting every fundraising benchmark are key to doing that. Friday at midnight is our first public test of 2023 — our quarterly FEC filing deadline — and we can’t fall short of our $20,000 goal. Between the Democrats labeling our race as one of the most competitive in 2024, and the GOP calling us a top target, we know National Republicans are already fielding opponents to run against Sharice in our competitive district — and we need to be ready for whatever comes our way. Will you chip in $20 to support Sharice before Friday’s end-of-quarter FEC deadline? = Thanks for standing with us! — Team Sharice * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list.
