clean_body: | | | Peter, Right now, we’re coming up on one of the biggest challenges of our mission, and I wanted to fill you in on where we stand. In such important moments, we have a choice: we can run away from a challenge or fight through it. I’m ready to fight, and I know you are too. Our FIRST FEC end-of-quarter deadline is just days away, and it’s URGENT that we meet our goal. With so much on the line next year, we have to meet EVERY DEADLINE until November 2024 if we’re going to take back the Senate. Peter, if we show up short of our goal, we’re in for trouble. The Democrats are eagerly watching our numbers, and the second they sense weakness, they’ll unload MILLIONS more to defeat me. But if we come through strong, they’ll know that there’s no messing with Missouri. Thank you, Senator Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Oh, for crying out loud!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:

|
---
| | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488430:6kOVbtGNV:m:1:3391001263:B737DCB55C6CFE38EB644275A38A9265:r "STEVE SIGNED ENGAGEMENT")
---
_Oh, for crying out loud!_

Joe Biden is moving to VETO my new plan to lower energy prices for the American People. My plan would **1)** cut costs for your family, **2)** reduce American reliance on foreign oil, and **3)** restore American energy dominance...

**... AND JOE BIDEN WANTS TO STRIKE IT ALL DOWN WITH THE STROKE OF A PEN!**

He isn't concerned about you, the American People, paying sky-high energy bills each and every month - he only cares about cozying up to his Green New Deal buddies and radical climate special interests.

_His cronies get to line their pockets with green energy contracts while the American People pay an arm and a leg just to heat their homes._

It makes me sick to my stomach.

_**[So before it's too late, will you join our Republican House Majority in standing up to Joe Biden, holding him accountable, and fighting for American energy dominance?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488430:6kOVbtGNV:m:1:3391001263:B737DCB55C6CFE38EB644275A38A9265:r "So before it's too late, will you
join our Republican House Majority in standing up to Joe Biden, holding him accountable, and fighting for American energy dominance?")**_

**We know it's a lot to ask but Biden is about to VETO my plan so we need to move right now! **
---
| | | [STAND WITH OUR REPUBLICAN MAJORITY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62488430:6kOVbtGNV:m:1:3391001263:B737DCB55C6CFE38EB644275A38A9265:r "ADD YOUR NAME >> SUPPORT THE LOWER ENERGY COSTS ACT")
---
Thanks,
Steve Scalise

name: Jim DeMint
subject: Training Young Conservatives to Win
body:
It's not every day that a Beltway insider publication writes a 1,100-word profile about how effective a conservative organization is.

| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Patriot: It's not every day that a Beltway insider publication writes a 1,100-word profile about how effective a conservative organization is. But that's just what _Politico_ did recently!
That's how successful CPI has become over the last few years. Even _liberals_ are in awe.
The headline ran, _" Inside the Trump world-organized retreat to plot out Biden oversight." _
The subject of the article was our two-day training boot camp for congressional staffers tasked with investigating the Biden Administration. The retreat was part of CPI's ongoing mission of teaching young conservatives how to win in a city and a system rigged against them.
"Topics discussed at the boot camp included tutorials on obtaining records and deposing and interviewing witnesses," _Politico_ reported... accurately!
That's exactly what we covered at Camp Rydin, our new conference center in nearby Maryland, and much more.
**[Please help train the next generation of conservative leaders by supporting CPI today!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83c14f821d764ad089983fa4007a6f94&_e=UHxXGlVHfZwEfSzAQa_5iPA2gmS0Vrg_exz-b_GUtw5K1w8OLqfvz89EtUsRSr12fU2sGyYxO2mf1lSGCrGtphFzg6bIRmLqhtlbRyvvkN3T8cQSYWvBzoa3wyZ4tegeO3-oCS21lbQxrjpoizPt2KsSXSXtI3Mgcz8nL8TRKvbqtMmBbGRAJTMSDtS1ZgSTQROvWyRWpcO6v_X1sPTBJIzlVzMHG91ZRfY6faIeVUpRQpXWT9RFv4y8ZDdx-LjXrt3OE-c3ivtdoFRIOCXd91_Xc8Bqnu9TV2qih4EILODo7Y2gXG8QIjSX6iON9ufq)**
The article quoted a congressional watchdog group: "I'm not aware of any other group that has held trainings so consistently and for such a wide range of staffers."
Yep: that's the point!
A Republican establishment lawyer was concerned about CPI inviting conservative staffers to a conference and "coaching them on how to get more aggressive."
A left-wing activist said this: "CPI says they're in D.C. to drain the swamp, but from here it looks more like a hostile takeover."
**We couldn 't put it better ourselves!**
Non-partisan, establishment, and liberal observers all agree that CPI is reshaping the conservative movement and turning it into the lean, mean fighting machine it needs to be to defeat the Left.
**[Please partner with us by supporting CPI with a tax-deductible gift today!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83c14f821d764ad089983fa4007a6f94&_e=UHxXGlVHfZwEfSzAQa_5iPA2gmS0Vrg_exz-b_GUtw5K1w8OLqfvz89EtUsRSr12fU2sGyYxO2mf1lSGCrGtphFzg6bIRmLqhtlbRyvvkN3T8cQSYWvBzoa3wyZ4tegeO3-oCS21lbQxrjpoizPt2HAkscHhXP7GjsgY_HWUFfVQYHilgfVuWwTZ_m2BAOztEcFqqyCg9WxUD6AFTbuZEeAzBLqHTUef088r4l4l3eR22LLsTE0vGgbxxevw33S7w0bJ5SB7UH51l4Me67cjlaV7AJzUPfv-bkX6EU2EsUuaNRuTueKsrQ8wfLPMsmhT)**
_Politico_ may have intended to write a hit piece or expose. But instead, they wrote a 22-paragraph advertisement for CPI -- free of charge!

As long as the media is accusing us of fighting Washington, frustrating the GOP Establishment, and infuriating the woke, socialist Left, we know we're doing a good job.
With your help, we'll keep up the fight -- and the next profile they write will be even longer!
Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to fight for America's future. Sincerely,
---
---
Jim DeMint
CPI Chairman
---
|
---
---
---

Washington, DC 20003

But that's just what Politico did recently! That's how successful CPI has become over the last few years. Even liberals are in awe. The headline ran, " Inside the Trump world-organized retreat to plot out Biden oversight." The subject of the article was our two-day training boot camp for congressional staffers tasked with investigating the Biden Administration. The retreat was part of CPI's ongoing mission of teaching young conservatives how to win in a city and a system rigged against them. "Topics discussed at the boot camp included tutorials on obtaining records and deposing and interviewing witnesses," Politico reported... accurately! That's exactly what we covered at Camp Rydin, our new conference center in nearby Maryland, and much more. The article quoted a congressional watchdog group: "I'm not aware of any other group that has held trainings so consistently and for such a wide range of staffers." Yep: that's the point! A Republican establishment lawyer was concerned about CPI inviting conservative staffers to a conference and "coaching them on how to get more aggressive." A left-wing activist said this: "CPI says they're in D.C. to drain the swamp, but from here it looks more like a hostile takeover." We couldn 't put it better ourselves! Non-partisan, establishment, and liberal observers all agree that CPI is reshaping the conservative movement and turning it into the lean, mean fighting machine it needs to be to defeat the Left. Politico may have intended to write a hit piece or expose. But instead, they wrote a 22-paragraph advertisement for CPI -- free of charge! As long as the media is accusing us of fighting Washington, frustrating the GOP Establishment, and infuriating the woke, socialist Left, we know we're doing a good job. With your help, we'll keep up the fight -- and the next profile they write will be even longer! Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to fight for America's future. Sincerely, Jim DeMint CPI Chairman | 300 Independence Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 (202) 742-8988 Tel | (202) 595-0282 Fax Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:

Derek:

There are only 3 days left until the first FEC quarterly fundraising
deadline since Adam launched his campaign for the U.S. Senate, so we have
to ask: Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to pitch in before
our deadline?

If you’re ready to support Adam right now, [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230328_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2010%2E5257348%2EQoqj6L ]chip in a few bucks —
otherwise keep reading.

What if we told you that Democrats are just two votes shy of being able to
abolish the Senate filibuster, which would allow them to pass
transformative legislation for working families? And that Adam would
provide a critical solid Democratic vote?

What if we told you that he was the first member of Congress in history,
who as the lead impeachment manager in a sitting president's Senate trial,
secured a bipartisan vote for a president's removal?

Or that Adam has the singular experience of defending our democracy from a
corrupt and power-hungry MAGA movement and has been relentless in his
efforts to strengthen our democracy for generations to come? And in a
Senate full of Trump acolytes, Adam will be a strong force of opposition
to their right-wing policies?

That for his entire career, he’s been in the middle of the fights for the
very soul of our democracy and the values we share, not sitting on the
sidelines?

What if we mentioned that Adam is on a tour of California, meeting voters
across the Golden State? Plus with your support, we can add more stops and
reach more Californians?

And what if we told you that Adam is doing all of this without accepting a
cent of corporate PAC money?

Are you convinced? We hope so, because in 3 days, when our deadline hits
at midnight on Friday, we want to show the strength of our grassroots
campaign.

Fellow American, You and I know the real reason the Regime is targeting President Trump: he messed up their plans by winning in 2016. He humiliated them. Now they want revenge. **It's time for WE THE PEOPLE to demand that Congress launch a FULL INVESTIGATION of the Regime's outrageous actions!** [**Please support our Turning Point Action grassroots to recruit an army of Precinct Leaders to demand a FULL INVESTIGATION **](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)[**to help EXPOSE the Stalinistic legal scheme against President Trump.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[ Demand a FULL INVESTIGATION](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-WQuSE9ASZ54I8hSqTTg)
---
At Turning Point Action, we're leading the charge to SAVE America through TRUE GRASSROOTS activism. Our dedicated field staff is ON THE GROUND in critical battleground states right now, preparing to WIN BIG in 2023 and 2024. _But Turning Point Action is also keeping a CLOSE EYE on our elected officials and holding them accountable for pursuing an AMERICA FIRST policy agenda -- not America Last!_ [**That's why Turning Point Action is now working hard with a True Grassroots Movement to recruit an army of Precinct Leaders to demand a FULL INVESTIGATION to**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-1b1i1DOGvQnvya_fng)[**EXPOSE the weaponization of our judicial system against President Trump.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) Jim Jordan, James Comer, and Bryan Steil of the House Judiciary Committee are demanding communications, documentations, and testimony from Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg related to his reported upcoming indictment of President Trump. But as the Regime faces NEW SCRUTINY, they're changing their story! **Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg is now BLAMING President Trump, claiming that he "created a false expectation that he would be arrested."** _But if this is true..._ \-- Why the MULTI-YEAR investigation into President Trump? \-- Why impanel a GRAND JURY?
\-- Why set up BARRICADES at the Manhattan criminal court? **The bottom line is simple: the American People deserve REAL ANSWERS into what exactly is happening!** [**It's time to turn the spotlight back on the Regime -- and recruit an army of Precinct Leaders to DEMAND an investigation that EXPOSES the PLAIN TRUTH for the American People.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) With the generous support of patriots like YOU, Turning Point Action has built a NATIONWIDE NETWORK of America-loving activists who help to:
* HOLD ACCOUNTABLE the D.C. Swamp
* RESTORE the role of We the People in our government
* BUILD a massive True Grassroots Movement to WIN BIG for America First in 2023 and 2024

You and I can't count on D.C. Elites -- especially Phony Conservatives -- to keep their word to the grassroots. [**That's why it's now up to grassroots patriots like YOU to speak up in support of Turning Point Action's grassroots army of precinct leaders to DEMAND a FULL CONGRESSIONAL INVESTIGATION to EXPOSE this entire Stalinistic legal scheme to the American People.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[ Demand a FULL INVESTIGATION](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-w59mvAJCn1g)
---
THANK YOU for standing up for JUSTICE and FAIRNESS in our judicial system. Things are moving quickly ... I'll be in touch as soon as I hear more. Please join me in praying for President Trump and for America.
---
Charlie KirkFounderTurning Point Action

subject: If they win in Texas, the country is lost

body:

statewide campaign in Texas – population 30 million. ")
Peter,

.
Democrats are coming at me with everything they've got.
.
**In 2018, I was outspent and outraised 3-1.**
.
In 2024, I believe my Senate race will cost $100 million.

.
I guarantee you there are a dozen Democrat gazillionaires who are looking back at 2018 and saying: _' we came two points away from beating that S-O-B. And next time I'm writing another million-dollar check.'_
.
**Here 's my prediction:** This race is going to be a firefight but we're going to win not only here in Texas but in states like Montana, Ohio, and West Virginia.
.
I am going to be counting on Senate Republicans to help my colleagues and me win next November so we can FLIP the Senate and finally restore some sanity to Washington.
.
We need to raise $1,000 from this email by the end of the day to make sure Senate Republican races like mine have everything we need to fight back against the Democrat gazillionaires.
.
**_[Would you do me the honor of chipping in a small amount of that total right now to help us](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62490741:612mutGNv:m:1:3365131770:9B496FA2041FCFBD56738DE8E2E784E5:r)_**** _[ensure we don 't wind up short? ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62490741:612mutGNv:m:1:3365131770:9B496FA2041FCFBD56738DE8E2E784E5:r)_**
.
** **
For Freedom,

Peter, I’m about to hit my very first End of Quarter Deadline as House Democratic Leader – and it would mean so much to me if you’d split a gift between me and Valerie Foushee.

**This is my first major deadline since becoming Leader. It's critical that we prove our people-powered movement can take on the extreme MAGA Republicans.**

[_**To fend off Republican attacks, I need to come out of my first quarter as Leader with an undeniable foundation of support. The good news is that I only need 1,000 more supporters to step up in these final 3 days to prove we have what it takes to win. Can I count on you to split a gift between me and Valerie Foushee before our critical deadline? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60864129/398465367/527982924?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230328-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGMyOTQ2MC05MmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C1ntt67l_wLdWpCpiXLA0TubIhyP-CLqdHR5UdQT74Y=)

[_Suggested Support: $5 >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60864148/398465396/527982924?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230328-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGMyOTQ2MC05MmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C1ntt67l_wLdWpCpiXLA0TubIhyP-CLqdHR5UdQT74Y=)**
I know it won’t be easy to reclaim the House and bring common sense back to Congress.

**But grassroots Democrats led the charge to defy history and beat back last year’s predicted “red wave.” I know you can help me take back the House.**

But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | = | | Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress Friends of Raja for Congress PO Box 681202 Schaumburg, IL 60168 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| Peter,
**_March 2023 is the first FEC-mandated deadline I’ve faced since
taking office... _**

And since lately some new attack ads came out against me, it’s crucial that we hit our fundraising goal this quarter.
_But because of the lies and attacks, my finance team has made this goal our biggest to date – which means it’s going to be hard work to hit it._

| Since we’re on the topic of what I stand for, I just want to take this opportunity to remind you.
* I am committed to fully funding Medicare and Social Security
* I want to see Americans prioritized by secure borders
* I will fight every day for parent rights in Oregon Schools

_It’s as simple as that. _

I hope you agree with me, because like I said earlier, this fundraising goal is going to be tough to hit.

[_**So please, make your best contribution before the end-of-quarter deadline to help my team hit our biggest fundraising goal to date.**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=7a7a7c3a5c&e=c87c5d8d97)

Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Congresswoman OR-05

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: H.R. 1 -- worst bill of this Congress -- is headed to a vote. This is bad, really bad.
body:
__We need your help |
---

|
Peter, we've have just received word that the House is preparing to vote on H.R.1, what LCV has we've dubbed the Polluters Over People Act -- THURSDAY.

**This could be one of the most important environmental votes this year. The bill combines all of the worst anti-environment proposals from House Republicans into one horrific bill:**__********

A massive increase in oil and gas drilling. Additional pipelines. Slashes to clean energy funding. And it guts the power of communities to push back on projects that affect them -- while blocking Biden from being able to intervene._____****_

_We just can 't let this push through without a fight_ -- **but we need your help.** After months of back-to-back policy fights, LCV's plan to push back against this harmful legislation requires resources we just don't have right now.

A group of donors has put up an emergency triple match fund -- so we're asking:

[Pitch in today. For a limited time, your support will go THREE TIMES as far. That means a gift of just $5 becomes $15 when you give right now.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

| | **
** **League of Conservation Voters
Spring Match Campaign**

**Goal:** $40,000
**Progress:** 65%

**TRIPLE MATCH:** [_ACTIVE -- CLAIM OFFER NOW >>_](https://links.messages.lcv.)
**CAMPAIGN SUPPORTER STATUS:** _PENDING_

[Join our campaign, even $5 gets us closer to our goal >>](https://links.messages.lcv.) |
---|---|---

This destructive bill does not offer real solutions to high energy costs, drives up the deficit, and would lock our nation into **decades of dirty, volatile fossil fuels, perpetuate the climate crisis, and cut communities out of the process, particularly communities of color and low-wealth communities unfairly exposed to the most pollution from fossil fuels.**

The U.S.'s transition to affordable, clean energy is already underway, thanks to the clean energy plan President Biden signed last year. This fossil fuel handout being considered by the House would reverse this progress -- it's the last thing families, communities, and future generations need.

And the truth is, it's likely this dirty bill passes the House. Republicans have numbered this bill "H.R.1" -- a signal that it is their number one legislative priority. With a narrow Republican majority in the House, they likely have the votes they need -- but the Polluters over People Act should be dead on arrival in the Senate.

What happens next _will_ depend on us. We can't let this bill pick up any bipartisan support. We have to ensure it gets blocked in the Senate. That only happens when our movement stands up and says, "No." And that only happens when we have the support of people like you. So please:

[We need your help, %%FIRSTNAME%%. Can you help us reach our $40,000 fundraising goal? A group of donors is TRIPLE matching gifts right now, which means your support of the climate will go 3X as far. Even $5 will help our campaign >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Thank you for joining us in this continued fight.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

---

name: Gen. Don Bolduc
subject: I need tough-as-nails conservatives to keep reading
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SFA Fund, Inc
body:
This is personal for me
| | As long as the liberal socialists are at the helm in Washington, it's the duty of every single grassroots conservative to save our country.

If we stand down in the fight, the government will take control over every aspect of our lives, America will become a socialist welfare state, and our God-given freedoms will be mere privileges.

As a combat veteran, I know the sacrifice required to defend our country abroad, and as a former candidate for the U.S. Senate, I know it takes an army of grassroots patriots to hold the line for freedom at home. _**I endorsed Nikki Haley because she is the conservative fighter with the experience, grit, and heart to win on both of these fronts.**_

Our country is full of tough-as-nails conservatives like you holding the line for freedom, and I'm asking you to join Team Haley today.
| **[**JOIN TEAM HALEY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62489490:678LltGQN:m:1:3331421248:357C003CF29773C8B734C84DDC090BFE:r)**
I've committed my life to serve our nation, and I can't say I've done my best unless I do whatever it takes to recruit you and every grassroots patriot to build the strongest conservative movement this country has ever seen.

[**That 's why I'm on Team Haley, and now is the best time to join me in standing with Nikki to give her a BIG boost of support before she takes the stage in New Hampshire tonight.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62489490:678LltGQN:m:1:3331421248:357C003CF29773C8B734C84DDC090BFE:r)
**[**STAND WITH NIKKI HALEY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62489490:678LltGQN:m:1:3331421248:357C003CF29773C8B734C84DDC090BFE:r)**
Nothing less than our freedom is on the line, and patriots can't wait for 2024 to start getting to work. The battle lines have been drawn in the fight for freedom, and Nikki Haley is leading the charge.

I hope today you'll stand strong and support her as the proven leader and winner needed to take back our country from the radical Left.

To Victory,

General Don Bolduc
**[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62489489:678LltGQN:m:1:3331421248:357C003CF29773C8B734C84DDC090BFE:r)**
---

America can't afford another term of Biden's disastrous decisions and embarrassments.

With our country's security and economy in flames, we need a leader who will disrupt business as usual in Washington and deliver real results for the American people.

_**That leader is Nikki Haley and the race starts now! **_

Team Haley is hitting the ground running by recruiting grassroots patriots like YOU to come alongside Nikki on the road to the White House.

Prove to the Left and the Washington establishment that Nikki has the support of freedom-loving conservatives who are serious about taking back the White House and saving America.
---

**[**JOIN TEAM HALEY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62489489:678LltGQN:m:1:3331421248:357C003CF29773C8B734C84DDC090BFE:r)**

| | Your gift will have a huge impact on what we can accomplish this election cycle. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60865445/398469945/27957066?sourceid=1048820&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2I3ZDU5Ny05NmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WH5SSTHLRsoMD3i7B3ltEVXawM24S9jImlclGL92VMo=&emci=beb7d597-96cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c3b7d597-96cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) Peter,

We have some monumental tasks ahead of us this election cycle: taking back the House, protecting the Senate majority, electing more women governors, and growing our ranks at the state and local level.

And here's the thing: _we_ have the power to decide how this election cycle will play out.

Today, ahead of the** big FEC deadline on Friday**, I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can to support Democratic pro-choice women.

**We checked, and here's how you're listed in our records for the first quarter 2023:** **EMILYs LIST Q1 SUPPORTER RECORD**

**Prepared for:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

**Q1 Donor status:** Not yet. But there's still time! [**Donate to help hit our $175,000 End-of-Quarter goal before Friday.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60865447/398469947/27957066?sourceid=1048820&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2I3ZDU5Ny05NmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WH5SSTHLRsoMD3i7B3ltEVXawM24S9jImlclGL92VMo=&emci=beb7d597-96cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c3b7d597-96cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60865448/398469948/27957066?sourceid=1048820&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2I3ZDU5Ny05NmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WH5SSTHLRsoMD3i7B3ltEVXawM24S9jImlclGL92VMo=&emci=beb7d597-96cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c3b7d597-96cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** I mean it when I say that your contribution will _directly_ impact how many races we win this cycle.

Judicial Watch received previously sealed court documents, including depositions of IRS officials Lois Lerner, the former director of the Exempt Organizations Unit of the IRS, and Holly Paz, her top aide and former IRS director of Office of Rulings and Agreements, which show that they knew most Tea Party organizations were legally entitled to tax-exempt status in the run up to the Obama reelection in 2012. [600x300] [] Jim Jordan Demands IRS Explain Unannounced Visit to Matt Taibbi’s Home [] Source: National Review [] Representative Jim Jordan (R., Ohio) sent a letter to Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen and Internal Revenue Service (IRS) Commissioner Daniel Werfel demanding an explanation as to why the agency deployed federal agents to visit “Twitter Files” journalist Matt Taibbi. Federal agents were dispatched to Taibbi’s residence the very same day that the investigative journalist appeared before the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government, also chaired by Representative Jordan. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] 2022-06-23 Court Orders Release of Testimony of Former Obama Era IRS Officials [] Source: Judicial Watch [] “Lois Lerner’s IRS was abused by Obama and his congressional allies to suppress the Tea Party movement and other opponents in the run-up to his reelection. This is how one steals an election in plain sight,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The Obama IRS scandal was a run-through for the abuse of Trump in 2016 and beyond by Obama agencies and appointees. These depositions of Obama’s IRS officials will help Americans understand the continued clear and present danger of the IRS to our civil liberties.” [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] 2022-09-08 Unsealed Depositions of Former Obama IRS Officials Lerner and Paz Detail Knowledge of Tea Party Targeting [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch received previously sealed court documents, including depositions of IRS officials Lois Lerner, the former director of the Exempt Organizations Unit of the IRS, and Holly Paz, her top aide and former IRS director of Office of Rulings and Agreements, which show that they knew most Tea Party organizations were legally entitled to tax-exempt status in the run up to the Obama reelection in 2012. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] 2015-07-07 Documents Reveal DOJ, IRS, and FBI Plan to Seek Criminal Charges of Obama Opponents [] Source: Judicial Watch [] “These new documents show that the Obama IRS scandal is also an Obama DOJ and FBI scandal,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The FBI and Justice Department worked with Lois Lerner and the IRS to concoct some reason to put President Obama’s opponents in jail before his reelection. And this abuse resulted in the FBI’s illegally obtaining confidential taxpayer information. name: Michael Bennet
subject: Let me tell you about my friend, Brittany Pettersen.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
She’s in a must-win seat, and she needs our support. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60865620/398470571/1390895761?refcode=X_032823_Pettersen_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDExOTRkMi05N2NkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zG1fkjlt4xpdBwT-j3_KenHt8dI2pI9wPmD4i1xP6D4=) Hey there, folks, let me tell you about my friend Brittany Pettersen.** ** I first met Brittany when she worked for me during my very first U.S Senate race. In a historically tough year for Democrats, Brittany made a difference on the campaign trail. She was just getting started. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: One thing we learned from our last campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=86%2E135344%2EGE39Mp)
Friend--
If there’s one thing we learned from our last campaign, it’s that it pays to plan.
Not only was my 2022 election one of the most competitive House races in the country – it was the MOST expensive in the country. Outside groups poured millions of dollars into the race and campaign costs, like the price of ads, skyrocketed as we got closer to Election Day.
We were also running in a much larger geographic area. Following redistricting, we went from running in 2.5 counties to 7 counties. Luckily, we were able to combat the craziness by getting a head start. And when all was said and done, we won that campaign by over 5%, our biggest margin of any race so far.
Why am I telling you this? Because it shows that being prepared and raising funds early helps us succeed and win races by bigger and bigger margins.
Last time around, the size of my district was more than doubled, and now that we’ll be running in all 83 (!!!) of Michigan’s counties, we’ll need to be more prepared than ever.
I know we can replicate this methodological and strategic success again, but we have to start now, which is why we’re asking that folks get involved as early as they can.
[**So what do you say? Can you help us prepare to win by 5% (or more!) again? Chip in $5 today and help us knock this first FEC public filing deadline out of the park. With your help, we can prepare for the craziness that lies ahead.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar23.udOA3N&refcode=em230328-1-30&t=2&akid=86%2E135344%2EGE39Mp)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/564?c0=ebs-em-mar23.4ocKiJ&refcode=em230328-1-30&t=21&akid=86%2E135344%2EGE39Mp)**
---

---

Thank you so much,
Elissa

body:
You’ll be hard-pressed to find someone who cares more and works harder than Brittany. She brings the experience and perspectives that we desperately need in Washington, so I hope you’ll join me in supporting her in this campaign.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60865709/398470936/-1049435140?refcode=email_032823_bennet-pettersen-split&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjg5NzA1NS05OGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgE07N37DJ2JEKjawdjQlB6KX-gBOj1b-mzdhCJ545M=) Hey there, folks, let me tell you about my friend Brittany Pettersen. I first met Brittany when she worked for me during my very first U.S Senate race. In a historically tough year for Democrats, Brittany made a difference on the campaign trail. She was just getting started. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60865711/398470938/414219389?refcode=email_032823_bennet-pettersen-split&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjg5NzA1NS05OGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgE07N37DJ2JEKjawdjQlB6KX-gBOj1b-mzdhCJ545M=) Brittany went on to serve for ten years in Colorado’s state legislature, where she worked every single day to make life easier for hardworking families. At our state capitol, she helped lead the fight to expand early childhood education, lower the cost of health care and prescription drugs, and create more opportunity for every Coloradan. **Now, Brittany is serving Colorado in the U.S. House — in a seat that is crucial for keeping Colorado blue. Friday is her first end-of-quarter deadline of this campaign. # The primary election is almost here and I need your help
I'm out every day connecting with voters and attending events to make sure I understand what is going on in Fort Wayne and to listen to what voters are looking for from the city. But I can only do so much - try as I might I can't visit with every voter - so we need to advertise to reach those voters I don't get a chance to speak with personally.
---
| | [Help Tom Now](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/h8zk_LJghp4NlL9DIEq25ucnhcYpgN-6Hk7ZtqbQiS0=/Ca1cukz2aYNs_Au1UgJvTP5_-_tYp0FTG8cDbKrsGiM= "Help Tom Now")
---
---
We already have our media campaign underway and are in the process of using some new technologies that help us get ads to voters more efficiently, but all of these efforts take money. **Anything you could donate to support my efforts to reach these voters will help me win in '23!** [Click here to make a contribution.](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/h8zk_LJghp4NlL9DIEq25ucnhcYpgN-6Hk7ZtqbQiS0=/Ca1cukz2aYNs_Au1UgJvTBiyZziTncazm2yFI6_hb_U= "Click here to make a contribution.") God Bless,
Tom P.S. - Recurring donations are really helpful because it helps cover our overhead so that any other financial support that comes in can be directed straight to advertising. [Anything you can contribute to my campaign](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/h8zk_LJghp4NlL9DIEq25ucnhcYpgN-6Hk7ZtqbQiS0=/Ca1cukz2aYNs_Au1UgJvTKwxu3arzLzYgpBnstbIq0Q= "Anything you can contribute to my campaign") is very much appreciated!

| **Didier for Mayor Reception** **SAVE THE DATE!
****Wednesday, April 12th** Salvatori's is hosting a reception for my campaign at their Illinois Road location. I hope to see you there! More info: [Contact Rachel Birenbaum](mailto:rachel@simplestrategiesllc.com "Contact Rachel Birenbaum") [Click here to RSVP](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/h8zk_LJghp4NlL9DIEq25ucnhcYpgN-6Hk7ZtqbQiS0=/Ca1cukz2aYNs_Au1UgJvTPPVo3BBN_nGh4ktChjLesA= "Click here to RSVP")

Chestnut Hills Golf Club** Mathew and Lindsey Konkler have graciously agreed to underwrite my golf outing this year. We're going to have a great time, join us! More info: [Contact Rachel Birenbaum](mailto:rachel@simplestrategiesllc.com "Contact Rachel Birenbaum") [Click here to RSVP](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/h8zk_LJghp4NlL9DIEq25ucnhcYpgN-6Hk7ZtqbQiS0=/Ca1cukz2aYNs_Au1UgJvTDcGYrGAU4t1nOkLkJa1xJY= "Click here to RSVP")

Breaking: Christian Elementary School Shooter Confirmed To Be Transgender

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653446%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8Rc4qWSbMSbbGxCnzRJvrg&sysid=1 McCarthy Weighs In On Trump’s Attacks On DeSantis

The Republican Party is currently facing internal divisions as former President Donald Trump has launched a series of attacks against Florida Governor Ron DeSantis. Trump criticized DeSantis’ response to the pandemic, and his stance on crime, and even used mocking nicknames for him during a recent rally in Texas.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653446%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8Rc4qWSbMSbbGxCnzRJvrg&sysid=1

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: If making a financial contribution would make sense for you right now, it would mean the world to me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60876762/398510574/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ12M_FND_E_20230328_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmMxN2ZkNi1iY2NkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RM6Ri26Upwvdvy6cOVAVDE0gjsdgBSvLbkUVDfx3CjI=&emci=27f20d47-b7cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=cfc17fd6-bccd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
---
The first time I ever ran for public office, I had a lot to learn — but one big lesson stood out: In politics, nobody does anything by themselves. And winning an election takes a strong team, built by passionate volunteers and dedicated grassroots donors. In that first campaign, people from all over Massachusetts and all across the country pitched in. That’s how we beat one of Wall Street’s favorite senators. Six years later, that’s how we won re-election. And that’s how we’re launching this new campaign. **If you can become a Founding Donor today — with a contribution of any amount — it would be a way of saying you’re in this fight all the way, from the very start. It would help grow our grassroots movement from the ground up.** **[Please chip in if you can, and become a Founding Donor today. $15 or any amount would go a long way to show that we’re rallying strong support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60876763/398510575/-551446396?refcode=EMZ12M_FND_E_20230328_V1S3&ms=EMZ12M_FND_E_20230328_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmMxN2ZkNi1iY2NkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RM6Ri26Upwvdvy6cOVAVDE0gjsdgBSvLbkUVDfx3CjI=)** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
When a lot of people chip in a little at a time, it adds up to something big.
Grassroots donations make it possible for us to get our message out there and bring more people into this fight.
But they’re also a powerful signal — a signal that we are building a movement with strength in numbers. A movement that’s changing who our government works for. A movement that’s putting power in the hands of working people.
And every Founding Donor sends a message that they’re a part of this team from the very beginning. That isn’t a commitment I take lightly.
**I’m grateful down to my toes for everyone who’s rolled up their sleeves and gotten involved in our campaigns in any way, shape, or form. There are plenty of ways to be a part of this fight. And if making a financial contribution would make sense for you right now, it would mean the world to me.**
[**Can you chip in to become a Founding Donor today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60876776/398510588/-573210340?refcode=EMZ12M_FND_E_20230328_V1S3&ms=EMZ12M_FND_E_20230328_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmMxN2ZkNi1iY2NkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RM6Ri26Upwvdvy6cOVAVDE0gjsdgBSvLbkUVDfx3CjI=)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

clean_body: | | | The first time I ever ran for public office, I had a lot to learn — but one big lesson stood out: In politics, nobody does anything by themselves. And winning an election takes a strong team, built by passionate volunteers and dedicated grassroots donors. In that first campaign, people from all over Massachusetts and all across the country pitched in. That’s how we beat one of Wall Street’s favorite senators. Six years later, that’s how we won re-election. And that’s how we’re launching this new campaign. If you can become a Founding Donor today — with a contribution of any amount — it would be a way of saying you’re in this fight all the way, from the very start. It would help grow our grassroots movement from the ground up. = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = When a lot of people chip in a little at a time, it adds up to something big. Grassroots donations make it possible for us to get our message out there and bring more people into this fight. But they’re also a powerful signal — a signal that we are building a movement with strength in numbers. A movement that’s changing who our government works for. A movement that’s putting power in the hands of working people. And every Founding Donor sends a message that they’re a part of this team from the very beginning. That isn’t a commitment I take lightly. I’m grateful down to my toes for everyone who’s rolled up their sleeves and gotten involved in our campaigns in any way, shape, or form. There are plenty of ways to be a part of this fight. And if making a financial contribution would make sense for you right now, it would mean the world to me. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Adam Frisch
subject: please let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Early resources are critical to building and sustaining a campaign that can meet every voter and win.

---
| Peter,

**[In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign for Congress against Lauren Boebert and Fight for Progress.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60867059/398476415/2053616000?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230328-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhOTAzNjY5LTlkY2QtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JfTy6OdHlbNuPiHmncALASY3gmIpE3vjQc9FsXLm92Y=) But before I do, please let me explain why your support now is so important if we’re going to defeat Boebert in 2024.**

Very few people believed we could win in 2022. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. So when the results started coming in on Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes.

The race went to a recount, and ultimately, after all the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. Ours was the closest race in the entire country.

We did it all with zero support from national Democrats while also being outspent by Boebert’s campaign and her allies.

How? By driving 24,000 miles in my red pickup truck to every corner of the district, showing up, meeting people where they were, and listening to everyone. We put in the work, and people like you who volunteered, donated, made phone calls, etc... You made it all possible.

This time, things are going to get even nastier. I’m sure of it. Boebert’s Super PACs will try to smear me on every TV across the district.

**We can counter their lies and win, but I’m counting on your support now to do it. My team has set a goal of getting 50,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to start strong and defeat Boebert:**

[_**If you’re able to, can I count on you to split a donation right now – no amount is too small – to help us hit our goal and finally kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress? I’m grateful for every dollar you can afford to chip in.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60867060/398476416/2053616000?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230328-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhOTAzNjY5LTlkY2QtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JfTy6OdHlbNuPiHmncALASY3gmIpE3vjQc9FsXLm92Y=)

Early resources are critical to building and sustaining a campaign that can meet every voter and win.

Thank you for everything.

With gratitude -
Adam
---

* * *

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Do you remember it?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
When our movement stands together like I know it can, it all adds up to something special.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=35%2E791427%2EO6hGUj)
**June 5, 2018.**
Do you remember it? I'll never forget it — that was the day we launched our first campaign for Congress. The truth is, I had no idea what to expect.
I knew we had a large number of supporters who would be willing to commit the time and hard work needed to run a campaign of that magnitude, but I also knew that one of the biggest challenges we'd face would be funding a winning campaign.
But because of supporters like you, that was never in doubt. We were able to organize and mobilize our movement in Minnesota's 5th district, fighting off unprecedented right-wing attacks and outside spending along the way.
Two years later, we did it again. And then last year, one more time.
**March 31, 2023.**
That's this Friday — the date of our first official FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign cycle. Once this deadline passes, we're required to publicly report our fundraising numbers.
That's a big deal, especially because once that report is filed, you can guarantee that everyone — our progressive allies, our opponents, the media — will be combing through the receipts to see how we've done.
Some want to know if our campaign has the resources necessary to win again. Others want to know how much outside spending they should flood into Minnesota to try and unseat me.
**$3.**
That's the amount I'm asking you to contribute today. Because every single donation between now and Friday's deadline will go a long way in showing the strength of the movement we're building together.
Are you in?
**[Please make your first contribution — of $3 or anything you can — before our first official fundraising deadline of the year ends this Friday.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-march23.S0C1tq&refcode=em230328-1-30-full&t=2&akid=35%2E791427%2EO6hGUj)**
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/14?c0=io-em-march23.NFCjOS&refcode=em230328-1-30-full&t=21&akid=35%2E791427%2EO6hGUj)
[Express Donate: $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/771?c0=io-em-march23.EPY-4j&refcode=em230328-1-30-full&t=22&akid=35%2E791427%2EO6hGUj)
[Express Donate: $15](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/772?c0=io-em-march23.jvEbQE&refcode=em230328-1-30-full&t=23&akid=35%2E791427%2EO6hGUj)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-march23.RtteqN&refcode=em230328-1-30-full&t=24&akid=35%2E791427%2EO6hGUj)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-march23.G2siDR&refcode=em230328-1-30-full&t=25&akid=35%2E791427%2EO6hGUj)
[Or, donate another amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-march23.S0C1tq&refcode=em230328-1-30-full&t=26&akid=35%2E791427%2EO6hGUj)
I know $3 doesn't seem like the kind of money that can make that big of a difference in a race like this, but when our movement stands together like I know it can, it all adds up.
Thanks for chipping in if you can.
In solidarity,
Ilhan

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=27&akid=35%2E791427%2EO6hGUj)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=35%2E791427%2EO6hGUj)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=29&akid=35%2E791427%2EO6hGUj)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=35_791427_O6hGUj&akid=35%2E791427%2EO6hGUj)**.
Ilhan for Congress

If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: I know $3 doesn't seem like the kind of money that can make that big of a difference in a race like this, but when our movement stands together like I know it can, it all adds up. Thanks for chipping in if you can. In solidarity, Ilhan PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: Official Republican Leadership Notifications
subject: Sorry to bother again, but this really needs your attention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emmer for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | Hey, Peter,

Sorry to bother you SO MUCH but we really need your attention...

Now that we're over a couple of months into our NEW House Majority and have a new class of determined Conservatives, we're eager to have you fill out our _**[Official Republican Leadership Survey.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r "Official
Republican Leadership Survey. ")**_

Look, we've already asked a handful of times, so we're REALLY hoping you will take this by the end of the day for us. Can you promise us that?
_**Please reference the questions below and respond before**5 PM** **_
---
| | | | **OFFICIAL REPUBLICAN LEADERSHIP SURVEY

FOR: _[Peter](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r "Peter")_
SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE BY 5 PM**
---
| |
** 1.) Do you support closing our Southern Border and building the wall?**
---
**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)[**YES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r) _[**NO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)**
---
** 2.) Do you believe that the U.S. should reopen the Keystone XL Pipeline and regain energy independence?**
---
**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)[**YES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r) _[**NO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)**
---
** 3.) Do you think that Joe Biden has weaponized his IRS, DOJ, and FBI?**
---
**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)[**YES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r) _[**NO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)**
---
** 4.) Do you think that our military is strong?**
---
**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)[**YES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r) _[**NO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)**
---
** 5.) Do you believe that Congress and the Biden Administration should END reckless spending?**
---
**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)[**YES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r) _[**NO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)**

** 6.) Do you think that parents should have a say in their child's education?**

** 7.) Do you believe that Communist China should be allowed to purchase American farmland?**

**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)[**YES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r) _[**NO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)**

**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)[**YES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r) _[**NO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)**

** 9.) Do you think that the Federal Government should have unilateral control over digital currency?**

**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)[**YES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r) _[**NO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)**

**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)[**YES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r) _[**NO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62491213:Jbed2tGNH:m:1:3391001263:0CDE3E1AF6431B80834AFFA9F40748E8:r)**

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: I need to know...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | **State of the Union 2023: Biden re-ups amnesty call for illegal immigrants, GOP reps yell 'secure the border'**
**_FOX NEWS_**
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62489579:6msh2tGJN:m:1:3331421248:A20FB2F5BE7F97C626BEF378DF7C1F80:r)
---

**Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**

---
| | [OPTION 2](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62489579:6msh2tGJN:m:1:3331421248:A20FB2F5BE7F97C626BEF378DF7C1F80:r)
---

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62489579:6msh2tGJN:m:1:3331421248:A20FB2F5BE7F97C626BEF378DF7C1F80:r "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

---
| | [REJECT BIDEN'S AMNESTY PLAN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62489579:6msh2tGJN:m:1:3331421248:A20FB2F5BE7F97C626BEF378DF7C1F80:r)
---

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62489579:6msh2tGJN:m:1:3331421248:A20FB2F5BE7F97C626BEF378DF7C1F80:r)
---
Kevin McCarthy
Speaker of the House

---
| |
* * *
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This fight isn’t over. So I’m officially announcing:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I just officially announced that I’m running for re-election in 2024.
| | |
---
Friend,

I just officially announced that **[_I’m running for re-election in 2024_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60877394/398512441/250738360?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2465-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjdiMGJjNi1iZmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e_WkdrF5pbflkjYCk-8V8E88y8pE1Js5R3dx6s4RY48=)**. I never in a zillion years thought I'd be a U.S. Senator. But my life has had a lot of twists and turns, just like a lot of people's.
I grew up on the ragged edge of the middle class. After my daddy’s heart attack, my family came within an inch from losing our house, but my mother got a minimum wage job at Sears that saved our family.

I dropped out of college at 19 to get married, but got a second chance at a public college that cost $50 a semester and got to live my dream of becoming a public school teacher.
I’ve dedicated my career to studying why families go broke and fighting to rebuild the middle class. After Wall Street crashed our economy in 2008, I fought to create the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau to protect people from getting scammed by big banks and corporations. The CFPB has already returned about $16 billion to American consumers who’ve been cheated.
After Senate Republicans vowed to block my nomination to serve as the CFPB’s first director, I went back home to Massachusetts and ran against one of them — and I beat him. I ran to tax greedy corporations, to invest in jobs and our infrastructure, and to rein in student loan companies. And guess what? We got it all done.
**[But the fight to make our government work for everyone — not just the wealthy and well-connected — isn’t over. So I’m running for re-election to keep up the fight. Will you split a donation between Jacky Rosen and my re-election today so I can keep fighting for working families alongside her?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60877395/398512442/250738360?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2465-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjdiMGJjNi1iZmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e_WkdrF5pbflkjYCk-8V8E88y8pE1Js5R3dx6s4RY48=)**
Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=VVfeiXNXccb6uzeQW%2FEQss4ty7WQ%2BB31mz2an%2FVkIldQHnjjNe3p4Jf70eDuBiJe%2FVsfZ7ySeI8wJqTwxJh4zOdBQ6d4wOSXbx4bu1MFIgFYbYc4p7mCcQ0moPC4dv3BZE70tUz9HqB%2B%2BrHMlB0ALE8uCEQJEve%2BqnIrS82APcV%2B2R5%2FeLhzzIlRTWJPBIG9vkr49u5YII9%2BMNeVro82lZx1h%2BHFdIgaoq6ZQYhJbwj5%2FNjZRSYAo8vDVzkkt2299WTsun2PEfLnbu7gJ7viWwmv8IwnUqYIoHoO9OENlhnupQXoTttYZIM%2BVN8CRd9XlZZKc4xQtCCFhehWnDurTFBc3f%2Bm5%2B4y1LyPrqM%2Buwq8jHAVvCt1dJ7qsYVmrLZLUODyIdTFHDtmIF7%2BJVPzjcy9zwBNcjYtE%2FQ3dGTPx%2FA%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

I’ll be honest, folks, it was a tough loss. I was ready to get to work to serve my community. But my opponent defeated me by fewer than 7,000 votes — so I shook off the dust and ran again in 2018. This time, I won, unseating the Republican incumbent who beat me two years before and cementing a Democratic House majority. **It’s thanks to this grassroots team that I won again in 2020 and 2022 — but it wasn’t easy._Our race last November was the most expensive congressional contest in Minnesota history._** It’s deeply important to me to finish the work we’ve started together. My priority has always been listening to the concerns of the citizens I represent and working across the aisle to create stronger communities and an economy that works for every Minnesotan. We’ve done so much to achieve that — helping families and small businesses recover from the pandemic, investing in our country’s infrastructure and passing legislation to cap the cost of insulin at $35 a month and cut costs at the grocery store and the gas pump. So I’m reaching out to you today because I’m counting on your support to help restore our Democratic House Majority. **I was up against millions in spending from special interests and super PACs determined to roll back our progress in 2022, and the attacks from the National Republican Congressional Committee have already started.** **[So much is at stake in this election and anything you give will make a huge difference. name: Ben Wikler
subject: We need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Hi Peter, this is Ben Wikler, Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin.
I understand if you’re short on time, but [it would mean the world if you could read the whole email, learn the true stakes of this election, and consider giving any amount to Pramila's campaign and the WisDems to help elect common sense candidates like Judge Janet Protasiewicz ahead of our election](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230328.mmHt2I&refcode=em20230328-2312&t=1&akid=2312%2E420207%2EmOhDy5) in 7 short days. My team needs your help to bring this race home for candidates like Judge Janet and your support would go far to help meet our $250,000 end of quarter goal.
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230328.mmHt2I&refcode=em20230328-2312&t=2&akid=2312%2E420207%2EmOhDy5)**
**Our fight to elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz keeps me up at night, Peter.** As Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, I’ve talked to people all across the state fired up and ready to flip the Court and elect good progressives like Janet.
I’m so grateful for all of the support we’ve seen in the lead up to this election. Still, I stay awake at night because it might not be enough. In 2019, internal polling showed progressives way up at this point in the race. Then, at what felt like the last moment, far-right groups flooded money in Wisconsin, massively tilting the scales in favor of the MAGA-backed judge. Those vicious attack ads made the difference — we ended up losing in 2019 by just 5,981 votes.
Thanks to Democrats like you — _knocking doors, chipping in whatever they can, and mobilizing their networks to vote for our common sense candidate_ — we’ve built an impressive movement to win in April. Still, MAGA-backed Dan Kelly is bragging that the far-right “cavalry is on the way” to prop up his right-wing extremism in the final 7 days of this election.
**_The fate of democracy in Wisconsin, and the nation as a whole, is at stake._** If far-right extremist Dan Kelly wins, he’ll be the deciding vote against voting rights, fair maps, and abortion access for millions of Americans. With our priorities on the line, I couldn’t live with myself if we sat back and let this election play out just like 2019 did, Peter.
[My team has set an ambitious goal of raising $250,000 to help elect commonsense candidates like Judge Janet Protasiewicz before our end of quarter deadline. Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more to defeat far-right extremism in Wisconsin. There’s only 7 days to go and any amount you give will be rushed to the frontlines! >>](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230328.mmHt2I&refcode=em20230328-2312&t=3&akid=2312%2E420207%2EmOhDy5)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230328.mmHt2I&refcode=em20230328-2312&t=22&akid=2312%2E420207%2EmOhDy5)**
Your immediate support will make a difference. Thank you in advance, Peter.
Ben Wikler
Chair, WisDems

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230328-2312-footer&t=23&refcode2=2312_420207_mOhDy5&akid=2312%2E420207%2EmOhDy5)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2312%2E420207%2EmOhDy5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2312%2E420207%2EmOhDy5)

name: Team DPVA
subject: Our first major deadline of 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Three days left until the deadline.

|

name: Andy Beshear Finance Team
subject: Everyday Kentuckians keep this campaign strong.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Join the growing numbers of Kentuckians committed to making progress for the Commonwealth. Peter,

On Friday, we're facing our first quarterly filing deadline of the election year! Soon our fundraising numbers will be made public, and we know Andy's opponents will look at what we raised to judge the strength of our grassroots campaign.

Since we first reached out about this deadline, Kentuckians from across the Commonwealth have stepped up to help us finish the quarter strongly and send a message that they're ready to help re-elect Andy and protect Kentucky's progress. Check out some of the Kentuckians who have recently given to Andy's re-election campaign: | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60868659/398483310/-163275292?refcode=em23_230328_filng4_fndd_gq_act_dnr_ABFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230328_filng4_fndd_gq_act_dnr_ABFT_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=13359122-a3cd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzM1OTEyMi1hM2NkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M_juUa6hVOWsIo2Z34tUT8rIgusjkNgQr6lmhgonKrs=)

body:
I wanted to send you a quick note |
---
hey team, I wanted to make sure you saw this email from our finance team and send you a personal request before this major deadline. It’s true: This is our moment to show the GOP fundraising machine that we won’t be swayed by their distractions. We can’t show any sign of weakness. Can you chip in today so we can meet this moment? I am so grateful for each and every one of you who pitch in to help us hold Republicans accountable under these extraordinary circumstances. Abortion rights, voting rights, and LGBTQ+ rights are constantly under attack and the path to progress is regaining our House majority. Can I count on you to join this fight and donate before Friday at midnight? Here is a personalized link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-March2023-FR-March?refcode=EricPersonal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60869720/398487055/118020929?refcode=E20741-20230328-EOQ4-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzI5MWQ0MC1hNGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYScLEzDyDgY7Ncr8j2p8YslPftFP7EqI8TFZ_puCI4=) Your support means the world to me,

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: We’ve been blown away by the strength our movement has already shown.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
We’re excited and grateful to announce that a broad group of 40 elected leaders have already endorsed our movement.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=5%2E1163%2E_IdMfc)
Wow. When we launched this campaign for Congress, I knew our community would rally around our shared vision for a stronger East Bay that serves _all_ folks — but we've been blown away by the strength this movement has already shown.
**We're excited and grateful to announce that a broad group of 40 elected leaders have already endorsed our campaign.**
**[I am so thankful for this support-- and now is the time to keep the momentum going. Ahead of our very first end-of-quarter deadline on March 31st, would you chip in any amount to invest in our campaign?](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/44?t=2&akid=5%2E1163%2E_IdMfc)**
**[Donate »](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/50?refcode=em20230328-5&t=21&akid=5%2E1163%2E_IdMfc)**
This movement is about winning representation for all of us in Washington, _and we aren't taking a single vote for granted_. The only way we will win this is together -- by building a powerful, diverse movement across every community in CA-12.
**[If you're able to today, a contribution of any amount-- even $5 -- would help us keep building on this momentum and reach our fundraising goals for the end of the very first fundraising quarter. ](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/44?t=22&akid=5%2E1163%2E_IdMfc)**
I’m so grateful for this team. Onwards!
-- Lateefah Simon
P.S. **[Check out our list of amazing endorsers here!](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/53?t=23&akid=5%2E1163%2E_IdMfc)**

* * *

**[Donate »](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/54?t=24&akid=5%2E1163%2E_IdMfc)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=5%2E1163%2E_IdMfc)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=5%2E1163%2E_IdMfc)

To give by check:
Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,
Oakland, CA, 94612
Email us: [info@lateefahsimon.com](mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com)

body:

| |
---

My team just informed me that your membership status is still **INACTIVE** - and we're running out of membership cards! **[Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b7a7c80ad94a4b50b60293e8e19180bf&_e=uePbh_OLJgOuaBMeRq9Q58T_ONZCB9DYz_-N_4Oz2oCiFhHlejy_KN69A6SJW9mWLzbw8NtvNS48u4KhF2obm1vYF0n9p507ufK_gLfC_yImMfLI3C-j4MbE0HrgmyijrzyNa6WBKbirzycRIMW6-jQI7y3_88vrQb2AD_6yDnsB8Q_1xkYsNA1UJFnpQLypMreyJLTgjrGOUgCVn-MAEtY66ENyiHztSGN3GmYYkKqlOlQAzZfHAWRt3jw3q4Kr6RmG3anK3X4_BEw4zhSJbKn41dEexe359-lZoXClgQpaLgcvy1dCbugNQKPkPNdNUvJPPSk1mGPKyjE1gzTE5aa-MNDdEJmY4NbBExzbWIvZD-CUp1s9bhDbY1GjwvKjFamLjM1vvfTiFDyBzcDwTk8xtE4kUGV6KY0XgBISvLxpIFHAmkUhhi8ZrVAmtCypMAkMZTJs5frWN7Sy42WoCA%3D%3D "Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

This is urgent - Democrats introduced a bill to make Washington DC the 51st state in America... and it's picking up more support than you can believe...

**THEN:** Dozens of top Senate Democrats quickly signed on
**NOW:** Joe Biden is publicly endorsing their plot, giving it the most attention we've ever seen

This is an emergency for Conservatives everywhere. Why? Because it's not about representation or doing what's right - _it 's about power._ If we fail, we'd be handing the Democrats TWO new Liberal senators and AT LEAST one House seat.

_**[Democrats are mounting a coordinated political ambush to force DC statehood on the rest of the country. I have no choice but to ask for your help to stop them. Even though the Democrats are CHARGING AHEAD with their plot, we still have a chance to stop them as long as we move right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62490919:JJbVEtGNe:m:1:3331421248:1ABD682F9229D89BBA12AE7319B75551:r "Democrats are
mounting a coordinated political ambush to force DC statehood on the rest of the country. I have no choice but to ask for your help to stop them. Even
though the Democrats are CHARGING AHEAD with their plot, we still have a chance to stop them as long as we move right now. ")**_
---
| | | [STOP DC STATEHOOD >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62490919:JJbVEtGNe:m:1:3331421248:1ABD682F9229D89BBA12AE7319B75551:r "STOP DC STATEHOOD >>")
---
**Remember - this is the same city that just UNANIMOUSLY voted to lower penalties for: **

- Carjackings
- Armed robbery
- Other violent crimes

That city would be electing TWO new senators and filling at least one House seat. It could shift the balance of power in Washington FOR GOOD. As of right now, we have a razor-thin Majority in the House and a 49-51 Senate.

_If we fail to stop their plot to make DC a state, we can kiss our House AND Senate Majorities goodbye forever! _

_**[The future of our country is at stake. Are you going to help stop Democrats from pulling off this devastating plot? I hope not. We need you with us.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62490919:JJbVEtGNe:m:1:3331421248:1ABD682F9229D89BBA12AE7319B75551:r "The future of
our country is at stake. Are you going to help stop Democrats from pulling off this devastating plot? I hope not. We need you. ")**_

To victory,
Steve Scalise
