name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition: Demand that mainstream media stop normalizing authoritarians
body:
Your name needed
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f8472f7-25c6-4391-b74e-e8759a2ed1fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, During the 2016 election, Donald Trump was repeatedly gifted primetime news and front page print coverage. Journalists and reporters prioritized horserace analysis and reality show-type sensationalism over debunking his lies, denouncing his vitriol, or even simply acknowledging the threat his authoritarian policies would have on our democracy. [**Sign the petition: Tell mainstream media to stop normalizing authoritarians.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7007dddf-1a43-4b34-b79c-c40df05c8d45/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

The coverage catapulted him from a fringe right-wing extremist to a fringe right-wing extremist with access to our nuclear codes and state secrets. It took years of advocacy and activism to remove Trump from office. But now, as his legal troubles grow and the Republican Party seeks a sure thing, we're watching too many journalists make the same damaging decisions in their coverage of Florida Governor Ron DeSantis.

DeSantis wants to be president, and he is using his governorship to inherit, capitalize on, and politicize Donald Trump's hate. He has spearheaded efforts to ban voter drop boxes and set up new roadblocks for vote by mail, gave motorists legal protection if they mow down protesters, pushed authoritarian legislation to silence dissent on and offline, targeted state employees who disagree with him, banned reporters from events unless he could count on positive coverage, and more.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**YOUR NAME NEEDED**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdddd041d-5a10-473b-817e-3f5519b16716/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Mainstream media has largely avoided explicitly naming the danger DeSantis poses to our democracy, instead focusing once again on both-sides coverage and human interest profiles. Journalists covering DeSantis need to make it clear that he is an ideologue with a strong and growing track record of authoritarianism who, just like Trump, uses his position of power to punish his enemies and reward his allies in furtherance of his political goals and without any regard to democratic process.

Trump and MAGA Republicans have taken authoritarianism mainstream. DeSantis aims to enshrine it permanently. Our democracy depends on journalists providing accurate, unvarnished coverage of how radical and authoritarian DeSantis is.

[**Sign the petition: Tell mainstream media to stop normalizing authoritarians.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T283b22f9-5066-4abd-a7f4-00de4c5e7c60/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf5adec81-69f5-4355-8ebf-d99e4e0a6f30/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/mediastopnormalizingauthoritarians-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T51a04889-16bb-4f3c-b9e4-c3da707fdd8e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=d28a824d-30a5-4920-82dd-c40a623e2267&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=d28a824d-30a5-4920-82dd-c40a623e2267&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: Fight or flight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American,

Right now, we’re coming up on one of the biggest challenges of our mission, and I wanted to fill you in on where we stand.

In such important moments, we have a choice: we can run away from a challenge or fight through it.

_**I’m ready to fight, and I know you are too.**_

**Our FIRST FEC end-of-quarter deadline is just days away, and it’s URGENT that we meet our goal. **

With so much on the line next year, we have to meet EVERY DEADLINE until November 2024 if we’re going to take back the Senate.

**[I need your help. We CANNOT give up before the fight has already begun. Pitch in NOW so we can meet this CRITICAL deadline for our campaign!](http://links.gopwin.org/u/click?_t=880bb7f57f984ec39ea5a13773012007&_m=c7493fbcb09c44cca84bd3235f254097&_e=SDOYZSZJwaMQ4zi4a4sVoaFtk5hocMCZ2ZdtCDqEKjV5b8sMSmscDqC3D74gGXZEN4hIKZgKLVvBvFyDkckigemomegw00j2_gUxKxIK-9TJiYWYhHjnYW4Pyty9_0RlWYhKXUMjof4VaJs4GqMW4-Sal7gr1eLfFA0uhR-gUDWgJXwlvi3nPvb5Ko9tq6NIskuAqpoLFnPXkZ-qCO3LaEHipRWWbEMGfiMZ9RYbWOvbMU72MyzPi5bHgztmqv-RkCjgcrxaObtafmGHd3fgXUqx9UcKuLyucLYHW0KsQBLW3k9_XMTV0451TcuRhXdbge2tk9IX-BylKuSU9rZO_ERsdpjWCzn7jS76KoiwF7-Ih-cdHz0oaSXqAUQMTk-JZ8da08AvtHBqZmwr_bWV_Q%3D%3D)**

The Democrats are eagerly watching our numbers, and the second they sense weakness, they’ll unload MILLIONS more to defeat me.

_But if we come through strong, they’ll know that there’s no messing with Missouri._

[**I’m doing everything I can to help us meet this goal, but ultimately, it’s up to you. clean_body: | | | Fellow American, Right now, we’re coming up on one of the biggest challenges of our mission, and I wanted to fill you in on where we stand. In such important moments, we have a choice: we can run away from a challenge or fight through it. I’m ready to fight, and I know you are too. Our FIRST FEC end-of-quarter deadline is just days away, and it’s URGENT that we meet our goal. With so much on the line next year, we have to meet EVERY DEADLINE until November 2024 if we’re going to take back the Senate. Fellow American, if we show up short of our goal, we’re in for trouble. The Democrats are eagerly watching our numbers, and the second they sense weakness, they’ll unload MILLIONS more to defeat me. But if we come through strong, they’ll know that there’s no messing with Missouri. Thank you, Senator Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Barbara Lee
subject: I have an important update [please read this]

**THEN,** Fox News and MAGA extremists wasted no time launching a smear campaign against me to stall my momentum.

**NOW, I'm falling short of what I need to fight back against these extremist attacks and win this race.** **With experts saying I'm already at a fundraising disadvantage, we can't afford to miss a single goal. But with time running out before my midnight deadline, we're on track to fall just short. That's why I need to ask:**

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Tell your Representatives: Make Big Bank Executives testify
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
Tell your Representatives to hold banking executives accountable | |
---
Peter – we could use your help. After the Silicon Valley Bank failure, the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) announced an investigation into the cause. While this is all well and good, **we need Congress to hold public hearings to hold these banking executives accountable for all to witness.** If you have a minute or two **we’re sending letters to tell Congress to subpoena Silicon Valley Bank CEO Greg Becker,** and other CEOs involved in the crash, to testify before Congress on their lobbying efforts, executive compensation packages, and the suspicious timing of their stock sales. [**Tell your Representatives: it’s time to hold big bank executives accountable. Send them a message now >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkVIL9b_UvrMEGhYpeT-jGS8gcMoWFaWLes3AdOPWQrbsO2Yf7S8oAdtVjPsCh7UzFHdRXIpJfeYIarbdfGEc1O3A-xamFiQ2SbsdXbK3EorkWiRSzcut9YtIbinPBGw-hPd3yz_MhydtG61594ltB2HinxqjBqzJvFHbtBLBT2A16s27LyB7nXOV-pU-X_w1w1oaOcCbABLJCPhNPEQEOAFSzklA63E2eX0kAJLtz6515I2B1Roy_i5JRatHMJzzrGb6n-rRdBnWh_OetVVaxVbVTD5wNykVORde4KXo_dFeEjdE2RrbzhP4_cqtgmSZF3Mqf_AIg7GMWV5n86k5JJQpVSBGEfdbdMQSvrvgFRUn3UzEnSWBuc9nxtKfRDRdzzYTdX3aRUKmYSYTnhGzIJadM7aZaVP3SY6mRx2CpUwhdkjSozOQkguQtQIq-HRn0KqjlZfje0k_AqKduditBBljQZoTMNY8Z75BjCEaOWRiPgs8yzif7u6gsPTqu91p-U3joOg27ILcyLxewuwocnrxgcw9PcmeXlEbf3PzlGtC8G-6_cNa97XiraVoxSq2fF5r64XMSyPiidsk6ihZLhXkCQoDjDcZU-4-hJkVCmT6eqvJEt6ZDROv6nROZDgpc/3uv/n2kUvmrzQqyAhjetjZNl7Q/h0/11GmW0oWIeO7ZgMhQtJhLI_ujHzLX5yXOzgdcxq_ieE) Today**,** Kyrsten Sinema had the audacity to show up two hours into a committee hearing on the crash, ready to point a finger at anyone but herself for the SVB failure. Sinema’s Wall Street ties have seriously undermined her ability or willingness to protect Arizonans from a crisis of this kind. **Time and again she voted to protect big banks, Wall Street, private equity, saving them BILLIONS in the process.** Bad actors like Sinema make it harder to avoid these crises **AND** hold its instigators accountable. That’s why we’re **demanding that Congress hold public hearings on the Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank failures.**[**Send a message to your Representatives here >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkVIL9b_UvrMEGhYpeT-jGS8gcMoWFaWLes3AdOPWQrbsO2Yf7S8oAdtVjPsCh7UzFHdRXIpJfeYIarbdfGEc1O3A-xamFiQ2SbsdXbK3EorkWiRSzcut9YtIbinPBGw-hPd3yz_MhydtG61594ltB2HinxqjBqzJvFHbtBLBT2A16s27LyB7nXOV-pU-X_w1w1oaOcCbABLJCPhNPEQEOAFSzklA63E2eX0kAJLtz6515I2B1Roy_i5JRatHMJzzrGb6n-rRdBnWh_OetVVaxVbVTD5wNykVORde4KXo_dFeEjdE2RrbzhP4_cqtgmSZG99c5rDBDebACyh9t2G-O1itaWtd9P41Qe5D8BHhT4u_Hvrnk-M3g6hfJn6o1HQ2snTvybhg44n2A5MVp3Vi_ZtPjpucxTTCA8AAOVGPCTNZaOEsEs2Uheo-LGWnWJTCwUSyvEVMYEbks2BL_2RcyG_ulKTOcwJFskB5Ft2_jR5UbrfQbAeDRi54NApJSLtQcFSi7Jp_L-8bU20qGenbxmymbypTNolrO1rehgWBwQow8PXe50B8bpHjo72EdsJn8EPYslqxQ6HjQ8ngV60jkQdFa7LFKfFxYkmjayKJB9aBeuhcr9U7KpkRb1vsLbsYU/3uv/n2kUvmrzQqyAhjetjZNl7Q/h1/UuVi6A5Eenar0kvG1FHGTNFsIUYzh9vpNGyek0Kpfks) Thanks for all your help, -Replace Sinema PAC & Change for Arizona 2024

name: Maj. Gen. Paul Eaton, USA, Ret.
subject: Weapons of War
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Derek,
Over the course of my career, I was responsible for training thousands and thousands of our soldiers to use and maintain their weapons.
They carried them into warzones, and into combat.
In just about every way that matters, those weapons had the same basic functionality as the assault rifles used in mass shootings across our country. They are weapons of war. That’s the truth.
And at times like these it’s important to tell the truth loudly, without fear. To be heard and seen. So we’re going to try something today.
**[If you donate any amount here, we’ll send you our “Weapons of War” sticker for free.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-mar23-ww.cfwkih&refcode=em230328-2-15&t=1&akid=8117%2E3013755%2EQFHfDo)**
[**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-mar23-ww.cfwkih&refcode=em230328-2-15&t=2&akid=8117%2E3013755%2EQFHfDo)
A sticker might seem small, but it speaks volumes about what we are trying to do. If you own a shop, put it in your window. If you drive to work every day, put it on your car. If you go to the gym, put it on your water bottle.
This conversation has to happen, because that’s the only way we can move ahead.
**[So, one more time, donate any amount — $10, $5, even $1 — here and we’ll send you this sticker for free.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-mar23-ww.cfwkih&refcode=em230328-2-15&t=3&akid=8117%2E3013755%2EQFHfDo)**

Three days from now, our campaign will need to report our first-quarter fundraising totals publicly. Make no mistake: national Republican and outside spending groups will have their eye on our report given Abigail is already a _**top target.**_

I’m reaching out with an important ask: Our crucial March fundraising deadline is in 3 days, so = | = Many consider the year between the midterm elections and the presidential election to be an “off-year” for politics. I strongly believe there is no such thing as an “off-year,” especially with so much at stake for our planet. Scientists are raising the alarm about the devastating consequences of climate change on the horizon if climate action is not prioritized. The good news is this: We have climate champions with a proven record of climate action standing up against the fossil fuel industry, now we have to ensure we elect them at every level of government. That’s Missouri. That’s Lucas Kunce. That’s our movement.
#
Hey Peter — after Lucas reached out about our big end-of-quarter goal last week, thousands of supporters like you chipped in. But now we have just a few days until our deadline, and we’re less than 10% away from hitting it.
**[So if you’re ready to help us elect Lucas Kunce and take Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat back for everyday people, please add your first donation of _any amount_ before Friday’s deadline.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30044?refcode=em20230328-2889&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2889%2E614464%2ENp7jgw) Otherwise, let us give you a few reasons why early support from folks like you is absolutely critical for our grassroots campaign.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30044?refcode=em20230328-2889&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2889%2E614464%2ENp7jgw)**
Not long after Lucas Kunce launched his campaign to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate, top election watchers started paying attention to the movement we’re building in Missouri. **_National Journal_ even called Lucas “one of the Democratic Party’s better offensive targets” in 2024.**
And they’re not wrong. From the moment Lucas got into this race, he’s relentlessly called out Hawley for being a fraud + a coward — and it’s paying off.
Earlier this month, GOP insiders like Tucker Carlson went on cable news and did everything they could to convince viewers that Hawley wasn’t actually a coward for running away from the Capitol on January 6th. And just last week, a new poll showed Hawley facing “intensely negative sentiment” in Missouri.
**So we have a real opportunity to defeat Hawley and flip this seat in 2024... but that doesn’t mean it’ll be easy.** Groups like the National Republican Senatorial Committee are already trying to tear down Lucas + the movement we’re building behind him because they know Hawley is vulnerable.
That’s why it’s so critical we start preparing our campaign right now for whatever shady attacks they throw our way.
We need the resources to continue fighting back, holding Hawley accountable, and getting Lucas’ positive vision for Missouri in front of as many voters as possible early in this race — and support from real people like you _right now_ is the best way we’ll be able to get it done. **So Peter:**
**[Will you add a donation of $10 or more toward our grassroots campaign to elect Lucas Kunce today? After our big FEC deadline this week, we’ll submit our fundraising numbers into the public record — so you adding a donation right now will help us prove to everyone watching our race that our people-powered movement is strong and ready to win.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30044?refcode=em20230328-2889&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2889%2E614464%2ENp7jgw)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30045?refcode=em20230328-2889&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=2889%2E614464%2ENp7jgw) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30045?refcode=em20230328-2889&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=2889%2E614464%2ENp7jgw) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30045?refcode=em20230328-2889&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=2889%2E614464%2ENp7jgw) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30045?refcode=em20230328-2889&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=2889%2E614464%2ENp7jgw) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30045?refcode=em20230328-2889&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=2889%2E614464%2ENp7jgw) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30045?refcode=em20230328-2889&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=2889%2E614464%2ENp7jgw) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30044?refcode=em20230328-2889&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=2889%2E614464%2ENp7jgw)
---
Together, we’re going to defeat Josh Hawley and finally put real working people in charge of our country.
Thanks for being part of it,
Team Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230328-2889-footer&t=11&refcode2=2889_614464_Np7jgw&akid=2889%2E614464%2ENp7jgw)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=2889%2E614464%2ENp7jgw). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Peter Willis,

With just one week until Election Day,
Brandon Johnson is surging in the Chicago Mayor's race, and corporate
Democrats are scared.

We are within striking distance of putting a progressive in the mayor’s
seat, but the establishment is fighting back with big money coming out for
Paul Vallas.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8411?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230328_FR_Chicago_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Chicago&t=1010&akid=4149%2E5885482%2ECwDh5s ]With nearly 100,000 members in Chicago, we can make a huge difference

Progressive Congresswoman Delia Ramirez joined our national call and laid
out the stakes of this race. She said: "This is a unique opportunity for
our progressive multicultural coalition to elect one of our own to the
Fifth Floor."

"This didn't happen overnight, that all of a sudden Brandon emerged to run
for mayor," Delia said. "This is years of local grassroots
movement-building, and now we're in a moment when the soul of a city is on
the line."

Meanwhile, Brandon's opponent is as bad as it gets. Conservative Paul
Vallas is flush with corporate cash and calls himself "more of a
Republican than a Democrat." He also regularly attacks public schools and
takes money from Trump donors.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8411?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230328_FR_Chicago_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Chicago&t=1017&akid=4149%2E5885482%2ECwDh5s ]With just a week left, and the corporate establishment backing Paul

on you to rush a donation?

When we organize, we win.

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: Yesterday’s tragedy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Jacob Kleinrock treasurer
body:
https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]
Peter,
The worst waiting room I’ve ever been in was with the Covenant families in the aftermath of yesterday’s horrific event, as parents waited to be reunited with their children. Nashvillians did what we always do; the police, counselors, pastors, volunteers, and school community rose to the occasion and supported one another with safe reunification processes, hugs, water, counseling, and love.
There have been 367 school shootings in this country since Columbine, when so many Americans said “never again!” What does it say about our society that we won’t move swiftly and decisively to prevent 9 year-old children from being gunned down on any regular school day?
My heart goes out to everyone impacted by the horrific act. The lives of families, friends, colleagues, classmates, and so many more have been irredeemably altered by the shooting. Our entire community feels less safe in the aftermath.
Things do not have to be this way.
Around the world, these events are much less common than they are in the U.S. The common denominator in all of these shootings is guns. It is beyond time to ban assault weapons and pass red flag laws.
Unfortunately, the controlling party in our state refuses to stand up for what’s right. Instead, they are doing the exact opposite by trying to expand permitless carry in Tennessee to younger and younger people and allow teachers and faculty in our schools to carry guns. If more guns made us safer we’d be the safest country on earth. Easy access to guns is the problem, not the solution.
In the past few days I’ve spoken to several media outlets about gun control. [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1X0pZ0flLOeAOywxcXmN8Jb9ifNyZ2Gdh/view] Despite our acrobatic maneuvering around the issue, we’re not going to see meaningful reform until we elect representatives who aren’t beholden to the NRA, and who are courageous enough to pass common-sense gun reform legislation.
While we continue to mourn the tremendous losses, we must acknowledge that it is beyond time to take back our schools and neighborhoods from gun violence. Please do everything you can to get out the vote in Tennessee — democracy is hard work.
Heidi Campbell
https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn [https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn] https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN [https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN] https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/ [https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/]
Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Jacob Kleinrock treasurer.
Campbell for State Senate
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: this is a big deal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230328_bigdeal_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230328_bigdeal_logo] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230328_bigdeal_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230328_bigdeal_logo]May I have just a second of your time, please?
In just a few days, my campaign is required to publicly report how much money we’ve raised for the quarter.
This is a big deal.
Pundits will use the number as a bellwether of our campaign’s strength. With Republicans in the House Majority and campaign experts predicting a tough cycle for Democrats, it’s imperative that we show strength - especially in the first quarter of the year.
Here’s why I’m reaching out: we pulled the numbers and to be blunt, we are a bit behind. We can recover, but I do need to ask you for $10 today, before this hole gets worse. Can I count on your help? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230328_bigdeal]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$15 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230328_bigdeal&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode2=EL15] $30 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230328_bigdeal&express_lane=true&amount=30&refcode2=EL30]
$75 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230328_bigdeal&express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode2=EL75] $150 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230328_bigdeal&express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode2=EL150]
$300 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230328_bigdeal&express_lane=true&amount=300&refcode2=EL300] OTHER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230328_bigdeal&refcode2=ELother]
I know your money is hard-earned, and I don’t make this ask lightly. I’m so grateful for anything you can give.
All my best,
Lisa
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230328_bigdeal_bio&refcode2=biobox&recurring=1]

name: AOC, Ayanna, Cori, Ilhan, Jamaal, and Rashida
subject: A message from the Squad Victory Fund
body:
|
#
Hi Friend — AOC, Ayanna, Cori, Ilhan, Jamaal and Rashida here! If you haven’t already heard, all six of us are gearing up to meet a very important deadline at the end of the month. The Federal Elections Committee (FEC) first quarter fundraising deadline is _this Friday,_ friends, and we’re hoping to reach our goal of raising an additional $25,000 before the clock strikes midnight. Reaching this goal, for the first time as a newly expanded Squad, would show our opposition the true strength of our movement — and make clear that we aren’t going anywhere. But we can’t do this without you. If you’re ready to join in on the action and support our Squad right now, please consider making a donation of any amount to help us close the gap on our goal and kick off Q2 in the strongest position possible. **We’ve even provided you with your very own personal link so you can make your donation as soon as possible:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/svf_rashida_20230328?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAkbv604ii7iWDhqN-sqSVxltxDgANRby6zX8SZ7l-vgapov8WUWn6e42w2xpfAbnu24UEUQEF3o93dRjxFVzDZyWTNDobUIi8uhbtINiGuxF5xa997KRnzvXpBi5BxZ-ScG2kmWXeMaiqflcmh-Ya_RJUvYMsUpjveRy474of6zPzuY4E_Qc9tGJfqR9-ZOttYTxByUrro1PaRmCCz17eo4Mat0CZcYUARE_uKW25Wc5PjeHoX1ryOdO-5vk2KwElTowDe5FraCzqkJ33TyM64zG7GD-LwxcnWJ7waaT_iwWvo5qTKc2hgypKo_DorU5DueyjANWESfB8y-N26H_c/3uv/HYPqviJyTQ-l-sHrbfmusA/h0/xczNSHRdoDjpZgkVHW8Aga2ZuiYqouh6AeDGPyKaFnM) We’ve grown so much since our Squad first got to Congress in 2018. And we know that, with you on our side supporting each and every one of us, we’ll be able to accomplish even more in the future. But the truth is, we need to ensure we have the resources, tools, and funding to keep pace with our collective vision. And we’ll need all the support we can get if we want to keep advancing life-changing policies in Congress. The full strength of our Squad is undeniable, folks. And our opposition knows it — that’s why they’re gearing up to throw everything they have into unseating us and diminishing our progressive power. **Let’s make sure that doesn’t happen.** A contribution from you today — before our end-of-quarter deadline — will help boost our campaign resources, show the true strength of our movement, and keep us on the path to victory. **So, if you stand with us, please use the personal link below to make a contribution to our movement today.** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/svf_rashida_20230328?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAkbv604ii7iWDhqN-sqSVxltxDgANRby6zX8SZ7l-vnlGO_YJE5__thpnCqHDQFQVZyaOG5TSGoFuaHAOH0mV27RMpERLzmcp3LTK_DItc7-PbjKN_bvcCRD0fG4dcyDxapgBOfxcmgBiV7BDR0VvYJQ_3-UhSubImTzlojxG3LIc3x8wpw-wLsbaubrUE0EZVUeLa3qVxvUi8GerJ1k7hFuE5VvzJ_-vtVsgHrZF0BfkEi_YWGdE7dhTjqlt6lCbDKBAsCnjyo8PZSEkAqeg5TTsn8gTpmCHhsxSTiqVAYLJvIVqRizt-20M6IK3-d3KhatOUiRxgHA0fm6omFO-/3uv/HYPqviJyTQ-l-sHrbfmusA/h1/cpN9vYZhQdIQJz9asVj7D5NrM0YtAPKEU4AI9yPo4yk) Thank you for your continued belief in the work we’re doing together. Without you, none of this would be possible. Together, Alexandria, Ayanna, Cori, Ilhan, Jamaal, and Rashida
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GnKI0fM0KtfTscqMkSgl4-Yb8AlKSXB0S3XfwRFMBVyB1zD9t1zEcoWhu9QULx9-bf8YVNZ-xUdxZLD9zpIzAzDUodeSD7bVKodR4SC7kKihpY_5fNzGKWpLFInZR0_Y_PwDWJpUHqC20FfZubYQTDrCOe9ZFkXYe1KXtZjIfNSR03L5mJrQWCK02jn9Vqzcn8wsaFWrK9oSLw94ARR23tEVS1Yk47V1_bRiYSxeoI6rMwstaeq1n5T9fC-QLWc5NbIPA1r7Qsf9WgBN0Oi_lVjqbTR3OZpUUZPWmm2NZCzDKIUQzpo_bLZe0FZaIdnxLP1h_OZiiaElvTSV_Rh1e4j6NfCdZlsoUTDkHctzqbMKYff7NSjs27uFE31oNVFPY/3uv/HYPqviJyTQ-l-sHrbfmusA/h2/DqaepcZSTUTMdqMMGkH9PbGjzu05KnOsGWya3TTuORA) | Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, and Bowman for Congress.
---

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 10% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, and Jamaal Bowman for Congress.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Cori Bush for Congress, and Jamaal Bowman for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003
Email us: [info@squadvictoryfund.com](info@squadvictoryfund.com?link_id=3&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-a-message-from-the-squad-victory-fund-2&email_referrer=email_1861775&email_subject=a-message-from-the-squad-victory-fund)
| | Sent via [ActionNetwork.org](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/O93kI8o-kT9cRvZ9zJLPP860qXFcvweDHZkUEJZuK-c/3uv/HYPqviJyTQ-l-sHrbfmusA/h3/bXfkDizm0hEIFitoJhC8GKzlG4ZME0v-g2PY6UiQtMg). To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please [click here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GnKI0fM0KtfTscqMkSgl4-Yb8AlKSXB0S3XfwRFMBVyB1zD9t1zEcoWhu9QULx9-bcd9z7lvJnwEdzUwYLCMPLB1n9MIJENj13xav_MFISoO2KYPlT_7awDy0H1_lM2mYawzuLEESoxTpIWDemCY4QEQXOh0XU_ty0MePnynVL9GIWxJ7SwJZDflcw7J8hlgO/3uv/HYPqviJyTQ-l-sHrbfmusA/h4/yX_RNGVJ894pPP1mJcupvLYEW2r6e_3Rac4HMhyO_Pg).

name: DC STATEHOOD ALERTS
subject: For your eyes only
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
Democrats are finalizing the next phase to expand their Senate Majority by making DC the 51st state, guaranteeing them TWO more Liberal Senators!

At the end of every quarter, we have to _**publicly**_ report how much we’ve raised. FEC quarter deadlines help us budget for events, community outreach, and staff while showing the strength of Linda’s grassroots network.

_We’ll keep it real with you:_ This quarter has not been great for our fundraising numbers. **But we know we can get back on track.**

With the recent BOLD PAC news, Linda is poised to become one of the most influential members in the House as she seeks to support Latinos and Latinas running for Congress next cycle. That means Republicans will be on the lookout for Linda and our district. _**That’s why posting strong fundraising numbers is vital.**_ [_**Can we count on your support with a $10 contribution today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60872864/398497435/-898182101?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230328-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjc2ZGU0ZS1hZWNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A48LXqXPjZC8_YU_97VfPlCrUnTlYrT_RV_tRLyB4ZA=)

Peter, Adam Frisch is running again to defeat Lauren Boebert in Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District — and he needs our help to win. **[Before I explain more, will you split a donation to Adam’s campaign and mine ahead of Friday’s FEC end-of-quarter deadline to help us fight back against MAGA Republicans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60873107/398498039/-810497157?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230328_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGM0ZWExOS1hZmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ilVQJ1nM2AG5d3jUoFBh3wcEvbtQ4uHe8IB__lqp1I=)** When Adam ran against Lauren Boebert last year, he came **just 546 votes** of defeating her — _the closest race in the country._ And he did it all while being massively outspent by Boebert and her dark money allies. Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ only gave Adam a 3% chance of winning. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60873108/398498040/-810497157?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230328_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGM0ZWExOS1hZmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ilVQJ1nM2AG5d3jUoFBh3wcEvbtQ4uHe8IB__lqp1I=) Peter, you are the last people I need to remind about how dangerous Lauren Boebert is. From trafficking in QAnon-conspiracy theories, to egging on January 6th insurrectionists and spreading misinformation about COVID vaccines, she is simply unfit to serve. Now, Adam is all-in to defeat Boebert in 2024, and support from folks like you — who care as deeply as I do about defending our democracy and the rule of law from extreme, lawless MAGA Republicans — can push him over the edge. clean_body: Adam Frisch is running again to defeat Lauren Boebert — and we can help him win. | Peter, Adam Frisch is running again to defeat Lauren Boebert in Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District — and he needs our help to win. = When Adam ran against Lauren Boebert last year, he came just 546 votes of defeating her — the closest race in the country. And he did it all while being massively outspent by Boebert and her dark money allies. Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of winning. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes! = Peter, you are the last people I need to remind about how dangerous Lauren Boebert is. From trafficking in QAnon-conspiracy theories, to egging on January 6th insurrectionists and spreading misinformation about COVID vaccines, she is simply unfit to serve. Now, Adam is all-in to defeat Boebert in 2024, and support from folks like you — who care as deeply as I do about defending our democracy and the rule of law from extreme, lawless MAGA Republicans — can push him over the edge. In a race like this, early support will go a long way toward building the campaign Adam needs to reach every voter across the district. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Frisch and Dan Goldman will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60873154/398498188/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjRkNzY1OS1hZmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=APMYUTpUnzMcQDSf3wF6djU7yfUNFsWmDH7BZeK1yGU=&emci=e53371d8-8dcd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7b4d7659-afcd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) | Friend, In just a few short days we’ll come to the close of Q1 of this year. It’s hard to believe we’re already here, but in just the last 3 short months, extremist officials have made it painfully clear they are willing to do whatever it takes to pass their private agendas. **So, 2023 is gearing up to be the year where we fight back.** Don’t get us wrong — every year, every election cycle, our team is fighting the good fight: Where we need to bring litigation, we litigate. Where we can stop bad laws from being passed, we run aggressive campaigns to stop anti-democratic bills. And where the legislature refers suppressive measures to the ballot, we fight to win those ballot campaigns. **But this year especially, we are seeing more attacks on the ballot measure process than ever before — attacks that are the _opposite_ of what voters want to see happen. [_So, to close out this quarter strong and prepare for the fights ahead, we’re setting a goal to raise $10,000 to stop these attacks in their tracks. Will you rush a donation before March 31 at midnight to help us fight back, friend?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60873155/398498189/-2083520419?refcode=E20748-20230328-EOQ1-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjRkNzY1OS1hZmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=APMYUTpUnzMcQDSf3wF6djU7yfUNFsWmDH7BZeK1yGU=)** [DONATE NOW →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60873156/398498190/-2083520419?refcode=E20748-20230328-EOQ1-SB-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjRkNzY1OS1hZmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=APMYUTpUnzMcQDSf3wF6djU7yfUNFsWmDH7BZeK1yGU=) Just last week, the Mississippi state legislature threw out legislation that would have restored the state’s ballot measure process. 2 years in a row now, the state house has refused to reinstate the use of voter-driven ballot measures — a punitive move after voters had passed a marijuana legalization measure in 2021 — _even though 72% of Mississippi voters want to see their ballot measure process reinstated._ **Now more than ever, we are seeing elected officials act in stark contrast to the needs of voters. So, we’re fighting back. clean_body: | | Friend, In just a few short days we’ll come to the close of Q1 of this year. It’s hard to believe we’re already here, but in just the last 3 short months, extremist officials have made it painfully clear they are willing to do whatever it takes to pass their private agendas. So, 2023 is gearing up to be the year where we fight back. Don’t get us wrong — every year, every election cycle, our team is fighting the good fight: Where we need to bring litigation, we litigate. Where we can stop bad laws from being passed, we run aggressive campaigns to stop anti-democratic bills. And where the legislature refers suppressive measures to the ballot, we fight to win those ballot campaigns. But this year especially, we are seeing more attacks on the ballot measure process than ever before — attacks that are the opposite of what voters want to see happen. = = Just last week, the Mississippi state legislature threw out legislation that would have restored the state’s ballot measure process. 2 years in a row now, the state house has refused to reinstate the use of voter-driven ballot measures — a punitive move after voters had passed a marijuana legalization measure in 2021 — even though 72% of Mississippi voters want to see their ballot measure process reinstated. Now more than ever, we are seeing elected officials act in stark contrast to the needs of voters. So, we’re fighting back. In every state and in every way possible.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, = Kelly Hall Executive Director Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . This could be one of Democrats’ most important battles of the entire _year_. Let’s break down what exactly is going on.
After a primary last month, liberal Janet Protasiewicz is facing off against extreme right-winger Dan Kelly for an open Supreme Court seat in Wisconsin. **The winner of this election will be a deciding vote in critical issues like voting rights, abortion, and redistricting.**
**This could be our best shot in over a decade to build Democratic power and safeguard our freedoms in a swing state that’s long been gerrymandered to give Republicans an unfair advantage.**
But the GOP is flooding the state with resources – in this race alone, election-denying groups have poured in _nearly $4 million_ to swing this race in their favor, and Wisconsin Republicans just announced a massive fundraising haul.
We have one thing Republicans don’t: An empowered team of dedicated grassroots supporters who are ready to mobilize to get the job done and support Democrats in the states. **That’s you.**

* * *
**THE WIN:** Yesterday, Governor Cooper signed Medicaid Expansion into law.
Roy and NC Democrats worked hard despite years of partisan gridlock to ensure that North Carolinians can access the quality health care coverage they need and deserve. They championed Medicaid Expansion to keep our neighbors healthy, bring jobs to our state, open rural health care centers, and save NC money.
**Without Roy’s decade-long fight to expand Medicaid, which has been his top priority as governor, this deal wouldn’t have happened. And Roy and his Democratic allies wouldn’t be here without YOU.**
**WHAT’S NEXT:** Roy is focused on helping NC Democrats win in next year’s critical elections.
We need to elect Democrats at every level of government to continue making progress and advancing our priorities. Meanwhile, if Republicans take over our state, they’d push through a dangerous agenda that would take us backward.
Peter, we know there’s more progress to achieve for our communities, and we can only achieve it with elected leaders who will fight for us. Roy will continue to support Democrats across the state, but he can’t do that without your help.
**[We need to raise an additional $20,000 by 11:59 pm Friday to meet our team’s needs and have the resources to devote to other NC Democrats. clean_body: We need to elect more Democrats to keep our progress going. | Peter, this month, Roy delivered a HUGE win for North Carolina, and we want to tell you what we need to do to keep up the progress... but first, we have a quick request to make: = | = THE WIN: Yesterday, Governor Cooper signed Medicaid Expansion into law. Roy and NC Democrats worked hard despite years of partisan gridlock to ensure that North Carolinians can access the quality health care coverage they need and deserve. They championed Medicaid Expansion to keep our neighbors healthy, bring jobs to our state, open rural health care centers, and save NC money. Without Roy’s decade-long fight to expand Medicaid, which has been his top priority as governor, this deal wouldn’t have happened. And Roy and his Democratic allies wouldn’t be here without YOU. WHAT’S NEXT: Roy is focused on helping NC Democrats win in next year’s critical elections. We need to elect Democrats at every level of government to continue making progress and advancing our priorities. Meanwhile, if Republicans take over our state, they’d push through a dangerous agenda that would take us backward. Peter, we know there’s more progress to achieve for our communities, and we can only achieve it with elected leaders who will fight for us. Roy will continue to support Democrats across the state, but he can’t do that without your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you for all you do for our state! After the FEC deadline, we have to publicly report our final fundraising numbers. Democrats and Republicans will all be looking at these numbers to decide how important our race is. If we raise enough, others are more likely to invest in our race and we could potentially deter Republicans from challenging us in 2024.

But if we raise too little, they will see it as a sign of weakness and increase their aggressive attacks on us. **In fact, we know that the National Republican Congressional Committee, or the NRCC, is having conversations with donors about how much we spent to defend this seat in 2022 – and they know that our resource pool is currently smaller than what we need.**

Though the election may seem far away, there’s so much we have to do before then to ensure we’re able to successfully defend my seat. **That’s why meeting every fundraising goal and deadline – especially this FEC deadline – is extremely important for my campaign.** [_**So, can I count on you to chip in $3 (or more!) today? clean_body: Though the election may seem far away, there’s so much we have to do before then to ensure we’re able to successfully defend my seat. | = | Peter, In a moment, I’m going to explain why it’s so important for us to meet our goal before the FEC deadline, but with just three days left, I have to ask: = | = | = After the FEC deadline, we have to publicly report our final fundraising numbers. Democrats and Republicans will all be looking at these numbers to decide how important our race is. If we raise enough, others are more likely to invest in our race and we could potentially deter Republicans from challenging us in 2024. But if we raise too little, they will see it as a sign of weakness and increase their aggressive attacks on us. In fact, we know that the National Republican Congressional Committee, or the NRCC, is having conversations with donors about how much we spent to defend this seat in 2022 – and they know that our resource pool is currently smaller than what we need. Though the election may seem far away, there’s so much we have to do before then to ensure we’re able to successfully defend my seat. That’s why meeting every fundraising goal and deadline – especially this FEC deadline – is extremely important for my campaign. = | = | = Thank you, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. | Dear Peter,

We are just four days from our first End of Quarter Deadline! This is a crucial deadline to show our strength as we close out this fundraising quarter!
---
| [Help Jen Finish the First Quarter Strong! >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=d448e81e91&e=4955722b3e "Help Jen Finish the First Quarter Strong! >>>")
---
| Representing you in Congress has been one of the greatest honors of my life, but it’s also been pretty eye opening... Having been here in D.C. for almost three months now I’ve seen how real this fight actually is!

From protecting our military, to serving our veterans, to preserving our Constitutional freedoms, we need a Republican majority in the U.S. House to right the ship. We saw last November, the majority runs through the Second District and I need your help today to keep me in the fight!
---
| [Help Keep Jen in the Fight! >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=6922d64257&e=4955722b3e "Help Keep Jen in the Fight! >>>")
---
| I am committed to fighting for you, and I am proud to have the support of Americans like you. With your help, I can continue to stand up for the issues that matter most to our community, from healthcare and education to job creation and public safety.

[**Can you please consider making a donation today?**](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=477d2759a9&e=4955722b3e) Your support will make all the difference in helping me to meet my fundraising goals and stay in the fight.

Thank you for your continued support!

With gratitude, Jen Kiggans

body:
Check-out our first round of endorsements for this cycle! | | | Hey, Peter – we wanted to share the exciting news with you as soon as it came out. United Rural Democrats is proud to share with you our first endorsement slate of the 2023-2024 election cycle. We're offering these candidates our endorsement and support as they campaign to represent rural areas in their respective districts. **This election cycle will determine the fate of abortion rights, voting rights, election integrity, education funding, and countless other critical issues.** We need to make sure that leaders who will bring honor, integrity, and political change to rural areas are elected. **URD-Endorsed Candidates for 2023-2024:** | Ben Litchfield | VA State Senate (District 27)
---|---
Gov. Andy Beshear | Governor (KY)

Sen. Jon Tester | US Senate (MT)
Lucas Kunce | US Senate (MO)
Commissioner Brandon Presley | Governor (MS)
Councilman Robert Zeigler | Centre County Recorder of Deeds (PA)
These races represent some of the most hotly contested, battleground races in the country. Republicans have already begun a ruthless campaign against us.
**_[We can't support these candidates alone. Will you chip in $10 or more to elect Democrats in rural areas and protect the rights of rural voters?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gc4Rw4YgG9NMy88fD7EBxMEVoAaHp1kgNljtq3flabXKj2BZu4Oh0PydepwYs7EnpGqXb-SSTqCGr7Hy3UKZ6g7L71yPJx9S-RuXfxjTUna1MxoSPr2rjqr9NJDvPeO8WAA6yokSi8XZlAtuqDvkCzCRUbWLbnmll7FNjr9JnZfEjnp7b13ccLITjqBCHfPIMZYlimgGU3ljLpAF98Ks_mWoctv9pb4j9vgpNRsDCNvPS6GCogRo2aui7AjHNcLdob1wttTmMw1_SQ8u3pFiugaA6Pbh8dFHTEB211bDkM7A4tOp0RFzOHT8fDhFBmokPCtqZhZhQ3kFTmTHonxBKS1Q/3uv/hdWNSqSLSWOHLw081Z_hPQ/h0/JGVPyKYBzrBEnKimyz2w8RMDXtmtq8qj3MTIeT_ofas)_**

clean_body: Check-out our first round of endorsements for this cycle! | | | Hey, Peter – we wanted to share the exciting news with you as soon as it came out. United Rural Democrats is proud to share with you our first endorsement slate of the 2023-2024 election cycle. We're offering these candidates our endorsement and support as they campaign to represent rural areas in their respective districts. This election cycle will determine the fate of abortion rights, voting rights, election integrity, education funding, and countless other critical issues. We need to make sure that leaders who will bring honor, integrity, and political change to rural areas are elected. URD-Endorsed Candidates for 2023-2024: | Ben Litchfield | VA State Senate (District 27) ---|--- Gov. Andy Beshear | Governor (KY) Sen. Jon Tester | US Senate (MT) Lucas Kunce | US Senate (MO) Commissioner Brandon Presley | Governor (MS) Councilman Robert Zeigler | Centre County Recorder of Deeds (PA) These races represent some of the most hotly contested, battleground races in the country. Republicans have already begun a ruthless campaign against us. Thank you for supporting Democrats in 2023-2024 — URD HQ United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

subject: Look at all that we accomplished together, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
Peter, in a moment, **[_ I'm going to ask you to rush an end-of-quarter donation to activate your Team James Membership and power _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60874754/398503695/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1017-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGI0YmE5OC1iNGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4uVu22x_CTURvoiIA3WJP4QY4tzZpndIDhO9mveloNA=)****[_ our fight for progress _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60874755/398503696/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1017-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGI0YmE5OC1iNGNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4uVu22x_CTURvoiIA3WJP4QY4tzZpndIDhO9mveloNA=)**, but first, I wanted to reflect on the first few months in my second term as attorney general.
**This year, we took a stand for the voiceless and vulnerable together. Here are just a few things we were able to accomplish with your support:**
* I won $1.1 BILLION for New York State from three massive distributors and manufacturers of opioids that was then invested into communities ravaged by the opioid epidemic.
* I joined and led coalitions to fight for the rights of LGBTQ+ people in _every_ state, including Texas, Florida, West Virginia and more.
* I fought to hold the gun manufacturers and sellers accountable for their role in the gun violence epidemic.
* I vowed to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking abortion and even called for the creation of an abortion fund – which would be accessible to people from all states.

This year, we took a stand for the voiceless and vulnerable together. Here are just a few things we were able to accomplish with your support: I won $1.1 BILLION for New York State from three massive distributors and manufacturers of opioids that was then invested into communities ravaged by the opioid epidemic. Hey folks, Jon Tester here.
I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.
**I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and damn proud of it.**
Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet.
**These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race:**

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Are you on these other email lists?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
It’s that time of the year where campaigns get increasingly desperate. Here’s why we’re different.
#
Are you on other political email lists?
If so, you probably regularly receive urgent and panicky emails asking for money — especially right now at the end of the quarter. Too many politicians and organizations see their grassroots supporters as an ATM machine. They use scare tactics, guilt and shame, and downright misleading language to coax people into donating.
It’s bad, and getting worse. Team AOC is determined to rise above that and treat you and our other grassroots supporters with respect. Here’s what we believe:
* Instead of scaring you to donate, we want to inspire you to take action.
* Instead of guilt tripping you for not donating enough, we want our emails to provide value to you. We try to send out informative, educational content.
* Instead of misleading you about fake 5X matches or faux threats, we’re honest with you about what’s going on and how you can help.
* Instead of only hitting you up when we need money, we’ll also send you opportunities to volunteer or help other candidates and causes who need it.

**But just like all the other campaigns in your inbox, we do have fundraising goals and deadlines.** Everything we raise each quarter is detailed in our public FEC report, and we want to post the biggest possible fundraising numbers. But we’re not going to scare or scam you into donating. We’ll just ask nicely because your donations to AOC are important and meaningful.
[**Would you be able to make a $3 donation to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez right now to help us hit our end-of-quarter goal? We’d really appreciate it.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230328-2.4Mw-c4&refcode=em20230328-4050-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4050%2E2526796%2EOBbgYL)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230328-2.4Mw-c4&refcode=em20230328-4050-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4050%2E2526796%2EOBbgYL)**
If you can’t make a donation today, that’s okay too. We still want you here, and we still appreciate you reading our emails.
The truth is that this email list is powerful. It’s powerful precisely because you’re here with so many others. It’s powerful because when so many of us take collective action all at once, we can make real change.
So, maybe you can’t [**donate right now**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230328-2.4Mw-c4&refcode=em20230328-4050-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4050%2E2526796%2EOBbgYL). But maybe you’ll get something of value from the next email we send. Or perhaps you’ll join us for a volunteer activity down the road.
No matter what, we’re glad you’re here. Thanks for being part of this movement,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230328-2?refcode=em20230328-4050-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&t=22&refcode2=4050_2526796_OBbgYL&akid=4050%2E2526796%2EOBbgYL)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230328-4050-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&t=23&akid=4050%2E2526796%2EOBbgYL)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=4050%2E2526796%2EOBbgYL) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=4050%2E2526796%2EOBbgYL) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=4050%2E2526796%2EOBbgYL)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=4050%2E2526796%2EOBbgYL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=4050%2E2526796%2EOBbgYL)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

Fellow American, Candace Owens here – and I’ve got exciting news. **BLEXIT -- the nonprofit I founded to free minorities from the Left’s victimhood mentality, or “plantation of the mind” -- is joining Turning Point USA!** Alongside my friend Charlie Kirk, the Turning Point USA team, and grassroots patriots like you, I am ready to: _Defeat_ toxic and racist Leftist ideologies like Critical Race Theory – getting them out of our kids’ classrooms forever, _Free_ black Americans and all minorities from the tyranny of the Left's victimhood mentality and inspire them to pursue their American Dreams, and _Win_ against the radical Left as Turning Point USA goes toe-to-toe with fake news media, toxic pop culture, biased “educators,” Big Tech, and more! [**To accomplish these massive – and important goals – I must raise $100,000 as soon as possible. Can I count on your support of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f462f8bcada14d899223d0bf40a94e73&_e=s5e7GlFE-dIxshuLkze5cepPxqhB2G4LtEOQc3MKvIlOne7AYSzZtV-EZL-W8aVvy7flIFgn6sZhMW1mYToDH5rqtHJ2QkV1GFUKFTImUdOzweCYbX__D_HXJbepTed2v6JqIpf6nxj5FaPpi61pz4bPhn8f4zzP2Igw26yjNjGon1Qa54iEu7Au8L0-KQFRerJikkioB9j8BkqxTHRZOTYAjV0KYCUJNXHfh38ByFW_6xLXv4hcJ0jN8qO2sgZYk9GHiHLn7vhr5Nz_TrMUSXG414LMImbfd4QReeDgE5o%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?DNC=20Coalitions=20Team?=
subject: Join Us This Week!
body:
| | |
---
| | Dear Friends,
As March comes to a close, we know we have much to highlight - including Women’s History Month, the 13th anniversary of the Affordable Care Act, and the Trans Day of Visibility. Please find more information on how you can join us below! We are just seven days away from a crucial special election in Wisconsin. If you are in Madison, please drop by a special Coalitions GOTV Rally on **Saturday, April 1st!** Judge Janet Protasiewicz will be speaking alongside leaders across various communities in Wisconsin. Stick around to get out the vote and to knock on doors afterward! Thank you all so much for your help and support.
Best,
The DNC Coalitions Team
---
|
---
| First, we want to acknowledge the senseless gun violence in Nashville, Tennessee yesterday that took the lives of three children and three teachers. We stand behind the President in his call for an assault weapons ban. Our hearts are with the Nashville community.
---
|
---
| **[@harrisonjaime: I'm truly devastated over today's shooting in Nashville, and I'm praying for the victims and their loved ones.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=88126b1fc3&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **[How can we continue to allow this to happen? We must do more to keep our communities safe and end gun violence in this country. Our children deserve better.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f747be6a84&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
**[@POTUS: I call on Congress again to pass my assault weapons ban.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=beb8f84258&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
**[It's about time we make some more progress.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7a2b3ac37f&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
**[@TheDemocrats: Congress should pass President Biden’s assault weapons ban.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8bf9eb969d&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
---
|
---
| **Investing in America Tour** Today, President Biden kicked off a three-week long, Administration-wide Investing in America tour with a visit to Wolfspeed, a manufacturer of semiconductors, which recently announced a $5 billion investment to expand their North Carolina operations and create 1,800 good-paying jobs. During the visit, President Biden announced that over $435 billion in private sector manufacturing commitments have been made since he took office.
---
|
---
| [President's Remark](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a1f04f0aa5&e=d6c5c7d7ec "President's Remark")
---
|
---
| ******Historic Africa Trip by Vice President Kamala Harris** On Sunday, March 26th, Vice President Kamala Harris landed in Accra, Ghana, beginning a three country tour across Africa this week. Vice President Harris will mark her first Africa trip while in office with visits to Tanzania and Zambia as well. [ABC News: Vice President Harris arrives for historic Africa trip, focused on investment and empowerment](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6c189cb41c&e=d6c5c7d7ec) [@VP: The energy and creativity of Ghana’s young leaders will shape the future of Africa - and the world.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d8b8266cf8&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
|
---
|
---
| **Trans Day of Visibility** On March 31, we celebrate the International Trans Day of Visibility. We celebrate the joy and resilience of trans and non-binary people everywhere by elevating voices and experiences from these communities.
To celebrate, the DC will be hosting a panel with key stakeholders on the importance of uplifting the trans and non-binary community, taking place on **[Friday, March 31, at 5 p.m. ET](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2119e499c3&e=d6c5c7d7ec). We are excited to have DNC Chair Jaime Harrison join us for this call,** as well as movement leaders like Charlotte Clymer, Josie Caballero, Vivian Topping, Evan Minton, and Marisa Richmond. What: DNC’s Trans Day of Visibility Panel
When: 5 pm ET on Friday, 3/31
Where: Virtual Join us for a panel discussion on trans issues as they stand today. With unprecedented numbers of anti-trans bills being presented in state legislatures across the country, it is critical that we stand up and fight for trans and non-binary partners in this movement. RSVP [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=aed7c222fc&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to join us on March 31 at 5 pm ET.
---
| [RSVP HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f20f826a11&e=d6c5c7d7ec "RSVP HERE")
---
|
---
|
---
| **DNC Women of Color Stakeholder Call** To celebrate Women’s History Month, the DNC will be hosting a call with key stakeholders on the importance of uplifting women of color in the political and advocacy movement, taking place on Wednesday, **_March 29, at 4 p.m. ET_**. The call will be moderated by the DNC’s Deputy Executive Director Monica Guardiola and joined by other incredible leaders across the movement, including Minnesota Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan, NARAL Pro-Choice America President Mini Timmaraju and Founder of #WinWithBlackWomen Jotaka Eaddy. This will be a great opportunity to hear directly from some fabulous women of color leaders on the ways that both advocacy and electoral work are essential to continuing to build toward progress and centering women of color. Please see below on details for registration: **[DNC Women of Color Stakeholder Call](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d499b657b2&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **With special guests NARAL Pro-Choice America President Mini Timmaraju, Minnesota Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan, and #WinWithBlackWomen Founder Jotaka Eaddy**
_Moderated by DNC Deputy Executive Director Monica Guardiola_ Wednesday, March 29, 2023
4-5 p.m. ET [This call will feature closed-captioning via the functionality that Zoom provides]
---
| [RSVP HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=852efcaf8b&e=d6c5c7d7ec "RSVP HERE")
---
|
---
| **DNC Statement on 13th Anniversary of the Affordable Care Act ** _March 23, 2023_ _DNC Chair Jaime Harrison released the following statement on the 13th anniversary of President Obama signing the Affordable Care Act into law:_ “Thirteen years ago today, President Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law, affirming that health care is a right, not a privilege, and giving Americans peace of mind that they would be able to receive the care that they need. Since then, this landmark legislation has lowered costs for families, insured more than 30 million Americans, protected coverage for those with preexisting conditions, made it possible for states to expand Medicaid, allowed those who are under 26 to stay on their parents’ health care plans, ended lifetime caps on the essential care a person can receive, provided free birth control, and so much more. It’s no wonder the ACA is more popular than ever. “Over the past two years, President Biden, Vice President Harris, and Democrats in Congress have protected and strengthened the Affordable Care Act, and thanks to their leadership in passing the monumental Inflation Reduction Act and the American Rescue Plan, ACA premiums are near record lows, enrollment is at an all-time high, and prescription drug costs continue to come down. “While Democrats fight to expand coverage and lower health care costs for families, MAGA Republicans support proposals to gut Americans’ health care. Since 2010, congressional Republicans have repeatedly voted for measures to repeal or undermine the ACA, and 2024 MAGA Republican presidential hopefuls have a long record of pushing plans that would raise Americans’ health care costs while offering less coverage. Despite these attacks, Democrats will always stand up to protect Americans’ health care."
---
| [Statement Link](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=595af10d99&e=d6c5c7d7ec "Statement Link")
---
|
---
| ******Madison Coalitions GOTV Rally** Seven days till Election Day! Join the Coalitions Team at our Madison Coalitions GOTV Rally with Judge Janet Protasiewicz on April 1st at Noon (Location TBA). More speakers to be announced soon. Help us Get Out the Vote with a door knocking shift afterwards! [Madison Coalitions GOTV Rally](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a72226c4f1&e=d6c5c7d7ec) Where: Madison TBA When: 12 PM, Sat, April 1 Who: AAPI, Black, Latino, LGBTQ+ & Native American Coalitions Leaders, Elected Officials, and Community Members
---
| [RSVP HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=49c7471a5d&e=d6c5c7d7ec "RSVP HERE")
---
| | _Copyright © 2023 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved._
This is a test distribution list.

**Our mailing address is:**
DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003
[Add us to your address book](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/vcard?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=35180d5371) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=35180d5371).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&afl=1)
---

name: Assemblymember Mia Bonta
subject: 3 Days and Counting - please join us at Sessions on 15th, this Thursday evening!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2024, FPPC#1456426
body:
MIA BONTA FOR ASSEMBLY 2024

Dear Laurie,

Thank you to everyone who has taken the time to reply generously to the invitation already for our Re-Election Campaign Kick Off Event this Thursday, March 30, 2023 from 5:30 - 7:00 pm at Sessions on 15th in downtown Oakland .

As you have heard, I am moving full steam ahead in representing our District's community members - in Alameda, Emeryville, and Oakland - and in leading on the issues of importance to us and our state.
Election Day Tuesday, March 5, 2024 will be here quickly, so I have started preparing for my re-election to the CA State Assembly to represent AD-18 and hope you will be with me.

Please mark your calendars for this important re-election campaign fundraiser on Thursday, March 30th at 5:30 pm to 7:00 pm !

Please show your support by:

Becoming an Event Sponsor!
Sponsorship levels: $5,500 • $2,500 • $1,500 • $750 • $500

Purchasing Tickets:
Individuals: $118 per person

Please contact 510-839-3100 or events@earpevents.com

I look forward to seeing you this Thursday - and thank you in advance for being a part of the movement for change!

With gratitude,

Mia Bonta

Thank you to our early Sponsors and Co-Hosts*: Champion: William Crotinger • Jerry Meyer • Roz Meyer • NUHW • Sheet Metal Workers Local 104 * SEIU Local 1021 | Ally : CA Nurses Association • Roy Choi • IBEW Local 595 • Sprinkler Fitters Local 483 | Partner: Isaac Kos-Read/Kos-Read Group • IUEC Local 8 PAC | Friend: Alameda Firefighters Association, Local 689 • Firefighters Local 55 • Lee Harris • Kelly Lux • Insulators Local 16 • Hon. Courtney Welch

* Please reply now to add your name to this ever-growing list!

PS: If you cannot be with us, then please donate .
Your generous contribution today means we will have what is needed to mobilize voters to support my re-election campaign. And, as always, share this information with your friends and colleagues so we continue to grow our reach!

Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2024, FPPC#1456426
4200 Park Blvd., #128, Oakland, CA. 94602 | 510-839-3100 | laurie@earpevents.com

**_And guess who sits at the top of that shortlist? None other than Tom Malinowski._**

We thought Malinowski’s resounding defeat last year was a clear enough message that New Jerseyans don’t want their district’s representative to be known for inflationary spending, belittling parents’ concerns about their children's education, or of course...insider trading. But I guess the Dems didn’t get the message. Help us get ready for tomorrow’s fight, today. [**Anything you can chip in will give us a head start and have a compounding effect on our results next year.**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=31e30dbf50004970854e65678fffd51e&_e=nxE6LpMEhEsXzC25AdIEnZWwt9pCHlyItE476FA-MgtyhbBWYPWrz0JX-SoS042Ak5m1eDFiKwTF1MtQi8VMUzug0ARDtpWcyeKs5SFHlXOyIALnsjsAXonSbrGGPm35A_aQ0GhRjRKnJP9WPpedBzTwVZUgFdEU9_BZYcD8at0Ws7x_I-p2uF-1jvxOrWE_xTUeV65MkaousoHRVYLmxDhmS3GHuiv0Q2clpAANVBXF7_IrPCg3I01jcfuO_fj5uQ37NP_Xn6Z5g0qbRSSBLKOGi3t7jBZqqGOeVps9tde4DhOHKQFHVaz0MM_6UCZAFYD_Agz-VH7OqUObtssTU8vmkXj4_EHX-Sf4PB8acnAh_PZNCHxDl5Rv7ZdYJPC7) Thanks, and let’s get ready to win...AGAIN! —Team Kean

clean_body: Already planning their 2024 attack... | | | | | — ATTENTION FRIEND — Tom Kean has only been serving in Congress for three months now, but we learned this week from that the Democrats already have a shortlist of potential challengers—calling it “the most competitive race in New Jersey in 2024.” And guess who sits at the top of that shortlist? None other than Tom Malinowski. We thought Malinowski’s resounding defeat last year was a clear enough message that New Jerseyans don’t want their district’s representative to be known for inflationary spending, belittling parents’ concerns about their children's education, or of course...insider trading. But I guess the Dems didn’t get the message. Help us get ready for tomorrow’s fight, today. Thanks, and let’s get ready to win...AGAIN! —Team Kean | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2023 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation.
