name: Dick Durbin
subject: I’ll be blunt, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
This isn’t the time to be complacent.
#
I’ll be blunt, Peter:
After a strong finish in 2022, donations have been down for the first few months of the new year.
Democrats grew our majority in the Senate, but this isn’t the time to be complacent. The GOP are working around the clock to undo our gains and erase our progress. We need to be prepared.
**[We’re working to reach our $15,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal by March 31. Can you help? Contribute what you can right now to help me meet the first quarterly goal of 2023.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60876186/398508174/-1956482181?refcode=dd_em_230328_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmE4MjI0Ny1iYmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vPxjSnezCqfokGzO2wGYSwPs2iMbjCfe-Ya_P_-EwfA=)**
Every day in Washington, I wake up and go to work for people in Illinois and across the nation.
In the Senate, I am leading the Judiciary Committee’s record number of judicial confirmations, working to pass the Dream Act and the Equal Rights Amendment, and pushing back on the GOP’s dangerous plans, including the new Republican-proposed legislation to codify the Supreme Court’s _Bruen_ decision and throw gun safety laws into chaos all across the country.
While Democrats are fighting for you in Washington, I know that grassroots supporters like you will always have our back. That’s why I am turning to you now to help our team across the finish line this quarter so we can keep the Senate blue. Anything you can give will make a difference.
**[I’m asking you to dig deep, Peter. We can’t afford to miss this goal and let the Republicans outpace us this quarter. Will you pitch in right away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60876188/398508175/-1956482181?refcode=dd_em_230328_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmE4MjI0Ny1iYmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vPxjSnezCqfokGzO2wGYSwPs2iMbjCfe-Ya_P_-EwfA=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

name: Becca Balint
subject: Republicans’ shameful attack on LGBTQ kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
Bills targeting transgender children have made their way to Washington

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60876218/398508207/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzRhN2M3My1iYmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gN5NuFA4STrBh79jXWPhnp8jT7G5mtlMFmRFapVzDbI=&emci=e442c8ae-a0cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=634a7c73-bbcd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Peter, Bills aimed at attacking the LGBTQ community – specifically transgender children – have officially made their way to Washington. Republicans have just introduced and passed a bill in the U.S. House to defund public schools that allow trans children to participate in sports or that allow books on LGBTQ history in their classrooms. This bill is a part of a growing movement to push transgender Americans out of public life, to label LGBTQ adults as “groomers,” and to isolate LGBTQ youth from any sense of belonging in our schools or communities. **Let me make myself clear: We will not allow extreme ideologues to turn our classrooms into a battlefield for waging divisive culture wars. Our students, educators, and LGBTQ youth deserve better – and we cannot allow more bills like this to advance through the House. ** [**I will continue to voice my outrage and disgust for bills like this, but I need you with me in this fight. Pitch in $5 or more to help me defend LGBTQ rights in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60876219/398508208/539210454?refcode=E20738-2030327-AntiLGBTBillHouse-SL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzRhN2M3My1iYmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gN5NuFA4STrBh79jXWPhnp8jT7G5mtlMFmRFapVzDbI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60876220/398508209/539210454?express_lane=true&refcode=E20738-2030327-AntiLGBTBillHouse-EL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzRhN2M3My1iYmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gN5NuFA4STrBh79jXWPhnp8jT7G5mtlMFmRFapVzDbI=)** | **[$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60876221/398508210/539210454?express_lane=true&refcode=E20738-2030327-AntiLGBTBillHouse-EL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzRhN2M3My1iYmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gN5NuFA4STrBh79jXWPhnp8jT7G5mtlMFmRFapVzDbI=)**

This month, I traveled around Vermont to speak with folks about the urgent issues people are facing – housing, child care, and protecting social safety nets like Social Security and Medicare. I also spoke directly with high school students about their need for additional support in schools for things like mental health.
Not one person, not ONE in all my travels around the state, advocated for less funding for schools, or for punishing and ostracizing trans children.
Increased visibility for LGBTQ Americans over the past several decades has allowed for great progress. But today, it is now being weaponized by partisan extremists across the country to target the most vulnerable in our communities: LGBTQ youth.
**I am working my heart out to stand up to bigots, bullies, and hateful legislation aimed at LGBTQ Americans.[If you stand with me, then please pitch in $5 or more today to help me keep up the fight in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60876226/398508215/539210454?refcode=E20738-2030327-AntiLGBTBillHouse-SL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzRhN2M3My1iYmNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gN5NuFA4STrBh79jXWPhnp8jT7G5mtlMFmRFapVzDbI=)**
Yours,
Becca Balint

clean_body: Bills targeting transgender children have made their way to Washington | | Peter, Bills aimed at attacking the LGBTQ community – specifically transgender children – have officially made their way to Washington. Republicans have just introduced and passed a bill in the U.S. House to defund public schools that allow trans children to participate in sports or that allow books on LGBTQ history in their classrooms. This bill is a part of a growing movement to push transgender Americans out of public life, to label LGBTQ adults as “groomers,” and to isolate LGBTQ youth from any sense of belonging in our schools or communities. Let me make myself clear: We will not allow extreme ideologues to turn our classrooms into a battlefield for waging divisive culture wars. Our students, educators, and LGBTQ youth deserve better – and we cannot allow more bills like this to advance through the House. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = This month, I traveled around Vermont to speak with folks about the urgent issues people are facing – housing, child care, and protecting social safety nets like Social Security and Medicare. I also spoke directly with high school students about their need for additional support in schools for things like mental health. Not one person, not ONE in all my travels around the state, advocated for less funding for schools, or for punishing and ostracizing trans children. Increased visibility for LGBTQ Americans over the past several decades has allowed for great progress. But today, it is now being weaponized by partisan extremists across the country to target the most vulnerable in our communities: LGBTQ youth. I am working my heart out to stand up to bigots, bullies, and hateful legislation aimed at LGBTQ Americans.= Yours, Becca Balint = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont Becca for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05302 United States

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Where Did the Money Go?
body:
What has happened to America's values? No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qkkikz-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-r/)
## **It's Tuesday. Sending prayers to our members affected by the[storms over the weekend](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-y/)[ _._](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-j/)**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-t/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-i/) **Where Did the Money Go?** **[Zelensky has admitted that Ukraine is already out of ammo](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-d/).** More than $100 Billion was been allocated to Ukraine for this war, but the real question is, where did the money go? **Trump Grand Jury** **[The Manhattan grand jury considering charges against former President Trump](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-h/) **was expected to reconvene yesterday.
**Sad Results of New Poll** **[Traditional values such as religious faith, patriotism, having children, and other priorities](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-k/)** are becoming less important for Americans according to a new poll. **School Shooting in Tennessee** A **[shooting at a Tennessee private Christian grade school left three students and three adults dead](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-u/)** Monday, and the shooter, a 28-year-old woman, was killed by police. **Another Train Derailment** **[A 70-car train hauling hazardous materials derailed in North Dakota late Sunday,](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-o/) **about a mile southeast of Wyndmere in Richland Count**.** **Putin Retaliates** **[Putin said the country planned to station tactical nuclear weapons in Belarus in retaliation](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-x/)** for the U.K.'s decision to provide Ukraine with armor-piercing rounds containing depleted uranium.

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-m/)!**
* And **[just like that](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-c/)**.
* What is **[going on here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-q/)**?
* Times have **[changed](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-a/).**
* We must **[identify the idiots.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-f/)**
* How was he**[supposed to know](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkkikz-trhiujldw-z/)?**

Folks,

**Our FIRST End-of-Quarter deadline of the new year will be here before we know it, and we 've come way too far to stop now.
**
The sun only rises 4 more times before the Quarter deadline. So I'm hoping you can rise up with me as we get closer to 2024! **[Chip in here!](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=d184579942444d6db74296d596f9e7ad&_e=GRElN-tETepPC9bqnyxmOW2xIET2Z3Upzmuc2wRBWlSF9E2lIcTPHFuWnypZ7ctUTDV5tmpbo4sJPAPSBbumEDOuus0fZfvTJ-H4q-qZiecCB0pSCYPTMnnu65IYtwJ9X4pZHVrtKLfkxvbBHob0QN1BaF9gxkKCZDjzc4x_pFxHRLp_URKTlG5nGMPq_xlepcIIzztr93FwMxg2ehpgs9FNb2dkiYFTcpeiLLFDLLZE1YuwkxG9iRmapkLzfD8I5hTtTCMEW3yoVKeaSN17oxabviwPeuvr_GoHCWqE5gjwFp3IbXxXep87XGBHNl7anrJ3QvrfvGftn5dQjGWERL_hFZqyFlDmqa54AOu-X2oud4AkaoHmQLoqrFu5wtGZa0hthkzxSf3qFkyCDmIlVeav0mc4Uz9Tgdp-mOEsnCJ3_Ki7CfuT1djB0cIe54BFUdZ186aOXSbFVOH9DUaoNGlfB6wXERrxpHG4gGcW8rUfNYTZllSeM45AqR7rNrzOM8jhAYIin74mhPVJya-FIA%3D%3D)**

Once this deadline hits, every Democrat from Chuck Schumer to Joe Biden is going to see our fundraising numbers. They're hoping we fall short of our goal. We can't afford to let that happen or risk giving them a chance to take Iowa from us. It's a key part of their plan to keep control of the Senate and the White House.

I don't know about you, but I think it's time we show the Radical Left we're not going to sit back and give up our country without a fight.

clean_body: Can we make this a 4-day wonder? | Folks, Our FIRST End-of-Quarter deadline of the new year will be here before we know it, and we 've come way too far to stop now. The sun only rises 4 more times before the Quarter deadline. So I'm hoping you can rise up with me as we get closer to 2024! Once this deadline hits, every Democrat from Chuck Schumer to Joe Biden is going to see our fundraising numbers. They're hoping we fall short of our goal. We can't afford to let that happen or risk giving them a chance to take Iowa from us. It's a key part of their plan to keep control of the Senate and the White House. I don't know about you, but I think it's time we show the Radical Left we're not going to sit back and give up our country without a fight. | Now, I'm counting on you to join me to help TAKE BACK THE WHITE HOUSE. Our deadline is LESS THAN ONE WEEK AWAY , and you're receiving this because I know I can count on you during this final stretch. God bless, Senator Chuck Grassley Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc. Copyright (C) 2023 The Grassley Committee, All rights reserved.

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: I’m heartbroken by the news of yesterday’s shooting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tamie Wilson for US 273 SARATOGA ST
body:
this crisis has to stop.

| I’m shaken to my core to hear about yesterday’s school shooting in Nashville, Tennessee that took the lives of 3 children and 3 adult staff members.

As a mother, I’m shattered. Parents in our country shouldn’t have to fear for their children’s lives every time they step foot in the classroom.

**I’m also beyond furious.** Nashville is the 38th mass shooting in the U.S. in _March alone._ Let that sink in. And yet, time and time again Republicans like Jim Jordan call themselves “pro-life” while our children are murdered in cold blood.

We cannot allow this senseless violence to continue. Passing groundbreaking, common sense gun control legislation is one of my top priorities, and as a nation, **we absolutely can’t afford to wait another second for action.**

Thank you for standing with me in this fight.

In solidarity,

Tamie Wilson
---
| | Paid for by Tamie Wilson for US 273 SARATOGA ST. DELAWARE, OH 43015
www.tamiewilson.com

body:
We’re proud of our average contribution - here’s why:
#
Derek, $13.36 is our average online contribution for this quarter.
**Here’s why we’re proud of that number:** Our average contribution proves that this movement is powered by small-dollar donations.
This campaign isn’t funded by corporate PACs or ultra-wealthy donors _._ We’ve relied on real people like you donating what + when they’re able to since Day One — and we plan to keep it that way.
**[So we’re asking again before our upcoming end-of-quarter fundraising deadline: Will you match this quarter’s average gift — $13.36 — or pitch in any amount you’re able to today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230328-1?refcode=em20230328-1-8307&refcode2=8307_434096_XuTTpo&akid=8307%2E434096%2EXuTTpo)**

Every donation adds up and helps support John’s work in the U.S. Senate so we can finally make real progress on the issues that impact us the most.

— Team Fetterman 💛

name: Fair Fight
subject: We’ve got big plans to fight voter suppression
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
We’re coming up on another critical election year in 2024 and Republicans have made their priorities crystal clear: more attacks on the freedom to vote. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60876951/398511294/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230328_f_eom1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTU2ZDk1OS1iZWNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YeNpz3sS_RxT1UNkuzLSweWXeYXwhsRwtZNmKrLoVlo=&emci=a456d959-becd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a556d959-becd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)

| | We’ve got big plans. As Republican voter suppression attacks in Georgia ramped up in March, we fought back — and we need the strength of this grassroots movement alongside us so we can continue to. We’re not surprised by the recent voter suppression bills in Georgia. Extremists know how critical of a battleground state Georgia will be in the national political landscape. And they’re making every effort to restrict the voting process between now and the next election — especially for Black, brown, and young voters who have been left out of the political process far too many times. Here at Fair Fight, we have a **game plan** to combat Republican voter suppression attempts, and it depends on grassroots support from activists like you. Take a look: **⇨ Expand** voting access by advocating at the local level
**⇨ Endorse** and support more pro-democracy candidates
**⇨ Produce** voter education materials to counter disinformation
**⇨ Train** hundreds of Democracy Warriors to reach voters ahead of elections
**⇨ Challenge** groups that engage in voter suppression and disinformation in court
**⇨ Reach** young voters with informative and compelling social media content about making our voices heard at the ballot box This plan is just a small part of how we’ll ensure eligible voters can access the ballot box freely and fairly in 2024. And the actions we take right now count. [_**That’s why hitting our $30,000 goal before our end-of-month fundraising deadline Friday at midnight is so critical, so we can scale up our efforts in the critical months ahead. And we’ve still got $7,946 to go. Can you make a donation to help get the resources we need to keep up this important fight?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60876952/398511295/-581924022?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230328_f_eom1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTU2ZDk1OS1iZWNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YeNpz3sS_RxT1UNkuzLSweWXeYXwhsRwtZNmKrLoVlo=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60876953/398511296/-581924022?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230328_f_eom1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTU2ZDk1OS1iZWNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YeNpz3sS_RxT1UNkuzLSweWXeYXwhsRwtZNmKrLoVlo=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60876954/398511297/-581924022?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230328_f_eom1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTU2ZDk1OS1iZWNkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YeNpz3sS_RxT1UNkuzLSweWXeYXwhsRwtZNmKrLoVlo=)

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Major Threat to the Wolf Compensation Fund
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60877020/398511399/697470913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiZWM2NDc2LWJlY2QtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fvlJNvYC3ObkWvncQkZOmHQ5IgZLS8EeqxR8IseqgZc=&emci=f38c9005-accd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bbec6476-becd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) | | | Dear Peter, We need your help to stop a Major Threat: The Wolf Compensation Fund bill (HB 2631-3) may get a vote in committee this Thursday. The bill proposes a compensation multiplier of five times the fair market value of livestock or working dogs injured or killed by wolves. If passed, a living cow worth $2,000 would skyrocket in value to $10,000 when it is killed by a wolf. [**We need to let our lawmakers know that we do not support the Wolf Compensation Fund bill (HB 2631). Will you write an email asking your state representative to vote NO on the Wolf Compensation Fund bill before Thursday?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60877021/398511400/697470913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiZWM2NDc2LWJlY2QtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fvlJNvYC3ObkWvncQkZOmHQ5IgZLS8EeqxR8IseqgZc=&emci=f38c9005-accd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bbec6476-becd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Wolves are an iconic animal, and as keystone predators they play an important role. Yet, they have faced decades of extinction risk from humans. Trouble for wolves began 80 years ago with wolf bounties. By the 1940s, all the gray wolves that had called Oregon home were killed off. Fifty years later, they started to make a comeback as they migrated west from the northern Rockies. The Wolf Compensation Fund was created with the goal of promoting coexistence and tolerance. It was a good first step toward supporting their ongoing recovery. However, bills threatening their comeback, like HB 2631-3, are continuously introduced in Salem by anti-wildlife interests and their political allies. [**If we value our native wildlife, we need to speak up on their behalf.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60877022/398511401/697470913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiZWM2NDc2LWJlY2QtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fvlJNvYC3ObkWvncQkZOmHQ5IgZLS8EeqxR8IseqgZc=&emci=f38c9005-accd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bbec6476-becd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) A five-time compensation multiplier as proposed by this bill undermines the purpose of the Wolf Compensation Fund and is simply perverse. If anything, this bill would provide less of an incentive for properly caring for and protecting livestock and working dogs. **[Please join us in urging our lawmakers to vote NO on this bill.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60877023/398511402/697470913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiZWM2NDc2LWJlY2QtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fvlJNvYC3ObkWvncQkZOmHQ5IgZLS8EeqxR8IseqgZc=&emci=f38c9005-accd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bbec6476-becd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230)** Thank you, Julia DeGraw

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, We need your help to stop a Major Threat: The Wolf Compensation Fund bill (HB 2631-3) may get a vote in committee this Thursday. The bill proposes a compensation multiplier of five times the fair market value of livestock or working dogs injured or killed by wolves. If passed, a living cow worth $2,000 would skyrocket in value to $10,000 when it is killed by a wolf. Wolves are an iconic animal, and as keystone predators they play an important role. Yet, they have faced decades of extinction risk from humans. Trouble for wolves began 80 years ago with wolf bounties. By the 1940s, all the gray wolves that had called Oregon home were killed off. Fifty years later, they started to make a comeback as they migrated west from the northern Rockies. The Wolf Compensation Fund was created with the goal of promoting coexistence and tolerance. It was a good first step toward supporting their ongoing recovery. However, bills threatening their comeback, like HB 2631-3, are continuously introduced in Salem by anti-wildlife interests and their political allies. A five-time compensation multiplier as proposed by this bill undermines the purpose of the Wolf Compensation Fund and is simply perverse. If anything, this bill would provide less of an incentive for properly caring for and protecting livestock and working dogs. Thank you, Julia DeGraw Coalition Director, OLCV | | ---|---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters. | ---|---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Biden isn’t a progressive fighter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, President
Biden isn’t on our side. He’s never been a progressive fighter, and he’s
continuing to disappoint us.

1) Just last week, the Biden Administration rejected reducing the price of
a cancer treatment medication. Shame on the Biden administration for
taking Big Pharma's side against the American people — no one should have
to go into debt to take care of their medical conditions.

2) The New York Times recently reported that the Biden Administration is
“considering reviving the practice of detaining migrant families” — this
would be a huge betrayal to us all if his administration reinstated the
horrifying policy of detaining undocumented immigrants at the border.

As progressives who exist to transform the Democratic Party from the
inside out, we’re working to push the Biden Administration to implement
policies that match the scale of the crises we face and actually serve the
everyday people of this country.

We face attacks and outside spending from all sides of the political
establishment — moderate Democrats and right-wing groups all want to see
us fail in electing the next fighter like Alexandria Ocasio-Cotez. Your
contribution is so important because we rely on grassroots contributions
from emails just like this one.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132460?refcode=em20230328-28213&t=1001&akid=28213%2E1203867%2EAf_4xK ]Please, before our end-of-quarter deadline, make a $3
contribution right now to help us pressure the Biden Administration to
actually work for the everyday people of our country.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132460?refcode=em20230328-28213&t=1020&akid=28213%2E1203867%2EAf_4xK ]Contribute $3

Solidarity always,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=28213%2E1203867%2EAf_4xK ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=28213%2E1203867%2EAf_4xK ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230328-28213-footer&t=1023&refcode2=28213_1203867_Af_4xK&akid=28213%2E1203867%2EAf_4xK

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=28213%2E1203867%2EAf_4xK

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: We need police, they need us
body:
If you stand with law enforcement and are grateful to them for putting their lives on the line to protect us, please help. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.theleaguealerts.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=4d3358f89ac84254ae0da9863c6c378a&_s=ad841687b4d74b1da61348633c99fb63&_t=QRXI56GCgy27WPBdJu1vtxHTnBGKaeV9SR0Y2D_qY4xHhKZXz7bMlr9behMQ6xb5nSK7ofVPhNyoNNQVd0I6cR18icXdxNRhZsh_tQefYjo%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.theleaguealerts.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=4d3358f89ac84254ae0da9863c6c378a&_s=ad841687b4d74b1da61348633c99fb63&_t=QRXI56GCgy27WPBdJu1vtxHTnBGKaeV9SR0Y2D_qY4xHhKZXz7bMlr9behMQ6xb5nSK7ofVPhNyoNNQVd0I6cR18icXdxNRhZsh_tQefYjo%3D)

[](http://links.theleaguealerts.com/u/click?_t=4d3358f89ac84254ae0da9863c6c378a&_m=ad841687b4d74b1da61348633c99fb63&_e=x8SjRnX72gTg04YU7-7sdH3BCjlQIdMajg67jIJvJeAAwAwSksLFf_1lt-ERo6RwfBSNSLSmMuyW0p1Ovd79g0GgBp8D68AB7y6IJJ6MfXf1_JDR9fk-JIuHwk8Hc_60DEKdMo3A5G7zYaU05F14aAVbCwx_eYV307XJLkEh1fRjP03SDvFYrpYbwrlvKy0SNNdoSX7UZQhaTSeXOs10DSDBpzUb7OOpijQCnSkVyhHg2HK4KwuU2YPRAxxobtycsrzkrhoxlU4K6x5KozhB7Cc3vrJkbaNw81efl17v-FfBXQ3HcAcqk2jxx7JIRvHO4HlqLt9r75kfBTZ81ZVuwg%3D%3D)

---
Fellow patriot,

It’s never been truer just how badly we need capable law enforcement in America to deal with the endless threats posed to us and our communities.

It’s also never been truer just how much they need support from patriots who believe in law & order and who are opposed the Left’s effort to defund, disarm and demonize police.

**The League for Law Enforcement** is leading the charge to give law enforcement the support and resources they need to do their job of protecting us in the face of increasing hostility toward them.

Our first quarterly fundraising deadline of 2023 is just days away on Friday, March 31st. **We still need 150 more supporters to chip in so we can avoid falling short of our fundraising goal** and ensure we have the resources we need to support police.

If you stand with law enforcement and are grateful to them for putting their lives on the line to protect us, [**please make a pre-deadline donation of $10, $25, $50 or more to help us support and defend them.**](http://links.theleaguealerts.com/u/click?_t=4d3358f89ac84254ae0da9863c6c378a&_m=ad841687b4d74b1da61348633c99fb63&_e=x8SjRnX72gTg04YU7-7sdH3BCjlQIdMajg67jIJvJeAAwAwSksLFf_1lt-ERo6RwfBSNSLSmMuyW0p1Ovd79g0GgBp8D68AB7y6IJJ6MfXf1_JDR9fk-JIuHwk8Hc_60DEKdMo3A5G7zYaU05F14aAVbCwx_eYV307XJLkEh1fRjP03SDvFYrpYbwrlvKy0Sum0YdjfUb0z6m7COay86VaX5BqVN1XVuiPW5UVcKFGhRPPvOa8VHcodKFJgo4LBVravzBGKj0nMB1wo2YRFjRBm8XkRwkVP92erNusIh-FVAiyGiIIO3Hnr0gzT0NKGO8oGn7FnciOn_AZL44AMmdw%3D%3D)

[ **SUPPORT LAW ENFORCEMENT
DONATE BEFORE THE DEADLINE » **](http://links.theleaguealerts.com/u/click?_t=4d3358f89ac84254ae0da9863c6c378a&_m=ad841687b4d74b1da61348633c99fb63&_e=x8SjRnX72gTg04YU7-7sdH3BCjlQIdMajg67jIJvJeAAwAwSksLFf_1lt-ERo6RwfBSNSLSmMuyW0p1Ovd79g0GgBp8D68AB7y6IJJ6MfXf1_JDR9fk-JIuHwk8Hc_60DEKdMo3A5G7zYaU05F14aAVbCwx_eYV307XJLkEh1fRjP03SDvFYrpYbwrlvKy0SbktL8jr1eHjygT-qlh0Z5hyGPopxf7MeLQF_-H__v01aNRiRS1PSTZzI_CR0nT0wfzubJ9ajzjfoDtj9kPMSWq4v0t1gDG0mSMYoQiHyMyaw4_ffQP_JWdbLNBZu4AZflUvbK4sinqS6LZX9JAipFg%3D%3D)
For those who wear the badge,

**Jim Fotis** , President

* * *
“The League”
Lynbrook, NY PD 14-yr Veteran (retired)

| |
# ABOUT "THE LEAGUE"
---
The League was formed to bring back the law - both in the inalienable rights of defense and in enforcing the laws at all levels of government, protecting the good and removing the bad from our great society. The League represents sportsmen, hunters, law enforcement, and others who in the past have been the mainstay of our society. The League stands for the defense of our Constitutional Rights, our inalienable rights protected by the First Amendment, Second Amendment and the eight other amendments in our Bill of Rights.
# ABOUT JIM FOTIS

A retired 14-year veteran of the Lynbrook Police Department in New York, Jim Fotis was injured in the line of duty and is the highest decorated officer in the Department's history. Now, Jim is dedicating his life to advocating for law enforcement and American values.
## [**JOIN US TODAY »**](http://links.theleaguealerts.com/u/click?_t=4d3358f89ac84254ae0da9863c6c378a&_m=ad841687b4d74b1da61348633c99fb63&_e=x8SjRnX72gTg04YU7-7sdH3BCjlQIdMajg67jIJvJeAAwAwSksLFf_1lt-ERo6RwfBSNSLSmMuyW0p1Ovd79g0GgBp8D68AB7y6IJJ6MfXf1_JDR9fk-JIuHwk8Hc_60DEKdMo3A5G7zYaU05F14aAVbCwx_eYV307XJLkEh1fRjP03SDvFYrpYbwrlvKy0S7jsk08mPW3xsHYH9-dKQRLyKGzrvWtd8nCE0cXNl2XolXKNYaBP20e3UFLUMP5izHhNQlTcUJaruPL4Cl9X-zBGACO9feFehxkSftjXH1zes86LDSLeup9kbnviGrVnuLL5xtgKP0tys9Y2mSSN0Fw%3D%3D)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Every time you chip in to our campaign, you’re supporting our work to defend the Senate and continue the incredible progress we’ve been making over the past few years.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=94%2E35263%2EwpGtjG)
Hey Peter — We’re behind on our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and there’s a good chance we’ll miss our goal unless we can collect a few more grassroots donations by Friday night. [**So, we’re asking every person reading this email to chip in just $1 — _and no, that’s not a typo_ — to help us reach our target.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2250?c0=tbe-em-march2023.1IIiVc&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230328_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=94%2E35263%2EwpGtjG) | | [CHIP IN $1 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2250?c0=tbe-em-march2023.1IIiVc&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230328_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=94%2E35263%2EwpGtjG)
---

---
In just three days, we will be reporting our first quarterly fundraising numbers of the year to the Federal Election Commission, and then our report will go public. Sending a strong report to the FEC is really important to our team, because it will not only show how much we raised over the last three months, but **also the number of supporters who chipped in.**
That’s why we’re just asking for $1 today. Because every time you chip in to our campaign, regardless of how much, you’re supporting Tammy’s work to defend the Senate and continue the incredible progress we’ve been making over the past few years.
So yes, Peter, one dollar might not sound like a lot. But if each person who reads this email chips in $1, we’ll show everyone reading our FEC report that Tammy is supported by a strong grassroots team committed to continuing our fight for progress — _not to mention, we’d reach our final donor goal in no time!_
[**So, what do you say? Will you add your name to our FEC report with a donation of $1 (or more!) today?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-march2023.nl-AYM&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230328_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=94%2E35263%2EwpGtjG)

name: Cori Bush HQ
subject: People-powered from day one.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Grassroots donors like you make our movement possible.
#
Peter,
Politicians and policies should not be bought or influenced by corporate and special interests. That's why, unlike the _**vast majority of Congress,**_ Cori has never accepted **_a single cent_** from corporate PACs.
Our movement has been grassroots and people-powered from day one, and that's what sets us apart.
As we approach our first end-of-quarter deadline this year, our average donation for the quarter is **$23.14** — a number we're proud of. Our campaign is funded by the same folks our movement is fighting for every single day.
[**Your $23.14 donations are key to making this campaign possible. If you can, will you chip in $23.14 to support our movement today?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230328.hjC4KK&refcode=em20230328-2412&t=1&akid=2412%2E1082990%2EGWW-sz)
**[Donate $23.14](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230328.hjC4KK&refcode=em20230328-2412&t=20&akid=2412%2E1082990%2EGWW-sz)**
With your support, Cori has delivered for communities — and she's not slowing down.
Because of you, we're transforming our politics and bringing progressive change to folks in St. Louis and across the country.
We know the road ahead will be challenging. But Cori won't back down. With our first end-of-quarter deadline approaching in three days, we need your support as she organizes and legislates in Congress for an agenda that puts people first.**[If you can afford it, will you chip in $23.14 or anything you can to help support Cori and our movement today?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230328.hjC4KK&refcode=em20230328-2412&t=21&akid=2412%2E1082990%2EGWW-sz)**
In solidarity,
—Cori Bush HQ

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230328?refcode=em20230328-2412-footer&t=22&refcode2=2412_1082990_GWW-sz&akid=2412%2E1082990%2EGWW-sz) **

clean_body: Grassroots donors like you make our movement possible. Peter, Politicians and policies should not be bought or influenced by corporate and special interests. That's why, unlike the vast majority of Congress, Cori has never accepted a single cent from corporate PACs. Our movement has been grassroots and people-powered from day one, and that's what sets us apart. As we approach our first end-of-quarter deadline this year, our average donation for the quarter is $23.14 — a number we're proud of. Our campaign is funded by the same folks our movement is fighting for every single day. With your support, Cori has delivered for communities — and she's not slowing down. Because of you, we're transforming our politics and bringing progressive change to folks in St. Louis and across the country. We know the road ahead will be challenging. But Cori won't back down. With our first end-of-quarter deadline approaching in three days, we need your support as she organizes and legislates in Congress for an agenda that puts people first. In solidarity, —Cori Bush HQ Follow us on , , , and . This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
